---
title: "June"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### Import

#### Libraries

```{r}

## common libraries
library(dplyr)
library(sf)

## join campus polygons
library(nngeo)
library(igraph) ## read https://r.igraph.org/reference/  https://r.igraph.org/reference/graph.adjlist.html?q=graph_from_adj_list#null 

## land use analysis
library(terra)
citation("terra")
library(raster)

## plots
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)

# Bias assessment packages -- based on base R
library(spatstat.geom)
library(spatstat.random)
### use this for estimating average neighbor distace for random bias estimations. read more here: https://github.com/spatstat/spatstat.geom 

##### Write and run a negative binomial glm
library(MASS)

## tidy data
library(broom)

#maps
library(tmap)

```

#### Import datasets (a)

First all boundaries were imported as provided by a member of our institutes. This file provides all the boundaries for campuses with a Bioblitz in 2024. The file includes boundaries of main campuses, research institutes and research sites. We only focus on main campuses. Campuses are kept for

```{r}

##### ------ 1. Merge polygons ------ #######

# Import all campus polygons
campus_boundaries <- st_read("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/July_analysis/campus_NL.shp") 

### Join  polygons with a nearest distance <=200m from each other 
distance_boundaries <- 200 #meters


## Get the euclidean distance of the two nearest edges of each polygon 
pols_as_campus <- st_is_within_distance(campus_boundaries,campus_boundaries,distance_boundaries)

# Create groups of polygons connected by distance 
pols_as_campus_groups <- graph_from_adj_list(pols_as_campus)

## Get a cluster id (membership) and assign each polygon from the campus boundary file to a membership 
campus_boundaries$group <- components(pols_as_campus_groups)$membership

# Merge polygons in each group based on the newly assigned "group" value. This is done through the summarize (st_union). Furthermore, merged_values = list() adds all the polygon names we joined as a list so i can use them for the analysis. The mutate() makes the polygon names readable

campus_boundaries_merged <- campus_boundaries %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_union(geometry),
  merged_values = list(Name)) %>%
   mutate(campus = sapply(merged_values, paste, collapse = ", "))

##### ---- 2. Based on the merged campus, we rename the polygons with spaces ---- ####

# All polygon locations were visually inspected by compared to Open Street Maps. Polygons that did not correspond to a main campus were classified accordingly and excluded from further analysis 

## Nijmegen campus
campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Nijmegen - Heijendaal, HAN University of Applied Sciences Prof. Molkenboerstraat 3, HAN University of Applied Sciences - Albertinum, HAN University of Applied Sciences - Campus Nijmegen, HAN University of Applied Sciences GWW1, HAN University of Applied Sciences Heyendaalseweg 141")] <- "Nijmegen_campus"

# Avans Breda
campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Avans Hogeschool Lovendijkstraat, Avans Hogeschoollaan")] <- "Avans_Breda"

# Avans Hertogenbosch
campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Avans Hogeschool Onderwijsboulevard 215, Avans Hogeschool Statenlaan 29-67, Avans Hogeschool Onderwijsboulevard 256")] <- "Avans_Hertogenbosch"

# Leiden_Binnenstad
campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Campus Binnenstad Leiden KOG, Campus Binnenstad Oude UB, Campus Binnenstad Leiden Humanities Campus en Hortus")] <- "Leiden_Binnenstad"

# WUR_main_campus
campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Wageningen - Kielekampsteeg, Wageningen - Campus, Proefveldjes prof Piet Zonneveld")] <- "WUR_main_campus"

# WUR NOT main campus (research sites)
campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("IJmuiden - Wageningen Marine Research","WUR glastuinbouw Bleiswijk","WUR Proeftuin Randwijk","WUR Valthermond BioBlitz 2024","WUR De Marke BioBlitz 2024", "WUR Vredepeel proefvlak_1 BioBlitz 2024, WUR Vredepeel proefvlak_2 BioBlitz 2024",  "WUR Lelystad WBVR BioBlitz 2024" )] <- "WUR_Not_main_campus"

# Not universities!!
campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Vroege Vogels - Ooijpolder 1, Vroege Vogels - Ooijpolder 2","Lelystad - Runderweg, Lelystad - Edelhertweg e.o.","Polder Boksum")] <- "Not_main_campuses"

## Remove locations that dont correspond to campuses (research sites, polders)
campus_boundaries_merged <- campus_boundaries_merged[!campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("WUR_NOT_main_campus","Not_main_campuses"), ]

#### ----- 3. Import Citizen science observations and assign to corresponding campus ----- ##### 

## Import 2023, 2024, 2025 datasets
Observations_2023 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/Waarneming2023/Universities_of_Applied_Sciences/bioblitz-hoger-onderwijs-bloeit-waarnemingen.csv",sep = ";")

Observations_2024 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/Bioblitz2024/bioblitz-hoger-onderwijs-bloeit-waarnemingen.csv",sep = ";")

Observations_2025 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/2025/bioblitz-hoger-onderwijs-bloeit-2025.csv/observation-2025-10-30-16-17-bioblitz-hoger-onderwijs-bloeit-2025-waarnemingen.csv",sep = ",")


## First we need to convert the observation data into sf format

# 2023

# Data cleaning: I choose to use the local.x, y coordinates which are already projected in 28992. However, the code receives a comment stating NA coordinates for some points. Therefore, i remove these entries.

Observations_2023$local.x <- as.numeric(gsub("[^0-9.-]", "", Observations_2023$local.x))
Observations_2023$local.y <- as.numeric(gsub("[^0-9.-]", "", Observations_2023$local.y))

# Remove rows with missing coordinates
Observations_2023_clean <- Observations_2023[!is.na(Observations_2023$local.x) & !is.na(Observations_2023$local.y), ]

# Convert to sf
Observations_2023_sf <- st_as_sf(Observations_2023_clean, coords = c("local.x", "local.y"), crs = 28992)

### 2024

# Remove rows with missing coordinates

Observations_2024_sf <- st_as_sf(Observations_2024, coords = c("local.x", "local.y"), crs = 28992)

### 2025
Observations_2025_sf <- st_as_sf(Observations_2025, coords = c("local.x", "local.y"), crs = 28992)

#### ----- 4. Extract observations per campus and filter to only keep campuses with > 100 observations (explained in methods) in each year ----- ##### 


### Clip observations based on boundaries. This also shows in WHICH campus does each observation correspond to!!

Observations_2023_clip <- st_intersection(Observations_2023_sf, campus_boundaries_merged)

Observations_2024_clip <- st_intersection(Observations_2024_sf, campus_boundaries_merged)

Observations_2025_clip <- st_intersection(Observations_2025_sf, campus_boundaries_merged)

#2023
Total_observations_2023 <- Observations_2023_clip %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(total_observations_23 = n()) %>%
  filter(total_observations_23 >= 100)

Total_observations_2023 <- st_drop_geometry(Total_observations_2023)

#2024
Total_observations_2024 <- Observations_2024_clip %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(total_observations_24 = n()) %>%
  filter(total_observations_24 >= 100)

Total_observations_2024 <- st_drop_geometry(Total_observations_2024)

#2025
Total_observations_2025 <- Observations_2025_clip %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(total_observations_25 = n()) %>%
  filter(total_observations_25 >= 100)

Total_observations_2025 <- st_drop_geometry(Total_observations_2025)

## join in one table
Total_observations_2023_24 <- left_join(Total_observations_2023,Total_observations_2024, by = "campus")

Total_observations_23_24_25 <- left_join(Total_observations_2023_24,Total_observations_2025, by = "campus") %>%
  filter(campus != "WUR_Not_main_campus")

##  rename campus names to remove spaces
Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("Leeuwarden - Van Hall Larenstein")] <- "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"

Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("Velp - Landgoed Larenstein")] <- "Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein"

Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("HAN University of Applied Sciences - Campus Arnhem")] <- "HAN_arnhem"

Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("UT campus")] <- "UT_campus"

Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("Delft - TU Campus")] <- "Delft_TU_Campus"

Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("Leiden Bioscience Park")] <- "Leiden_Bioscience_Park"

Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("Amsterdam - Science Park")] <- "Amsterdam_Science_Park"

Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("Groningen - Zernike")] <- "Groningen_Zernike"

Total_observations_23_24_25$campus[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("Utrecht - Science park / De Uithof")] <- "USP"

write.csv(Total_observations_23_24_25,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Total_observations.csv")

#### Rename again 

##  rename campus names to remove spaces
Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("Leeuwarden - Van Hall Larenstein")] <- "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"

Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("Velp - Landgoed Larenstein")] <- "Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein"

Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("HAN University of Applied Sciences - Campus Arnhem")] <- "HAN_arnhem"

Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("UT campus")] <- "UT_campus"

Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("Delft - TU Campus")] <- "Delft_TU_Campus"

Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("Leiden Bioscience Park")] <- "Leiden_Bioscience_Park"

Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("Amsterdam - Science Park")] <- "Amsterdam_Science_Park"

Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("Groningen - Zernike")] <- "Groningen_Zernike"

Observations_2023_clip$campus[Observations_2023_clip$campus %in% c("Utrecht - Science park / De Uithof")] <- "USP"


##  rename campus names to remove spaces 2024
Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("Leeuwarden - Van Hall Larenstein")] <- "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"

Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("Velp - Landgoed Larenstein")] <- "Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein"

Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("HAN University of Applied Sciences - Campus Arnhem")] <- "HAN_arnhem"

Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("UT campus")] <- "UT_campus"

Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("Delft - TU Campus")] <- "Delft_TU_Campus"

Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("Leiden Bioscience Park")] <- "Leiden_Bioscience_Park"

Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("Amsterdam - Science Park")] <- "Amsterdam_Science_Park"

Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("Groningen - Zernike")] <- "Groningen_Zernike"

Observations_2024_clip$campus[Observations_2024_clip$campus %in% c("Utrecht - Science park / De Uithof")] <- "USP"


##  rename campus names to remove spaces 2025
Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("Leeuwarden - Van Hall Larenstein")] <- "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"

Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("Velp - Landgoed Larenstein")] <- "Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein"

Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("HAN University of Applied Sciences - Campus Arnhem")] <- "HAN_arnhem"

Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("UT campus")] <- "UT_campus"

Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("Delft - TU Campus")] <- "Delft_TU_Campus"

Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("Leiden Bioscience Park")] <- "Leiden_Bioscience_Park"

Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("Amsterdam - Science Park")] <- "Amsterdam_Science_Park"

Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("Groningen - Zernike")] <- "Groningen_Zernike"

Observations_2025_clip$campus[Observations_2025_clip$campus %in% c("Utrecht - Science park / De Uithof")] <- "USP"


##### Filter for all the campuses with > 100 observations in each year 

unique(Observations_2023_clip$campus)
unique(Total_observations_23_24_25$campus)

Observations_2023_clip_filtered <- Observations_2023_clip %>%
  filter(campus %in% Total_observations_23_24_25$campus)

Observations_2024_clip_filtered <- Observations_2024_clip %>%
  filter(campus %in% Total_observations_23_24_25$campus)

Observations_2025_clip_filtered <- Observations_2025_clip %>%
  filter(campus %in% Total_observations_23_24_25$campus)

###### --- 5. Separate campuses for research question 1 ----- #####

# Following the method described in the SI, we separate for campuses used in analysis for research question 1 (to only keep campuses with opportunistic data in 2023 and Bioblitz in 2024-2025) and 2 (all campuses for 2024)

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1 <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered[Observations_2023_clip_filtered$campus %in% c("Amsterdam_Science_Park","HAN_arnhem",  "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","Leiden_Bioscience_Park", "Leiden_Binnenstad",   "USP"), ]


Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered[Observations_2024_clip_filtered$campus %in% c("Amsterdam_Science_Park","HAN_arnhem",  "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","Leiden_Bioscience_Park", "Leiden_Binnenstad",   "USP"), ]

Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered[Observations_2025_clip_filtered$campus %in% c("Amsterdam_Science_Park","HAN_arnhem",  "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","Leiden_Bioscience_Park", "Leiden_Binnenstad",   "USP"), ]

## campuses bioblitz 23-25 - analysis 2 (RQ2o  only)
Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered[Observations_2024_clip_filtered$campus %in% c("Nijmegen_campus","Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein",  "UT_campus","Delft_TU_Campus", "WUR_main_campus", "Groningen_Zernike"), ]

### now i have the "merged values" col as a list within the df --> I will drop it so i can then save it

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$merged_values <- NULL
Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1$merged_values <- NULL
Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$merged_values <- NULL
Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$merged_values <- NULL

write.csv(Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/2023rq1.csv")

write.csv(Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/2024rq1.csv")

write.csv(Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/2024rq2.csv")

write.csv(Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/2025rq1.csv")

### In order to use for the analysis also separate the total observations to only maintain campuses with opportunistic 2023 and bioblitz 2024-25 data

observations_all_summary_analysis1 <- Total_observations_23_24_25[Total_observations_23_24_25$campus %in% c("Amsterdam_Science_Park", "HAN_arnhem",  "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","Leiden_Bioscience_Park", "Leiden_Binnenstad", "USP"), ]

write.csv(observations_all_summary_analysis1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/Total_observations_summary_analysis1.csv")

####------ 6. Filter campuses accordingly -------- #####

unique(campus_boundaries_merged$campus)

## opp 23 biob 24-25

### finally rename campus names that correspond to the campuses with > 100 observations per year

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Leeuwarden - Van Hall Larenstein")] <- "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("HAN University of Applied Sciences - Campus Arnhem")] <- "HAN_arnhem"

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Leiden Bioscience Park")] <- "Leiden_Bioscience_Park"

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Amsterdam - Science Park")] <- "Amsterdam_Science_Park"

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Utrecht - Science park / De Uithof")] <- "USP"


## biob 23-25

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Velp - Landgoed Larenstein")] <- "Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein"

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("UT campus")] <- "UT_campus"

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Delft - TU Campus")] <- "Delft_TU_Campus"

campus_boundaries_merged$campus[campus_boundaries_merged$campus %in% c("Groningen - Zernike")] <- "Groningen_Zernike"



####
campus_boundaries_merged_filtered <- campus_boundaries_merged %>%
  filter(campus %in% Total_observations_23_24_25$campus)


#### assign each campus boundary to the corresponding RQ

unique(campus_boundaries_merged_filtered$campus)

#rq1
campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq1 <- campus_boundaries_merged_filtered[campus_boundaries_merged_filtered$campus %in% c("Amsterdam_Science_Park", "HAN_arnhem",  "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","Leiden_Bioscience_Park", "Leiden_Binnenstad", "USP"), ]

#rq2

campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq2 <- campus_boundaries_merged_filtered[campus_boundaries_merged_filtered$campus %in% c("Nijmegen_campus", "Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein",  "UT_campus","Delft_TU_Campus", "WUR_main_campus", "Groningen_Zernike"), ]

#rq1
campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq1$merged_values <- NULL

st_write(campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/campuses_merged_filteredrq1.shp")

#rq2
campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq2$merged_values <- NULL

st_write(campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq2,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/campuses_merged_filteredrq2.shp")



```

#### Import datasets (b)

[**Buildings**]{.underline}

All buildings were clipped for the campus boundary file in QGIS, because of the large space they require. Then imported in R. Source:

-   Dataset: Basisregistratie Topografie (BRT) TOP10NL (highest resolution available)

-   Link: <https://service.pdok.nl/brt/topnl/atom/index.xml>

-   filename in the dataset: "top10nl_Compleet.gpkg" – gebouw-vlak

[**Roads and paths**]{.underline}

All roads and paths were clipped for the campus boundary file in QGIS, because of the large space they require. Then imported in R.

Dataset:

-   Basisregistratie Grootschalige Topografie (BGT) (roads): Format-citygml - Main dataset for roads

-   Basisregistratie Topografie (BRT) TOP10NL (highest resolution available) (walking paths) — Very limited but includes paths that are not identified in BGT. This is why combine both

#### [Pre-processing of Buildings and road/paths]{.underline}

Because of the too large data file, it was first clipped based on the polygon file for the campus locations in QGIS before importing in R.

Download Top10NL building version for each year. Use buildings 2023 for analysis 2023, buildings 2024 for analysis 2024 and buildings 2025 for analysis 2025

Everything was imported in QGIS (2023: top10nl_Compleet-2023.gpkg updated 1.09.2023; 2024: top10nl_Compleet-2024.gpkg updated 1.11.2024; 2025: top10nl_Compleet.gpkg, updated 19.11.25, as vlaak (shape) and clipped in QGIS using campus boundary dataset (for space management)

[**Land use:**]{.underline}

Source: [Landelijk Grondgebruik Nederland 2024 (LGN2024) (dataset)](https://data.4tu.nl/datasets/42a0af60-7236-44fb-b33c-56a374e2c504). For this analysis the Version 2 was used of the dataset which was published in July 2025. Note that a new version ha recently become available which was published in April 2026

```{r}

#### -------------- Buildings -------------- ####

Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23 <- st_read("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/July_analysis/Top10NL/Buildings_clipped_campuses_Version_01.09.23.shp")

Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_24 <- st_read("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/July_analysis/Top10NL/Buildings_clipped_campuses_Version_01.11.24.shp")

Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25 <- st_read("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/July_analysis/Top10NL/Buildings_clipped_campuses_Version_19.11.25.shp")



### --------------  Roads or paths------------------ ###### 

## 2023
#Top10NL
Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses23 <- st_read("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/July_analysis/Top10NL/Wegdeel_hartlijn_clipped_campuses_Version_01.09.23.shp")

# Convert geometry to LINESTRING
Top10NL_Roadspaths_line23 <- st_cast(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses23, "LINESTRING")

roads_paths_filtered23 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_line23,campus_boundaries_merged_filtered)

## 2024
#Top10NL
Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24 <- st_read("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/July_analysis/Top10NL/Wegdeel_hartlijn_clipped_campuses_Version_01.11.24.shp")

# Convert geometry to LINESTRING
Top10NL_Roadspaths_line24 <- st_cast(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, "LINESTRING")

roads_paths_filtered24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_line24,campus_boundaries_merged_filtered)

## 2025
#Top10NL
Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses25 <- st_read("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/July_analysis/Top10NL/Wegdeel_hartlijn_clipped_campuses_Version_19.11.25.shp")

# Convert geometry to LINESTRING
Top10NL_Roadspaths_line25 <- st_cast(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses25, "LINESTRING")

roads_paths_filtered25 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_line25,campus_boundaries_merged_filtered)

#### Split per campus (to use for buildings and road/path bias analysis)


##### ------------ 2023 --------------- ###########
# Split by location
campuses_2023_split <- split(Observations_2023_clip_filtered, Observations_2023_clip_filtered$campus)

unique(Observations_2023_clip_filtered$campus)

HAN_Arnhem23 <- campuses_2023_split[["HAN_arnhem"]]

Leiden_Biosc23 <- campuses_2023_split[["Leiden_Bioscience_Park"]]

Leiden_Bin23 <- campuses_2023_split[["Leiden_Binnenstad"]]

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23 <- campuses_2023_split[["Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"]]

USP23 <- campuses_2023_split[["USP"]]

UvA23 <- campuses_2023_split[["Amsterdam_Science_Park"]]

##### ------------ 2024 --------------- ###########
# Split by location
campuses_2024_split <- split(Observations_2024_clip_filtered, Observations_2024_clip_filtered$campus)

unique(Observations_2024_clip_filtered$campus)

# Extract each location 

### RQ1+RQ2 only
HAN_Arnhem24 <- campuses_2024_split[["HAN_arnhem"]]

Leiden_Biosc24 <- campuses_2024_split[["Leiden_Bioscience_Park"]]

Leiden_Bin24 <- campuses_2024_split[["Leiden_Binnenstad"]]

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein24 <- campuses_2024_split[["Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"]]

USP24 <- campuses_2024_split[["USP"]]

UvA24 <- campuses_2024_split[["Amsterdam_Science_Park"]]

## RQ2 only

Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein24 <- campuses_2024_split[["Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein"]]

Groningen_Zernike_campus24 <- campuses_2024_split[["Groningen_Zernike"]]

Radboud_University_and_HAN_Nijmegen24 <- campuses_2024_split[["Nijmegen_campus"]]

TUDelft24 <- campuses_2024_split[["Delft_TU_Campus"]]

Twente_university_campus24 <- campuses_2024_split[["UT_campus"]]

WUR_main_campus24 <- campuses_2024_split[["WUR_main_campus"]]

##### ------------ 2025 --------------- ###########

# Split by location
campuses_2025_split <- split(Observations_2025_clip_filtered, Observations_2025_clip_filtered$campus)

# Extract each location 

HAN_Arnhem25 <- campuses_2025_split[["HAN_arnhem"]]

Leiden_Biosc25 <- campuses_2025_split[["Leiden_Bioscience_Park"]]

Leiden_Bin25 <- campuses_2025_split[["Leiden_Binnenstad"]]

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25 <- campuses_2025_split[["Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"]]

USP25 <- campuses_2025_split[["USP"]]

UvA25 <- campuses_2025_split[["Amsterdam_Science_Park"]]


## --------------------- Land use ------------- ##

#Import land use
lgn24 <- rast("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/LGN2024/LGN2024.tif")

# Then project
lgn24 <- terra::project(lgn24, "EPSG:28992")
crs(lgn24)

## note: i tried to save it the new crs to avoid running again all the code (is too long) but the crs was not maintained ... 

# ## Estimate area per campus based on boundaries ---- this is to give us the total area per campus. maybe not necessary it can be estimated also based on land use but is useful to have
campus_boundaries_merged_filtered$area_m2 <- st_area(campus_boundaries_merged_filtered)

campus_boundaries_merged_filtered$area_ha <- as.numeric(campus_boundaries_merged_filtered$area_m2)/10000

campus_boundaries_sum <- campus_boundaries_merged_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(
    area_m2 = sum(area_m2, na.rm = TRUE),
    area_ha = sum(area_ha, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#### Estimate land use cover per campus

# Loop over each campus and count land use in each (note: this part of the code is a bit computationally intensive: can take ~ 10 minutes)

####### I want 2 things: 1 to estimate the land use per campus (and adjust the classifications) + 2 to create the land use maps 

# Ideally i would have 1 code that does both. But it doesnt work. So i split into 2 actions

#1.Estimate land use --- this code also includes area ha estimation: this is estimated by : area_ha = count * prod(res(masked)) --- count = pixel count + prod(res(cliped lgn)) --- this is the resolution of each raster cell x * y per cell ---> in the end we multiply the area ha per raster cell X all raster cells for each land use ----- the land use is already encoded in each raster. so we just get the area per cell and multiply to find the area --> when clipping, if most of a cell is inside the campus boudndary then all the value is kept. otherwise is removed. it cannot keep partial values. 

results <- list()

## note: change "description" into a more meaningful name to simplify the code !!! ---- here i sum up the land use areas BUT in the previous code i sum up the polygon areas -- this is DIFFERENT because land use includes also raster cells outside the polygons if more than half area is included

for (i in 1:nrow(campus_boundaries_sum)) {
  loc_name <- campus_boundaries_sum$campus[i] 
  loc_geom <- campus_boundaries_sum[i, ] 
  masked <- terra::mask(terra::crop(lgn24, loc_geom), loc_geom) 
  freq_table <- as.data.frame(freq(masked)) %>%
    mutate(
      area_ha = count * prod(res(masked)) / 10000, 
      campus = loc_name
    ) 
  results[[i]] <- freq_table 
}

# Combine all results into one table
landuse_per_campus <- bind_rows(results)
sort(unique(landuse_per_campus$value))

## here i keep the original names except for buildings that i add everything as built up areas + joined freshwater with freshwater vegetation because is too detailed for my needs. akso grouped heathland together

landuse_area_table_1 <- landuse_per_campus %>%
  mutate(
    landuse_values = case_when(
      value == 1 ~ "Agricultural_grass",
      value == 2 ~ "Corn",
      value == 3 ~ "Potatoes",
      value == 5 ~ "Grains",
      value == 6 ~ "Other_agriculture",
      value == 8 ~ "Greenhouse_horticulture",
      value == 9 ~ "Orchard",
      value == 10 ~ "Flower_bulbs",
      value == 11 ~ "Deciduous_forest",
      value == 12 ~ "Coniferous_forest",
      value == 16 ~ "Freshwater",
      value == 18 ~ "buildings_in_primary_built_areas",
      value == 19 ~ "buildings_in_secondary_built_areas",
      value == 20 ~ "forest_in_primary_built_areas",
      value == 22 ~ "forest_in_secondary_built_areas",
      value == 23 ~ "Grass_in_builtup_areas",
      value == 26 ~ "buildings_in_rural_areas",
      value == 27 ~ "other",
      value == 28 ~ "Grass_in_primary_builtup_areas",
      value == 29 ~ "Solar_parks", 
      value == 36 ~ "Heath",
      value == 42 ~ "reed_vegetation",
      value == 43 ~ "Forest_in_swamp",
      value == 45 ~ "naturally_managed_agricultural_grassland",
      value == 47 ~ "Other_grass",
      value == 61 ~ "Tree_nurseries",
      value == 62 ~ "Fruit_farms",
      value == 251 ~ "main_infrastructure_railway_bodies",
      value == 252 ~ "semi-paved_roads_slowtraffic _infrastructure_other_infrastructure",
      value == 253 ~ "small_roads",
      value == 323 ~ "shrub_vegetation_swamp_area_(low)",
      value == 333 ~ "Other_shrub_vegetation_(high)",
      TRUE ~ as.character(value)
           ))

unique(landuse_area_table_1$value)


landuse_area_table_2 <- landuse_area_table_1 %>%
  mutate(
    value = case_when(
      value == "Agricultural_grass" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "Corn" ~ "Agriculture" ,
      value == "Potatoes" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "Grains" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "Other_agriculture" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "Greenhouse_horticulture" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "Orchard" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "Deciduous_forest" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      value == "Coniferous_forest" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      value == "Heath" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      value == "Agricultural_grass" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "Fruit_farms" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "Flower_bulbs" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "shrub_vegetation" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      value == "Other_shrub_vegetation" ~ "other",
      value ==  "reed_vegetation" ~ "Freshwater",
      value == "Solar_parks" ~ "built_areas",
      value == "buildings_in_primary_built_areas" ~ "built_areas",
      value == "buildings_in_secondary_built_areas" ~ "built_areas",
      value == "forest_in_primary_built_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      value == "Grass_in_builtup_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      value == "Grass_in_primary_builtup_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      value == "Other_grass" ~ "other",
      value == "Tree_nurseries" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "main_infrastructure_railway_bodies" ~ "built_areas",
      value == "semi-paved_roads_slowtraffic _infrastructure_other_infrastructure" ~ "built_areas",
      value == "small_roads" ~ "built_areas",
      value == "shrub_vegetation_swamp_area_(low)" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      value == "Other_shrub_vegetation_(high)" ~ "other",
      value == "forest_in_secondary_built_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      value == "naturally_managed_agricultural_grassland" ~ "Agriculture",
      value == "buildings_in_rural_areas" ~ "built_areas",
      value == "Forest_in_swamp" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural" ,
      TRUE ~ as.character(value)
           ))


##### estimate land use % cover per campus --> use this for Bias analysis & rq2

landuse_rearranged_all <- landuse_area_table_2 %>% group_by(campus) %>% 
mutate(
    total_area = sum(area_ha)) %>%
  ungroup()

## sum % per area
landuse_rearranged_all <- landuse_rearranged_all %>%
  group_by(campus, value,area_ha)%>%
  mutate(perc_area = (area_ha / total_area) * 100, perc_area = round(perc_area,4))

landuse_rearranged_all <- landuse_rearranged_all %>%
  group_by(campus,value)


landuse_rearranged_all <- landuse_rearranged_all %>%
  group_by(campus, value) %>%
  summarize(
    area_ha = sum(area_ha),
    count = sum(count),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

landuse_rearranged_all <- landuse_rearranged_all %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  mutate(
    total_area = sum(area_ha),
    perc_area = round(area_ha / total_area * 100, 4)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

#### Save this for rq2 as well!
write.csv(landuse_rearranged_all,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Land_use_perc.csv")



###--------- Extract land use per observation ------- ########

#### since i converted lgn24 to terra before to extract land use areas now i need to convert back to raster to use raster:: extract

lgn24_raster <- raster(lgn24)


#2023
Observations_2023_sp <- as(Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1, "Spatial")  # convert SpatVector 

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$landuse_value <- raster::extract(lgn24_raster, Observations_2023_sp)

#2024
Observations_2024_sp <- as(Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1, "Spatial")  # convert SpatVector 

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1$landuse_value <- raster::extract(lgn24_raster, Observations_2024_sp)

#2024 RQ2 onyl campuses
Observations_2024_sp_a2 <- as(Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2, "Spatial")  # convert SpatVector 

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$landuse_value <- raster::extract(lgn24_raster, Observations_2024_sp_a2)

#2025
Observations_2025_sp <- as(Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1, "Spatial")  # convert SpatVector 

Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$landuse_value <- raster::extract(lgn24_raster, Observations_2025_sp)

      landuse_value1 == "Other_shrub_vegetation_(high)" ~ "other",
      landuse_value1 == "forest_in_secondary_built_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      landuse_value1 == "naturally_managed_agricultural_grassland" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "buildings_in_rural_areas" ~ "built_areas",
        TRUE ~ as.character(landuse_value1)
           ))

unique(Observations_2025_clip_lu$landuse_value2)

Observations_2025_clip_lu_ng <- st_drop_geometry(Observations_2025_clip_lu)

Observations_2025_clip_lu_ng$merged_values <- NULL

write.csv(Observations_2025_clip_lu_ng,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/Observations_25_landuse.csv")

#### Analysis 2

Observations_2024_clip_lu2 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2 %>%
   mutate(
    landuse_value1 = case_when(
      landuse_value == 1 ~ "Agricultural_grass",
      landuse_value == 2 ~ "Corn",
      landuse_value == 3 ~ "Potatoes",
      landuse_value == 5 ~ "Grains",
      landuse_value == 6 ~ "Other_agriculture",
      landuse_value == 8 ~ "Greenhouse_horticulture",
      landuse_value == 9 ~ "Orchard",
      landuse_value == 11 ~ "Deciduous_forest",
      landuse_value == 12 ~ "Coniferous_forest",
      landuse_value == 16 ~ "Freshwater",
      landuse_value == 18 ~ "buildings_in_primary_built_areas",
      landuse_value == 19 ~ "buildings_in_secondary_built_areas",
      landuse_value == 20 ~ "forest_in_primary_built_areas",
      landuse_value == 22 ~ "forest_in_secondary_built_areas",
      landuse_value == 23 ~ "Grass_in_builtup_areas",
      landuse_value == 26 ~ "buildings_in_rural_areas",
      landuse_value == 27 ~ "other",
      landuse_value == 28 ~ "Grass_in_primary_builtup_areas",
      landuse_value == 42 ~ "Reed vegetation",
      landuse_value == 45 ~ "naturally_managed_agricultural_grassland",
      landuse_value == 47 ~ "Other_grass",
      landuse_value == 61 ~ "Tree_farms",
      landuse_value == 251 ~ "main_infrastructure_railway_bodies",
      landuse_value == 252 ~ "semi-paved_roads_slowtraffic _infrastructure_other_infrastructure",
      landuse_value == 253 ~ "small_roads",
      landuse_value == 323 ~ "shrub_vegetation_swamp_area_(low)",
      landuse_value == 333 ~ "shrub_vegetation_swamp_area_(high)",
      TRUE ~ as.character(landuse_value)
           ))

unique(Observations_2024_clip_lu$landuse_value1)

Observations_2024_clip_lu2 <- Observations_2024_clip_lu2 %>%
  mutate(
    landuse_value2 = case_when(
      landuse_value1 == "Agricultural_grass" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "Corn" ~ "Agriculture" ,
       landuse_value1 == "Potatoes" ~ "Agriculture" ,
      landuse_value1 == "Grains" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "Other_agriculture" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "Greenhouse_horticulture" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "Orchard" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "Deciduous_forest" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      landuse_value1 == "Coniferous_forest" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      landuse_value1 == "Agricultural_grass" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "Tree_farms" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "shrub_vegetation" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      landuse_value1 == "buildings_in_primary_built_areas" ~ "built_areas",
      landuse_value1 == "buildings_in_secondary_built_areas" ~ "built_areas",
      landuse_value1 == "forest_in_primary_built_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      landuse_value1 == "Grass_in_builtup_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      landuse_value1 == "Grass_in_primary_builtup_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      landuse_value1 == "Reed vegetation" ~ "Freshwater",
      landuse_value1 == "Other_grass" ~ "other",
      landuse_value1 == "main_infrastructure_railway_bodies" ~ "built_areas",
      landuse_value1 == "semi-paved_roads_slowtraffic _infrastructure_other_infrastructure" ~ "built_areas",
      landuse_value1 == "small_roads" ~ "built_areas",
      landuse_value1 == "shrub_vegetation_swamp_area_(low)" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
       landuse_value1 == "shrub_vegetation_swamp_area_(high)" ~ "Terrestrial_Natural",
      landuse_value1 == "forest_in_secondary_built_areas" ~ "Natural_in_Built",
      landuse_value1 == "naturally_managed_agricultural_grassland" ~ "Agriculture",
      landuse_value1 == "solar_parks" ~ "built_areas",
      landuse_value1 == "buildings_in_rural_areas" ~ "built_areas",
      TRUE ~ as.character(landuse_value1)
           ))

unique(Observations_2024_clip_lu2$landuse_value2)

Observations_2024_clip_lu2 <- st_drop_geometry(Observations_2024_clip_lu2)

Observations_2024_clip_lu2$merged_values <- NULL

write.csv(Observations_2024_clip_lu2,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/Observations_24_landuse_analysis2.csv")


```


#### Total observations

Added value: Is there a statistically significant increase in the total number of observations per campus with a Bioblitz (2024-2025) compared to opportunistic data (2023)?

```{r}

#read produced file
totalobservations <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/produced_datasets/Total_observations_summary_analysis1.csv", sep = ",")

## 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
totalobservations_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_24, totalobservations$total_observations_23, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
totalobservations_2423_less <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_24, totalobservations$total_observations_23, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
totalobservations_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_24, totalobservations$total_observations_23, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2023
## greater
totalobservations_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_25, totalobservations$total_observations_23, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
totalobservations_2523_less <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_25, totalobservations$total_observations_23, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
totalobservations_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_25, totalobservations$total_observations_23,paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2024
## greater
totalobservations_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_25, totalobservations$total_observations_24, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
totalobservations_2524_less <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_25, totalobservations$total_observations_24, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
totalobservations_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(totalobservations$total_observations_25, totalobservations$total_observations_24, paired = T, na.rm = T)

results_observations <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(totalobservations_2423_greater$statistic,
                totalobservations_2423_less$statistic,
                totalobservations_2423_twosided$statistic,totalobservations_2523_greater$statistic,
                totalobservations_2523_less$statistic,
                totalobservations_2523_twosided$statistic,totalobservations_2524_greater$statistic,
                totalobservations_2524_less$statistic,
                totalobservations_2524_twosided$statistic),
  
  p.value = c(totalobservations_2423_greater$p.value,
              totalobservations_2423_less$p.value,
              totalobservations_2423_twosided$p.value,totalobservations_2523_greater$p.value,
              totalobservations_2523_less$p.value,
              totalobservations_2523_twosided$p.value,totalobservations_2524_greater$p.value,
              totalobservations_2524_less$p.value,
              totalobservations_2524_twosided$p.value),
  
  alternative = c(totalobservations_2423_greater$alternative,totalobservations_2423_less$alternative,totalobservations_2423_twosided$alternative,totalobservations_2523_greater$alternative,totalobservations_2523_less$alternative,totalobservations_2523_twosided$alternative,totalobservations_2524_greater$alternative,totalobservations_2524_less$alternative,totalobservations_2524_twosided$alternative),
  
  method = c(totalobservations_2423_greater$method, totalobservations_2423_less$method, totalobservations_2423_twosided$method,totalobservations_2523_greater$method, totalobservations_2523_less$method, totalobservations_2523_twosided$method,totalobservations_2524_greater$method, totalobservations_2524_less$method, totalobservations_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_observations,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_total_observations.csv")


```

#### Buildings (a)

```{r}

## assign each campus to buildings -- this ensures that each building will be assigned to the correct campus. we will not need to run separately the analysis for each one, which will save some computational and memory space

#2023
Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23 <- st_intersection(
  Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23,
  campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq1
)

unique(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23$campus)

#2024
Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_24 <- st_intersection(
  Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_24,
  campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq1
)

unique(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_24$campus)

Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only <- st_intersection(
  Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_24,
  campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq2
)


#2025

Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25 <- st_intersection(
  Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25,
  campus_boundaries_merged_filtered_rq1
)

unique(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25$campus)



########### 



### Leiden Bioscience Park
distance_matrix_buil_leidbios23 <- st_distance(Leiden_Biosc23, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23)

#### code description: then we find the column index with the nearest road or path --- The number "1" indicates that we check for each row the column with the lowest estimated values. So for each point we check the road id with the lowest estimated 

nearest_buil_index_leidbios23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbios23, 1, which.min)

#### code description: then we find the row  with the lowest estimated road or path distance

min_distances_buil_leidbios23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbios23, 1, min)

#### code description: then we add to our original data the id of the road or path with the lowest estimated distance

Leiden_Biosc23$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_leidbios23  # Nearest road index

#### code description: then we add to our original data the actual distance of the nearest road or path 

Leiden_Biosc23$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_leidbios23)

### Leiden Binnenstad
distance_matrix_buil_leidbin23 <- st_distance(Leiden_Bin23, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23)

nearest_buil_index_leidbin23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbin23, 1, which.min)

#### code description: then we find the row  with the lowest estimated road or path distance

min_distances_buil_leidbin23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbin23, 1, min)

#### code description: then we add to our original data the id of the road or path with the lowest estimated distance

Leiden_Bin23$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_leidbin23  # Nearest road index

#### code description: then we add to our original data the actual distance of the nearest road or path 

Leiden_Bin23$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_leidbin23)

#### code description: first we estimate all the distance of all osbervations to all roads and paths 

## HAN_Arnhem
distance_matrix_buil_han_arnhem23 <- st_distance(HAN_Arnhem23, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23)

# Find the nearest road and distance for each point
# Get the index of the minimum distance for each point
nearest_buil_index_han_arnhem23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_han_arnhem23, 1, which.min)

# Get the minimum distances for each point
min_distances_buil_han_arnhem23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_han_arnhem23, 1, min)

# Add results to your_data
HAN_Arnhem23$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_han_arnhem23  # Nearest road index
HAN_Arnhem23$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_han_arnhem23)

### Leeuwarden
distance_matrix_buil_leeu23 <- st_distance(Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23)

nearest_buil_index_leeu23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leeu23, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_leeu23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leeu23, 1, min)

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_leeu23  # Nearest road index
Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_leeu23)

### USP
distance_matrix_buil_usp23 <- st_distance(USP23, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23)

nearest_buil_index_usp23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_usp23, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_usp23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_usp23, 1, min)

USP23$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_usp23  # 
USP23$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_usp23)

### Amsterdam Science Park
distance_matrix_buil_uva23 <- st_distance(UvA23, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23)

nearest_buil_index_uva23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_uva23, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_uva23 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_uva23, 1, min)

UvA23$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_uva23  # 
UvA23$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_uva23)

## Join campuses with opportunistic observations in 23 and bioblitz in 24,25 
Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1 <- rbind(UvA23,USP23,Leiden_Bin23,Leiden_Biosc23,Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23,HAN_Arnhem23) 

## create 5m bins
Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$distance_to_buil_5mbin <- cut(Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$distance_to_buil, breaks = seq(0, max(Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$distance_to_buil) + 5, by = 5), right = FALSE, include.lowest = F)


## get the median distance per campus: Campus --> median distance to nearest road/path (use the original distance) --> save --> then add all years in 1 csv file --> use for bias, added value

Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med <- Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise("X2023" = median(distance_to_buil))

Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med <- st_drop_geometry(Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med)

#  Calculate full distance matrix from points to all roads for each campus

######## RQ1+RQ2

### Leiden Bioscience Park
distance_matrix_buil_leidbios24 <- st_distance(Leiden_Biosc24, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_24)

#### code description: then we find the column index with the nearest road or path --- The number "1" indicates that we check for each row the column with the lowest estimated values. So for each point we check the road id with the lowest estimated 

nearest_buil_index_leidbios24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbios24, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_leidbios24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbios24, 1, min)

Leiden_Biosc24$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_leidbios24  # Nearest road index

#### code description: then we add to our original data the actual distance of the nearest road or path 

Leiden_Biosc24$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_leidbios24)

### Leiden Binnenstad

nearest_buil_index_leidbin24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbin24, 1, which.min)

## HAN_Arnhem

# Find the nearest road and distance for each point

### Leeuwarden

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein24$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_leeu24

nearest_buil_index_usp24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_usp24, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_usp24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_usp24, 1, min)

USP24$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_usp24  #

### Amsterdam Science Park

nearest_buil_index_uva24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_uva24, 1, which.min)

## create 5m bins

## get the median distance per campus: Campus --> median distance to nearest road/path (use the original distance) --> save --> then add all years in 1 csv file --> use for bias, added value

  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise("X2024" = median(distance_to_buil))

Observations_2024_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med <- st_drop_geometry(Observations_2024_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med)

#### RQ2 only

Nijmegen_campus_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Nijmegen_campus

Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein

Twente_university_campus_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$UT_campus

TUDelft_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Delft_TU_Campus

WUR_main_campus_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$WUR_main_campus

Groningen_Zernike_campus_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Groningen_Zernike


## build
velp_build24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only, Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein_boundaries)

gro_build24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only, Groningen_Zernike_campus_boundaries)

twente_build24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only, Twente_university_campus_boundaries)

delft_build24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only, TUDelft_boundaries)

ruhan_build24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only, Nijmegen_campus_boundaries)

wur_build24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only, WUR_main_campus_boundaries)

### Velp
distance_matrix_buil_velp24 <- st_distance(Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein24, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only)

nearest_buil_index_velp24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_velp24, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_delf24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_delf24, 1, min)

Twente_university_campus24$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_twe24)

### WUR
distance_matrix_buil_wur24 <- st_distance(WUR_main_campus24, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_rq2only)

nearest_buil_index_wur24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_wur24, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_wur24 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_wur24, 1, min)

WUR_main_campus24$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_wur24  
WUR_main_campus24$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_wur24)

## Join campuses with bioblitz in 23,24,25 
scope_buil_a2 <- rbind(WUR_main_campus24,TUDelft24,Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein24,Twente_university_campus24,Radboud_University_and_HAN_Nijmegen24,Groningen_Zernike_campus24) 

## create 5m bins
scope_buil_a2$distance_to_buil_5mbin <- cut(scope_buil_a2$distance_to_buil, breaks = seq(0, max(scope_buil_a2$distance_to_buil) + 5, by = 5), right = FALSE, include.lowest = F)


## get the median distance per campus: Campus --> median distance to nearest road/path (use the original distance) --> save --> then add all years in 1 csv file --> use for bias, added value

scope_buil_a2_med <- scope_buil_a2 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise("X2024" = median(distance_to_buil))

scope_buil_a2_med <- st_drop_geometry(scope_buil_a2_med)

write.csv(scope_buil_a2_med,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Analysis2_Median_Buil24.csv")


#### 2025

### Leiden Bioscience Park
distance_matrix_buil_leidbios25 <- st_distance(Leiden_Biosc25, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25)

#### code description: then we find the column index with the nearest road or path --- The number "1" indicates that we check for each row the column with the lowest estimated values. So for each point we check the road id with the lowest estimated 

nearest_buil_index_leidbios25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbios25, 1, which.min)

#### code description: then we find the row  with the lowest estimated road or path distance

min_distances_buil_leidbios25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbios25, 1, min)

#### code description: then we add to our original data the id of the road or path with the lowest estimated distance

Leiden_Biosc25$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_leidbios25  # Nearest road index

#### code description: then we add to our original data the actual distance of the nearest road or path 

Leiden_Biosc25$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_leidbios25)

### Leiden Binnenstad
distance_matrix_buil_leidbin25 <- st_distance(Leiden_Bin25, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25)

nearest_buil_index_leidbin25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbin25, 1, which.min)

#### code description: then we find the row  with the lowest estimated road or path distance

min_distances_buil_leidbin25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leidbin25, 1, min)

#### code description: then we add to our original data the id of the road or path with the lowest estimated distance

Leiden_Bin25$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_leidbin25  # Nearest road index

#### code description: then we add to our original data the actual distance of the nearest road or path 

Leiden_Bin25$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_leidbin25)

#### code description: first we estimate all the distance of all osbervations to all roads and paths 

## HAN_Arnhem
distance_matrix_buil_han_arnhem25 <- st_distance(HAN_Arnhem25, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25)

# Find the nearest road and distance for each point
# Get the index of the minimum distance for each point
nearest_buil_index_han_arnhem25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_han_arnhem25, 1, which.min)

# Get the minimum distances for each point
min_distances_buil_han_arnhem25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_han_arnhem25, 1, min)

# Add results to your_data
HAN_Arnhem25$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_han_arnhem25  # Nearest road index
HAN_Arnhem25$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_han_arnhem25)

### Leeuwarden
distance_matrix_buil_leeu25 <- st_distance(Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25)

nearest_buil_index_leeu25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leeu25, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_leeu25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_leeu25, 1, min)

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_leeu25  
Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_leeu25)

### USP
distance_matrix_buil_usp25 <- st_distance(USP25, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25)

nearest_buil_index_usp25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_usp25, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_usp25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_usp25, 1, min)

USP25$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_usp25  # 
USP25$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_usp25)

### Amsterdam Science Park
distance_matrix_buil_uva25 <- st_distance(UvA25, Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25)

nearest_buil_index_uva25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_uva25, 1, which.min)

min_distances_buil_uva25 <- apply(distance_matrix_buil_uva25, 1, min)

UvA25$nearest_buil_id <- nearest_buil_index_uva25  # 
UvA25$distance_to_buil <- as.numeric(min_distances_buil_uva25)

## Join campuses with opportunistic observations in 23 and bioblitz in 24,25 
Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1 <- rbind(UvA25,USP25,Leiden_Bin25,Leiden_Biosc25,Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25,HAN_Arnhem25) 

## create 5m bins
Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$distance_to_buil_5mbin <- cut(Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$distance_to_buil, breaks = seq(0, max(Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$distance_to_buil) + 5, by = 5), right = FALSE, include.lowest = F)


## get the median distance per campus: Campus --> median distance to nearest road/path (use the original distance) --> save --> then add all years in 1 csv file --> use for bias, added value

Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med <- Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise("X2025" = median(distance_to_buil))

Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med <- st_drop_geometry(Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med)

####### Now join as 1 table

scope_buil_2023_24 <- left_join(Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med,Observations_2024_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med, by = "campus")


scope_buil_2023_24_25 <- left_join(scope_buil_2023_24,Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1_med, by = "campus")

write.csv(scope_buil_2023_24_25,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Analysis1_Median_Buil23_24_25.csv")


```

#### Buildings (b)

```{r}


#### Analysis 1: Campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and Bioblitz in 24,25

median_buil_analysis1 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Analysis1_Median_Buil23_24_25.csv", sep = ",")

## 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
scope_buil_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2024, median_buil_analysis1$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_buil_2423_less <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2024, median_buil_analysis1$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_buil_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2024, median_buil_analysis1$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2023
## greater
scope_buil_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2025, median_buil_analysis1$X2023, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_buil_2523_less <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2025, median_buil_analysis1$X2023, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_buil_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2025, median_buil_analysis1$X2023,paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2024
## greater
scope_buil_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2025, median_buil_analysis1$X2024, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_buil_2524_less <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2025, median_buil_analysis1$X2024, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_buil_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(median_buil_analysis1$X2025, median_buil_analysis1$X2024, paired = T, na.rm = T)

results_buildings_scope <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_buil_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_buil_2423_less$statistic,
                 scope_buil_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_buil_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_buil_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_buil_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_buil_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_buil_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_buil_2524_twosided$statistic),
  
  p.value = c(scope_buil_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_buil_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_buil_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_buil_2523_greater$p.value,
             scope_buil_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_buil_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_buil_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_buil_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_buil_2524_twosided$p.value),
  
  alternative = c(scope_buil_2423_greater$alternative,scope_buil_2423_less$alternative,scope_buil_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_buil_2523_greater$alternative,scope_buil_2523_less$alternative,
scope_buil_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_buil_2524_greater$alternative,scope_buil_2524_less$alternative,scope_buil_2524_twosided$alternative),
  
  method = c(scope_buil_2423_greater$method, scope_buil_2423_less$method, scope_buil_2423_twosided$method,scope_buil_2523_greater$method, scope_buil_2523_less$method, scope_buil_2523_twosided$method,scope_buil_2524_greater$method, scope_buil_2524_less$method, scope_buil_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_buildings_scope,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_buildings.csv")



```

#### Roads/paths (a)

```{r}

### After testing i realize that the dataset is too large to run in the entire Bioblitz dataset. Therefore i run this separately for each campus and then i can join the final df together

##### Estimate distance to nearest road and path for each campus ######

#### Analysis 1: Campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and Bioblitz in 24,25

#  Calculate full distance matrix from points to all roads for each campus

### Leiden Bioscience Park
distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbios23 <- st_distance(Leiden_Biosc23, roads_paths_filtered23)

#### code description: then we find the column index with the nearest road or path --- The number "1" indicates that we check for each row the column with the lowest estimated values. So for each point we check the road id with the lowest estimated 

nearest_road_paths_index_leidbios23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbios23, 1, which.min)

#### code description: then we find the row  with the lowest estimated road or path distance

min_distances_roads_paths_leidbios23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbios23, 1, min)

#### code description: then we add to our original data the id of the road or path with the lowest estimated distance

Leiden_Biosc23$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_leidbios23  # Nearest road index

#### code description: then we add to our original data the actual distance of the nearest road or path 

Leiden_Biosc23$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_leidbios23)

### Leiden Binnenstad
distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbin23 <- st_distance(Leiden_Bin23, roads_paths_filtered23)

nearest_road_paths_index_leidbin23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbin23, 1, which.min)

#### code description: then we find the row  with the lowest estimated road or path distance

min_distances_roads_paths_leidbin23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbin23, 1, min)

#### code description: then we add to our original data the id of the road or path with the lowest estimated distance

Leiden_Bin23$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_leidbin23  # Nearest road index

#### code description: then we add to our original data the actual distance of the nearest road or path 

Leiden_Bin23$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_leidbin23)

#### code description: first we estimate all the distance of all osbervations to all roads and paths 

## HAN_Arnhem
distance_matrix_roads_paths_han_arnhem23 <- st_distance(HAN_Arnhem23, roads_paths_filtered23)

# Find the nearest road and distance for each point
# Get the index of the minimum distance for each point
nearest_road_paths_index_han_arnhem23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_han_arnhem23, 1, which.min)

# Get the minimum distances for each point
min_distances_roads_paths_han_arnhem23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_han_arnhem23, 1, min)

# Add results to your_data
HAN_Arnhem23$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_han_arnhem23  # Nearest road index
HAN_Arnhem23$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_han_arnhem23)

### Leeuwarden
distance_matrix_roads_paths_leeu23 <- st_distance(Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23, roads_paths_filtered23)

nearest_road_paths_index_leeu23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leeu23, 1, which.min)

min_distances_roads_paths_leeu23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leeu23, 1, min)

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_leeu23  # Nearest road index
Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_leeu23)

### USP
distance_matrix_roads_paths_usp23 <- st_distance(USP23, roads_paths_filtered23)

nearest_road_paths_index_usp23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_usp23, 1, which.min)

min_distances_roads_paths_usp23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_usp23, 1, min)

USP23$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_usp23  # Nearest road index
USP23$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_usp23)

### Amsterdam Science Park
distance_matrix_roads_paths_uva23 <- st_distance(UvA23, roads_paths_filtered23)

nearest_road_paths_index_uva23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_uva23, 1, which.min)

min_distances_roads_paths_uva23 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_uva23, 1, min)

UvA23$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_uva23  # Nearest road index
UvA23$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_uva23)

## Join campuses with opportunistic observations in 23 and bioblitz in 24,25 
Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1 <- rbind(UvA23,USP23,Leiden_Bin23,Leiden_Biosc23,Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23,HAN_Arnhem23) 

## create 5m bins
Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road_path_5mbin <- cut(Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road, breaks = seq(0, max(Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road) + 5, by = 5), right = FALSE, include.lowest = F)


## get the median distance per campus: Campus --> median distance to nearest road/path (use the original distance) --> save --> then add all years in 1 csv file --> use for bias, added value

Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med <- Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise("X2023" = median(distance_to_road))

Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med <- st_drop_geometry(Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med)

#  Calculate full distance matrix from points to all roads for each campus

######## RQ1+RQ2

## HAN_Arnhem

### Leeuwarden

min_distances_roads_paths_leeu24 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leeu24, 1, min)

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein24$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_leeu24

### USP
distance_matrix_roads_paths_usp24 <- st_distance(USP24, roads_paths_filtered24)

min_distances_roads_paths_usp24 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_usp24, 1, min)

UvA24$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_uva24  # Nearest road index
UvA24$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_uva24)

### SOS join campuses
Observations_2024_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1 <- rbind(UvA24,USP24,Leiden_Bin24,Leiden_Biosc24,Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein24,HAN_Arnhem24) 

## create 5m bins
Observations_2024_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road_path_5mbin <- cut(Observations_2024_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road, breaks = seq(0, max(Observations_2024_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road) + 5, by = 5), right = FALSE, include.lowest = F)


## get the median distance per campus: Campus --> median distance to nearest road/path (use the original distance) --> save --> then add all years in 1 csv file --> use for bias, added value

Observations_2024_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med <- Observations_2024_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise("X2024" = median(distance_to_road))

nearest_road_paths_index_velp24 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_velp24, 1, which.min)

### WUR
distance_matrix_roads_paths_wur24 <- st_distance(WUR_main_campus24, roads_paths_filtered24)
```
