```{r}
WUR_main_campus24$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_wur24)

## Join campuses with bioblitz in 23,24,25 
scope_ropa_a2 <- rbind(WUR_main_campus24,TUDelft24,Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein24,Twente_university_campus24,Radboud_University_and_HAN_Nijmegen24,Groningen_Zernike_campus24) 

## create 5m bins
scope_ropa_a2$distance_to_road_path_5mbin <- cut(scope_ropa_a2$distance_to_road, breaks = seq(0, max(scope_ropa_a2$distance_to_road) + 5, by = 5), right = FALSE, include.lowest = F)


## get the median distance per campus: Campus --> median distance to nearest road/path (use the original distance) --> save --> then add all years in 1 csv file --> use for bias, added value

scope_ropa_a2_med <- scope_ropa_a2 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise("X2024" = median(distance_to_road))

scope_ropa_a2_med <- st_drop_geometry(scope_ropa_a2_med)

write.csv(scope_ropa_a2_med,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Analysis2_Median_Roads_paths24.csv")


#### 2025

#  Calculate full distance matrix from points to all roads for each campus


## HAN_Arnhem
distance_matrix_roads_paths_han_arnhem25 <- st_distance(HAN_Arnhem25, roads_paths_filtered25)

# Find the nearest road and distance for each point
# Get the index of the minimum distance for each point
nearest_road_paths_index_han_arnhem25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_han_arnhem25, 1, which.min)

# Get the minimum distances for each point
min_distances_roads_paths_han_arnhem25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_han_arnhem25, 1, min)

# Add results to your_data
HAN_Arnhem25$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_han_arnhem25  # Nearest road index
HAN_Arnhem25$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_han_arnhem25)

### Leiden Bioscience Park
distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbios25 <- st_distance(Leiden_Biosc25, roads_paths_filtered25)

nearest_road_paths_index_leidbios25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbios25, 1, which.min)

min_distances_roads_paths_leidbios25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbios25, 1, min)

Leiden_Biosc25$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_leidbios25  

Leiden_Biosc25$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_leidbios25)

### Leiden Binnenstad
distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbin25 <- st_distance(Leiden_Bin25, roads_paths_filtered25)

nearest_road_paths_index_leidbin25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbin25, 1, which.min)

min_distances_roads_paths_leidbin25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leidbin25, 1, min)

Leiden_Bin25$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_leidbin25  

Leiden_Bin25$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_leidbin25)

### Leeuwarden
distance_matrix_roads_paths_leeu25 <- st_distance(Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25, roads_paths_filtered25)

nearest_road_paths_index_leeu25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leeu25, 1, which.min)

min_distances_roads_paths_leeu25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_leeu25, 1, min)

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_leeu25  # Nearest road index
Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_leeu25)

### USP
distance_matrix_roads_paths_usp25 <- st_distance(USP25, roads_paths_filtered25)

nearest_road_paths_index_usp25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_usp25, 1, which.min)

min_distances_roads_paths_usp25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_usp25, 1, min)

USP25$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_usp25  # Nearest road index
USP25$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_usp25)

### UvA
distance_matrix_roads_paths_uva25 <- st_distance(UvA25, roads_paths_filtered25)

nearest_road_paths_index_uva25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_uva25, 1, which.min)

min_distances_roads_paths_uva25 <- apply(distance_matrix_roads_paths_uva25, 1, min)

UvA25$nearest_road_id <- nearest_road_paths_index_uva25  # Nearest road index
UvA25$distance_to_road <- as.numeric(min_distances_roads_paths_uva25)


## Join campuses with opportunistic observations in 23 and bioblitz in 24,25 
Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1 <- rbind(HAN_Arnhem25,Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25,Leiden_Bin25,Leiden_Biosc25,USP25,UvA25) 

## create 5m bins
Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road_path_5mbin <- cut(Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road, breaks = seq(0, max(Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$distance_to_road) + 5, by = 5), right = FALSE, include.lowest = F)


## get the median distance per campus: Campus --> median distance to nearest road/path (use the original distance) --> save --> then add all years in 1 csv file --> use for bias, added value

Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med <- Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise("X2025" = median(distance_to_road))

Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med <- st_drop_geometry(Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med)

####### Now join as 1 table

scope_ropa_2023_24 <- left_join(Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med,Observations_2024_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med, by = "campus")


scope_ropa_2023_24_25 <- left_join(scope_ropa_2023_24,Observations_2025_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1_med, by = "campus")

write.csv(scope_ropa_2023_24_25,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Analysis1_Median_Roads_paths23_24_25.csv")


```

#### Roads/paths (b)

```{r}

#### Analysis 1: Campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and Bioblitz in 24,25

median_ropa_analysis1 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Analysis1_Median_Roads_paths23_24_25.csv", sep = ",")


## 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
scope_ropa_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2024, median_ropa_analysis1$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_ropa_2423_less <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2024, median_ropa_analysis1$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_ropa_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2024, median_ropa_analysis1$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2023
## greater
scope_ropa_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2025, median_ropa_analysis1$X2023, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_ropa_2523_less <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2025, median_ropa_analysis1$X2023, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_ropa_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2025, median_ropa_analysis1$X2023,paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2024
## greater
scope_ropa_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2025, median_ropa_analysis1$X2024, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_ropa_2524_less <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2025, median_ropa_analysis1$X2024, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_ropa_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(median_ropa_analysis1$X2025, median_ropa_analysis1$X2024, paired = T, na.rm = T)

results_ropa_scope <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_ropa_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_ropa_2423_less$statistic,
                 scope_ropa_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_ropa_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_ropa_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_ropa_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_ropa_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_ropa_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_ropa_2524_twosided$statistic),
  
  p.value = c(scope_ropa_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_ropa_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_ropa_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_ropa_2523_greater$p.value,
             scope_ropa_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_ropa_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_ropa_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_ropa_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_ropa_2524_twosided$p.value),
  
  alternative = c(scope_ropa_2423_greater$alternative,scope_ropa_2423_less$alternative,scope_ropa_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_ropa_2523_greater$alternative,scope_ropa_2523_less$alternative,
scope_ropa_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_ropa_2524_greater$alternative,scope_ropa_2524_less$alternative,scope_ropa_2524_twosided$alternative),
  
  method = c(scope_ropa_2423_greater$method, scope_ropa_2423_less$method, scope_ropa_2423_twosided$method,scope_ropa_2523_greater$method, scope_ropa_2523_less$method, scope_ropa_2523_twosided$method,scope_ropa_2524_greater$method, scope_ropa_2524_less$method, scope_ropa_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_ropa_scope,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_bias_scope.csv")

```



#### Land use (a)

```{r}


## Analysis 1: Campuses with opportunistic in 2023

Observations_2023_clip_lugrouped_analysis1 <- Observations_2023_clip_lu_ng  %>%
group_by(landuse_value2,campus) %>%
  summarize(total = n())

Observations_2024_clip_lugrouped_analysis1 <- Observations_2024_clip_lu_ng %>%
group_by(landuse_value2,campus) %>%
  summarize(total = n())

Observations_2025_clip_lugrouped_analysis1 <- Observations_2025_clip_lu_ng %>%
group_by(landuse_value2,campus) %>%
  summarize(total = n())

### this works when we have the same names + add a new col with mutate
Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1 <- bind_rows(
  Observations_2023_clip_lugrouped_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "2023"),
  Observations_2024_clip_lugrouped_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "2024"),
  Observations_2025_clip_lugrouped_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "2025")
)

#### This is what i use for the BOXPLOT
Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1<-st_drop_geometry(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1)


write.csv(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Land_use3_for_boxplot_Analysis1.csv")

Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_sum <-
  Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus,landuse_value2, year) %>%   # replace 'species' with your ID column(s)
  summarise(total = sum(total), .groups = "drop")

library(dplyr)

## drop geom
Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_sum <- st_drop_geometry(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_sum)

Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide <-
  Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_sum %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(landuse_value2, year),
    values_from = total,
    names_sep = "_",
    values_fill = 0
  )

## Analysis 2: Campuses with bioblitz in 2024 

Observations_2024_clip_lu2_grouped <- Observations_2024_clip_lu2 %>%
group_by(landuse_value2,campus) %>%
  summarize(total = n())

Observations_2024_clip_lu2_grouped_wide <-
  Observations_2024_clip_lu2_grouped %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(landuse_value2),
    values_from = total,
    names_sep = "_",
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>% rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_2024"),-campus)



```

#### Land use (b)

```{r}

### Added value: Increase in observations in each land use

## I now read the adjusted land use file that i saved from before, edited the structure of the file to help with analysing the added value

### Analysis 1: Opportunistic 2023 + Bioblitz 24,25
library(tidyr)

## Agriculture 

## 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
scope_agri_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_agri_2423_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_agri_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2023
## greater
bias_agri_2523_greater<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2023, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_agri_2523_less<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2023, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_agri_2523_twosided<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2023,paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2024
## greater
bias_agri_2524_greater<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2024, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_agri_2524_less<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2024, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_agri_2524_twosided<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Agriculture_2024, paired = T, na.rm = T)

results_agriculture <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_agri_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_agri_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_agri_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_agri_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_agri_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_agri_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_agri_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_agri_2524_less$statistic,
              scope_agri_2524_twosided$statistic),
  
  p.value = c(scope_agri_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_agri_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_agri_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_agri_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_agri_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_agri_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_agri_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_agri_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_agri_2524_twosided$p.value),
  
  alternative = c(scope_agri_2423_greater$alternative,scope_agri_2423_less$alternative,scope_agri_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_agri_2523_greater$alternative,scope_agri_2523_less$alternative,scope_agri_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_agri_2524_greater$alternative,scope_agri_2524_less$alternative,scope_agri_2524_twosided$alternative),
  
  method = c(scope_agri_2423_greater$method, scope_agri_2423_less$method, scope_agri_2423_twosided$method,scope_agri_2523_greater$method, scope_agri_2523_less$method, scope_agri_2523_twosided$method,scope_agri_2524_greater$method, scope_agri_2524_less$method, scope_agri_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_agriculture,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_agriculture.csv")

#### Natural in built 

scope_natubuil_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_natubuil_2423_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_natubuil_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2023
## greater
scope_natubuil_2523_greater<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2023, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_natubuil_2523_less<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2023, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_natubuil_2523_twosided<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2023,paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2024
## greater
scope_natubuil_2524_greater<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2024, alternative = "greater",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_natubuil_2524_less<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2024, alternative = "less",paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_natubuil_2524_twosided<-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Natural_in_Built_2024, paired = T, na.rm = T)

results_naturalinbuilt <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_natubuil_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_natubuil_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_natubuil_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_natubuil_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_natubuil_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_natubuil_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_natubuil_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_natubuil_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_natubuil_2524_twosided$statistic),
  
  p.value = c(scope_natubuil_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_natubuil_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_natubuil_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_natubuil_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_natubuil_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_natubuil_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_natubuil_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_natubuil_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_natubuil_2524_twosided$p.value),
  
  alternative = c(scope_natubuil_2423_greater$alternative,scope_natubuil_2423_less$alternative,scope_natubuil_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_natubuil_2523_greater$alternative,scope_natubuil_2523_less$alternative,scope_natubuil_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_natubuil_2524_greater$alternative,scope_natubuil_2524_less$alternative,scope_natubuil_2524_twosided$alternative),
  
  method = c(scope_natubuil_2423_greater$method, scope_natubuil_2423_less$method, scope_natubuil_2423_twosided$method,scope_natubuil_2523_greater$method, scope_natubuil_2523_less$method, scope_natubuil_2523_twosided$method,scope_natubuil_2524_greater$method, scope_natubuil_2524_less$method, scope_natubuil_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_naturalinbuilt,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_natural_in_built.csv")

#### Freshwater

## 2024 ~ 2023
scope_fresh_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_fresh_2423_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_fresh_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2023

scope_fresh_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_fresh_2523_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_fresh_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2024
## greater
scope_fresh_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_fresh_2524_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_fresh_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Freshwater_2024, paired = T, na.rm = T)


## merge
results_fresh <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_fresh_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_fresh_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_fresh_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_fresh_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_fresh_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_fresh_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_fresh_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_fresh_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_fresh_2524_twosided$statistic),
  
  p.value = c(scope_fresh_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_fresh_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_fresh_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_fresh_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_fresh_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_fresh_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_fresh_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_fresh_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_fresh_2524_twosided$p.value),
  
  alternative = c(scope_fresh_2423_greater$alternative,scope_fresh_2423_less$alternative,scope_fresh_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_fresh_2523_greater$alternative,scope_fresh_2523_less$alternative,scope_fresh_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_fresh_2524_greater$alternative,scope_fresh_2524_less$alternative,scope_fresh_2524_twosided$alternative),
  
  method = c(scope_fresh_2423_greater$method, scope_fresh_2423_less$method, scope_fresh_2423_twosided$method,scope_fresh_2523_greater$method, scope_fresh_2523_less$method, scope_fresh_2523_twosided$method,scope_fresh_2524_greater$method, scope_fresh_2524_less$method, scope_fresh_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_fresh,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_freshwater.csv")


#### Built areas

## 2024 ~ 2023
scope_built_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_built_2423_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_built_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2023

scope_built_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_built_2523_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_built_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)


## 2025~2024

scope_built_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_built_2524_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_built_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$built_areas_2024, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## merge
results_built_areas <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_built_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_built_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_built_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_built_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_built_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_built_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_built_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_built_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_built_2524_twosided$statistic),
  
  p.value = c(scope_built_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_built_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_built_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_built_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_built_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_built_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_built_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_built_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_built_2524_twosided$p.value),
  
  alternative = c(scope_built_2423_greater$alternative,scope_built_2423_less$alternative,scope_built_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_built_2523_greater$alternative,scope_built_2523_less$alternative,scope_built_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_built_2524_greater$alternative,scope_built_2524_less$alternative,scope_built_2524_twosided$alternative),
  
  method = c(scope_built_2423_greater$method, scope_built_2423_less$method, scope_built_2423_twosided$method,scope_built_2523_greater$method, scope_built_2523_less$method, scope_built_2523_twosided$method,scope_built_2524_greater$method, scope_built_2524_less$method, scope_built_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_built_areas,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_built_areas.csv")


##### Terrestrial natural

## 2024 ~ 2023
scope_ternat_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_ternat_2423_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_ternat_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2024, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2023
scope_ternat_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_ternat_2523_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_ternat_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2023, paired = T, na.rm = T)

## 2025~2024
scope_ternat_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## less
scope_ternat_2524_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = T)

## both
scope_ternat_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2025, Observations_all_clip_lugrouped_analysis1_wide$Terrestrial_Natural_2024, paired = T, na.rm = T)


## merge
results_ternat <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_ternat_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_ternat_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_ternat_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_ternat_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_ternat_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_ternat_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_ternat_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_ternat_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_ternat_2524_twosided$statistic),
  
  p.value = c(scope_ternat_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_ternat_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_ternat_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_ternat_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_ternat_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_ternat_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_ternat_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_ternat_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_ternat_2524_twosided$p.value),
  
  alternative = c(scope_ternat_2423_greater$alternative,scope_ternat_2423_less$alternative,scope_ternat_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_ternat_2523_greater$alternative,scope_ternat_2523_less$alternative,scope_ternat_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_ternat_2524_greater$alternative,scope_ternat_2524_less$alternative,scope_ternat_2524_twosided$alternative),
  
  method = c(scope_ternat_2423_greater$method, scope_ternat_2423_less$method, scope_ternat_2423_twosided$method,scope_ternat_2523_greater$method, scope_ternat_2523_less$method, scope_ternat_2523_twosided$method,scope_ternat_2524_greater$method, scope_ternat_2524_less$method, scope_ternat_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_ternat,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_terrestrialnatural.csv")








```

#### Taxonomic (a)

Assign taxonomic groups into taxonomic categories. By default waarneming data have unrecognized characters (spaces). Therefore we need to identify all the unique groups and replace their characters.

Note: 22.1.26 – To save time i already have the analysis ready but across all campuses. So what i do now is just change the names in english in excel as it is in R. Then come back to write the code for analysis 1,2 (since i cant say i did it manually in excel)

```{r}

############## Analysis 1: Campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and a Bioblitz in 2024


######## Pre-processing: Translate names to english. Also remove special characters( space comma parenthesis) for clarity ###### 

### 2023 ###
#unique(Observations_2023_filtered$species.group)

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Sprinkhanen en krekels"] <- "Grasshoppers_crickets"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Wantsen, cicaden en plantenluizen"] <- "Bugs_cicadas_aphids"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Bijen, wespen en mieren"] <- "Bees_wasps_ants"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Geleedpotigen (overig)"] <- "Arthropods_other"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Nachtvlinders en micro's"] <- "Moths_micros"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Mossen en korstmossen"] <- "Mosses_lichens"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Vliegen en muggen"] <- "Flies_mosquitoes"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Insecten (overig)"] <- "Insects_other"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Reptielen en amfibieën"] <- "Reptiles_amphibians"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Overige ongewervelden"] <- "Other_invertebrates"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "AAlgen, wieren en eencelligen"] <- "Algae_weeds_unicellular"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Dagvlinders"] <- "Butterflies"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Kevers"] <- "Beetles"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Libellen"] <- "Dragonflies"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Paddenstoelen"] <- "Mushrooms"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Planten"] <- "Plants"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Vissen"] <- "Fish"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Vogels"] <- "Birds"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Weekdieren"] <- "Mollusks"

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Zoogdieren"] <- "Mammals"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group != "Verstoringen", ]

#### --- 2025 --- ###



Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Sprinkhanen en krekels"] <- "Grasshoppers_crickets"

Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Wantsen, cicaden en plantenluizen"] <- "Bugs_cicadas_aphids"

Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Kevers"] <- "Beetles"

Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Vogels"] <- "Birds"

Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Mollusca (Weekdieren)"] <- "Mollusks"

Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group[Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group == "Zoogdieren"] <- "Mammals"


# Organize species groups into 4 categories for each campus (remove the name utrecht to generalize)
# Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
#   mutate(
#     group_category = case_when(
#       species.group == "Plants" ~ "Plants_and_Fungi",
#       species.group == "Birds" ~ "Vertebrates",
#       species.group == "Bugs_cicadas_aphids" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Bees_wasps_ants" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Beetles" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Molluscs" ~ "Other_invertebrates",
#       species.group == "Arthropods_other" ~ "Other_invertebrates",
#       species.group == "Mushrooms" ~ "Plants_and_Fungi",
#       species.group == "Moths_micros" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Mosses_lichens" ~ "Plants_and_Fungi",
#       species.group == "Flies_mosquitoes" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Mammals" ~ "Vertebrates",
#       species.group == "Insects_other" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Reptiles_amphibians" ~ "Vertebrates",
#       species.group == "Dragonflies" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Butterflies" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Grasshoppers_crickets" ~ "Insects_&_Other_Arthropods",
#       species.group == "Other_invertebrates" ~ "Other_invertebrates",
#       species.group == "Fish" ~ "Vertebrates",
#       species.group == "Algae_weeds_unicellular" ~ "Plants_and_Fungi",
#                   TRUE ~ "Other"))


## Remove "Verstoringen category : the data represents a dog entry !!
Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1[Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group != "Verstoringen", ]


### Total observations

#2023

Observations_2023_clip_filtered_group_a1 <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus,species.group) %>%  
  summarize(total_observations = n(), .groups = "drop")
# 
# Observations_2023_clip_filtered_spec_a1 <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
#   group_by(group_category,species.group) %>%  
#   summarize(total_observations = n(), .groups = "drop")


#2024
Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a1 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus,species.group) %>%  
  summarize(total_observations = n(), .groups = "drop")
# 
# Observations_2024_clip_filtered_spec_a1 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
#   group_by(group_category,species.group) %>%  
#   summarize(total_observations = n(), .groups = "drop")



#2025

unique(Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1$species.group)


Observations_2025_clip_filtered_group_a1 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus,species.group) %>%  
  summarize(total_observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

write.csv(Observations_2025_clip_filtered_group_a1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Taxonomic_bias_23_24_25_for_boxplot.csv")



# Observations_2025_clip_filtered_spec_a1 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
#   group_by(group_category,species.group) %>%  
#   summarize(total_observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1 <- bind_rows(
Observations_2023_clip_filtered_group_a1 %>% mutate(year = "2023"),
  Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a1 %>% mutate(year = "2024"),
  Observations_2025_clip_filtered_group_a1 %>% mutate(year = "2025")
)

#### This is what i use for the BOXPLOT
Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1<-st_drop_geometry(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1)

## for statistical analysis
Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide <-
  Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1 %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(species.group, year),
    values_from = total_observations,
    names_sep = "_",
    values_fill = 0
  )

needed <- c("Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023","Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024", "Other_invertebrates_2023")

for (col in needed) {
  if (!col %in% names(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide)) {
    Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide[[col]] <- 0
  }
}


write.csv(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Taxonomic_bias_23_24_25.csv")


###- Analysis 2 ---- ###


###---- 2024 ---##


Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Sprinkhanen en krekels"] <- "Grasshoppers_crickets"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Wantsen, cicaden en plantenluizen"] <- "Bugs_cicadas_aphids"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Bijen, wespen en mieren"] <- "Bees_wasps_ants"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Geleedpotigen (overig)"] <- "Arthropods_other"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Nachtvlinders en micro's"] <- "Moths_micros"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Mossen en korstmossen"] <- "Mosses_lichens"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Vliegen en muggen"] <- "Flies_mosquitoes"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Insecten (overig)"] <- "Insects_other"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Reptielen en amfibieën"] <- "Reptiles_amphibians"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Overige ongewervelden"] <- "Other_invertebrates"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Algen, wieren en eencelligen"] <- "Algae_weeds_unicellular"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Dagvlinders"] <- "Butterflies"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Kevers"] <- "Beetles"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Libellen"] <- "Dragonflies"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Paddenstoelen"] <- "Mushrooms"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Planten"] <- "Plants"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Vissen"] <- "Fish"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Vogels"] <- "Birds"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Weekdieren"] <- "Mollusks"

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group == "Zoogdieren"] <- "Mammals"

 
## Remove "Verstoringen category : the data represents a dog entry !!
Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2[Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2$species.group != "Verstoringen", ]

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2 %>%
  group_by(campus,species.group) %>%  
  summarize(total_observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

#### This is what i use for the BOXPLOT
Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2<-st_drop_geometry(Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2)

Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2_wide <-
  Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2 %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = c(species.group),
    values_from = total_observations,
    names_sep = "_",
    values_fill = 0
  )%>% rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_2024"),-campus)


write.csv(Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2_wide,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Taxonomic_scope_23_24_25_for_rq2_a2.csv")




```

#### Taxonomic (b)

```{r}


####### Analysis 1: campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and a bioblitz in 2024, 25

######## ------  Algae_weeds_unicellular ------ ########
## some years have 0 observations so i exclude them from the analysis but still keep the code
# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater


scope_algae_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023, alternative = "g", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

# ## less
scope_algae_2423_less <-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023, alternative = "l", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

# ## both
scope_algae_2423_twosided <-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

# ##2025 ~ 2023:
# ## greater
scope_algae_2523_greater <-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023, alternative = "g", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

# ## less
scope_algae_2523_less <-wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023, alternative = "l", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

# ## both
scope_algae_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

# ## 2025 ~ 2024

# ## greater
scope_algae_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024, alternative = "g", paired = T)

# ## less
scope_algae_2524_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024, alternative = "l", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

# ## both
scope_algae_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

results_algae <- data.frame(
   comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
   statistic = c(scope_algae_2423_greater$statistic,
                 scope_algae_2423_less$statistic,
                 scope_algae_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_algae_2523_greater$statistic,
                 scope_algae_2523_less$statistic,
                 scope_algae_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_algae_2524_greater$statistic,
                 scope_algae_2524_less$statistic,
                 scope_algae_2524_twosided$statistic),

   p.value = c(scope_algae_2423_greater$p.value,
               scope_algae_2423_less$p.value,
               scope_algae_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_algae_2523_greater$p.value,
               scope_algae_2523_less$p.value,
               scope_algae_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_algae_2524_greater$p.value,
               scope_algae_2524_less$p.value,
               scope_algae_2524_twosided$p.value),

   alternative = c(scope_algae_2423_greater$alternative,scope_algae_2423_less$alternative,scope_algae_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_algae_2523_greater$alternative,scope_algae_2523_less$alternative,scope_algae_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_algae_2524_greater$alternative,scope_algae_2524_less$alternative,scope_algae_2524_twosided$alternative),

   method = c(scope_algae_2423_greater$method, scope_algae_2423_less$method, scope_algae_2423_twosided$method,scope_algae_2523_greater$method, scope_algae_2523_less$method, scope_algae_2523_twosided$method,scope_algae_2524_greater$method, scope_algae_2524_less$method, scope_algae_2524_twosided$method)
 )

write.csv(results_algae,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_algae.csv")



######## ------ Bees_wasps_ants ------ ########

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
scope_bwa_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2024, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
scope_bwa_2423_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2024, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
scope_bwa_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2024, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
scope_bwa_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
scope_bwa_2523_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
scope_bwa_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
scope_bwa_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
scope_bwa_2524_less <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
scope_bwa_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Bees_wasps_ants_2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


results_bwa <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_bwa_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_bwa_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_bwa_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_bwa_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_bwa_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_bwa_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_bwa_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_bwa_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_bwa_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(scope_bwa_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_bwa_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_bwa_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_bwa_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_bwa_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_bwa_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_bwa_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_bwa_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_bwa_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(scope_bwa_2423_greater$alternative,scope_bwa_2423_less$alternative,scope_bwa_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_bwa_2523_greater$alternative,scope_bwa_2523_less$alternative,scope_bwa_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_bwa_2524_greater$alternative,scope_bwa_2524_less$alternative,scope_bwa_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(scope_bwa_2423_greater$method, scope_bwa_2423_less$method, scope_bwa_2423_twosided$method,scope_bwa_2523_greater$method, scope_bwa_2523_less$method, scope_bwa_2523_twosided$method,scope_bwa_2524_greater$method, scope_bwa_2524_less$method, scope_bwa_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_bwa,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_beeswaspsants.csv")


######## ------ Butterflies ------ ########

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
scope_butt_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Butterflies_2024, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Butterflies_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less

results_butt <- data.frame(

  statistic = c(scope_butt_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_butt_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_butt_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_butt_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_butt_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_butt_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_butt_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_butt_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_butt_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(scope_butt_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_butt_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_butt_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_butt_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_butt_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_butt_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_butt_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_butt_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_butt_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(scope_butt_2423_greater$alternative,scope_butt_2423_less$alternative,scope_butt_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_butt_2523_greater$alternative,scope_butt_2523_less$alternative,scope_butt_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_butt_2524_greater$alternative,scope_butt_2524_less$alternative,scope_butt_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(scope_butt_2423_greater$method, scope_butt_2423_less$method, scope_butt_2423_twosided$method,scope_butt_2523_greater$method, scope_butt_2523_less$method, scope_butt_2523_twosided$method,scope_butt_2524_greater$method, scope_butt_2524_less$method, scope_butt_2524_twosided$method)
)

######## ------ Arthropods other ------ ########

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater

scope_arthoth_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Arthropods_other_2024, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Arthropods_other_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less

scope_fi_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Fish_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Fish_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


## 2025 ~ 2024
scope_fi_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Fish_2025, Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Fish_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less

## both

#merged
results_fi <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_fi_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_fi_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_fi_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_fi_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_fi_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_fi_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_fi_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_fi_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_fi_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(scope_fi_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_fi_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_fi_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_fi_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_fi_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_fi_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_fi_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_fi_2524_less$p.value,

              scope_ma_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(scope_ma_2423_greater$alternative,scope_ma_2423_less$alternative,scope_ma_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_ma_2523_greater$alternative,scope_ma_2523_less$alternative,scope_ma_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_ma_2524_greater$alternative,scope_ma_2524_less$alternative,scope_ma_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(scope_mol_2423_greater$method, scope_ma_2423_less$method, scope_ma_2423_twosided$method,scope_ma_2523_greater$method, scope_ma_2523_less$method, scope_ma_2523_twosided$method,scope_ma_2524_greater$method, scope_ma_2524_less$method, scope_ma_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_ma,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_mammals.csv")



```

```{### Per taxonomic group}
## Algae_weeds_unicellular
names(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value)

algen_for_graph_a1 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/bias/csv_files/Analysis1/Algen_bias.csv", sep = ";")

## letters
algen_bias_added_value_letters_a1 <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(algen_for_graph_a1$total) * 1.5  
)

g1a1 <- ggplot(algen_for_graph_a1, aes(x=as.factor(year), y=total
)) + 
    geom_boxplot(fill="slateblue", alpha=0.2) + 
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Total observations") + ggtitle("Algae_weeds_unicellular") +theme_bw()  + geom_text(data = algen_bias_added_value_letters_a1,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE)

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/bias/graphs/Analysis1/Zoogdieren.png")



########## Join all plots together ##########

#letters
## put all graphs in a list to manage easier
glist_a1_letters <- list(g1a1,g2a1,g3a1,g4a1,g5a1,g6a1,g7a1,g8a1,g9a1,g10a1,g11a1,g12a1,g13a1,g14a1,g15a1,g16a1,g17a1,g18a1,g19a1,g20a1)


## use patchwork that help tidy many graphs 
library(patchwork)
wrap_plots(glist_a1_letters, ncol = 5) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Taxonomic bias"
  ) & labs(left = "Total observations", bottom = "Year" )

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/bias/graphs/Analysis1/All_taxonomic_groups.png", width = 20,
  height = 12,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300)

####### Analysis 2: campuses with a bioblitz in 2023,24, 25

taxonomic_observations_23_analysis2 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_obs_for_boxplot_anal2_23.csv",sep=";")

taxonomic_observations_24_analysis2 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_obs_for_boxplot_anal2_24-UU200322.csv",sep=";")

taxonomic_observations_25_analysis2 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_obs_for_boxplot_anal2_25.csv", sep = ";")


library(forcats)

# 2023 
ggplot(taxonomic_observations_23_analysis2, aes(
  x = fct_reorder(group, total, .fun = max, .desc = TRUE),
  y = total
)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Total observations") +  ggtitle("Taxonomic bias: 2023 for campuses with a Bioblitz in 2023,24,25")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),plot.title = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40))

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_bias_23.png")

# 2024 
ggplot(taxonomic_observations_24_analysis2, aes(
  x = fct_reorder(group, total, .fun = max, .desc = TRUE),
  y = total
)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Total observations") +  ggtitle("Taxonomic bias: 2024 for campuses with a Bioblitz in 2023,24,25")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),plot.title = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40))

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_bias_24.png")

# 2025 
ggplot(taxonomic_observations_25_analysis2, aes(
  x = fct_reorder(group, total, .fun = max, .desc = TRUE),
  y = total
)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Total observations") +  ggtitle("Taxonomic bias: 2025 for campuses with a Bioblitz in 2023,24,25")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),plot.title = element_text(size = 8),

### Per taxonomic group 

## Algae_weeds_unicellular
names(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value)

algen_for_graph_a2 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/bias/csv_files/Analysis2/Algen_bias.csv", sep = ";")

## letters
algen_bias_added_value_letters_a2 <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(algen_for_graph_a2$total) * 1.5  
)

g1a2 <- ggplot(algen_for_graph_a2, aes(x=as.factor(year), y=total
)) + 
    geom_boxplot(fill="slateblue", alpha=0.2) + 
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Total observations") + ggtitle("Algae_weeds_unicellular")  + geom_text(data = algen_bias_added_value_letters_a2,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE)


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/bias/graphs/Analysis2/Algen_wieren_en_eencelligen.png")

## stars -- no statistical increase so no stars added

    geom_boxplot(fill="slateblue", alpha=0.2) + 
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Total observations") + ggtitle("Algae_weeds_unicellular")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40)) 

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/bias/graphs/Analysis2/Algen_wieren_en_eencelligen_stars.png")

  y = max(planten_for_graph_a2$total) * 1.5  
)

g12a2 <- ggplot(planten_for_graph_a2, aes(x=as.factor(year), y=total
)) +

    xlab("Year") + ylab("Total observations") + ggtitle("Plants")  + geom_text(data = planten_bias_added_value_letters_a2,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE)

)


g14a2 <- ggplot(Sprink_for_graph_a2, aes(x=as.factor(year), y=total
)) +

)

        annotations = label, y_position = y
        ),

  )

########## Join all plots together ##########

#letters
## put all graphs in a list to manage easier
glist_a2_letters <- list(g1a2,g2a2,g3a2,g4a2,g5a2,g6a2,g7a2,g8a2,g9a2,g10a2,g11a2,g12a2,g13a2,g14a2,g15a2,g16a2,g17a2,g18a2,g19a2,g20a2)


## use patchwork that help tidy many graphs 
library(patchwork)
wrap_plots(glist_a2_letters, ncol = 5) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Taxonomic bias (Wilcoxon.test: greater) for campuses with a Bioblitz in 2023,24,25"
  ) & labs(left = "Total observations", bottom = "Year" )

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/bias/graphs/Analysis2/All_taxonomic_groups.png", width = 20,
  height = 12,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300)

## stars
glist_a2_stars<- list(g1a2s,g2a2s,g3a2s,g4a2s,g5a2s,g6a2s,g7a2s,g8a2s,g9a2s,g10a2s,g11a2s,g12a2s,g13a2s,g14a2s,g15a2s,g16a2s,g17a2s,g18a2s,g19a2s,g20a2s)


## use patchwork that help tidy many graphs 
wrap_plots(glist_a2_stars, ncol = 5) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Taxonomic bias (Wilcoxon.test: greater) for campuses with a Bioblitz in 2023,24,25"
  ) 


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/bias/graphs/Analysis2/All_taxonomic_groups_stars.png", width = 20,
  height = 18,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300)


#### for pp presentation

### bias

USP23_tax_bias <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/Tax_bias_usp23_pp.csv", sep = ";")

ggplot(USP23_tax_bias, aes(x = reorder(group,-bias), y = bias)) +
   geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Total observations",         title = "Opportunistic 2023") +
    theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 6),plot.title = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40))

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/taxbias_2023_USP.png")


USP24_tax_bias <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/Tax_bias_usp24_pp.csv", sep = ";")

ggplot(USP24_tax_bias, aes(x = reorder(group,-bias), y = bias)) +
   geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Total observations",         title = "Bioblitz 2024") +
    theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size=6),plot.title = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40))

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/taxbias_2024_USP.png")

USP25_tax_bias <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/Tax_bias_usp25_pp.csv", sep = ";")

ggplot(USP25_tax_bias, aes(x = reorder(group,-bias), y = bias)) +
   geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Total observations",         title = "Bioblitz 2025") +
    theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 6),plot.title = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40))

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/taxbias_2025_USP.png")


## Bias
USP23_tax_bias <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/Tax_bias_usp23_pp.csv", sep = ";")

ggplot(USP23_tax_bias, aes(x = reorder(group,-bias), y = bias)) +
   geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Deviation from Ideal Sampling",         title = "Opportunistic 2023") +
    theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),plot.title = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40)) +  geom_hline(yintercept = 1,color = "red") 

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/taxbias_2023_USP.png")


USP24_tax_bias <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/Tax_bias_usp24_pp.csv", sep = ";")

   geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Deviation from Ideal Sampling",         title = "Bioblitz 2024") +
    theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),plot.title = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40)) +  geom_hline(yintercept = 1,color = "red") 

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/taxbias_2024_USP.png")

ggplot(USP25_tax_bias, aes(x = reorder(group,-bias), y = bias)) +
   geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Deviation from Ideal Sampling",         title = "Bioblitz 2025") +
    theme(
```

#### Observer

```{r}

### Note: 23.12.25: We decided to only focus on total observations per observer. However i kept the code for species per observer and i just comment (#) in case i need the code

###### Analysis 1: Campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and a Bioblitz in 24,25

##### Statistics: # observations

#2023
observer_tot_2023_analysis1 <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

## take both the median and the mean to see if there is a difference in the added value
observer_tot_2023_sum_analysis1 <- observer_tot_2023_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(median = median(total_observations), mean = mean(total_observations))

observer_tot_2023_sum_analysis1 <- st_drop_geometry(observer_tot_2023_sum_analysis1)

write.csv(observer_tot_2023_sum_analysis1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Observer/Analysis1/Observer23_bias_summary_analysis1.csv")

#2024
observer_tot_2024_analysis1 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis1 <- observer_tot_2024_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(median = median(total_observations), mean = mean(total_observations))

observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis1 <- st_drop_geometry(observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis1)

write.csv(observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Observer/Analysis1/Observer24_bias_summary_analysis1.csv")

#2025
observer_tot_2025_analysis1 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

observer_tot_2025_sum_analysis1 <- observer_tot_2025_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(median = median(total_observations), mean = mean(total_observations))

observer_tot_2025_sum_analysis1 <- st_drop_geometry(observer_tot_2025_sum_analysis1)

write.csv(observer_tot_2025_sum_analysis1,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Observer/Analysis1/Observer25_bias_summary_analysis1.csv")

##3 for wilcoxon test
Observer_all_a1 <- bind_rows(
observer_tot_2023_sum_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "X2023"),
  observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "X2024"),
  observer_tot_2025_sum_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "X2025")
)

## for statistical analysis
Observer_all_a1_wide <- Observer_all_a1 %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols = campus,
    names_from = year,
    values_from = median,
    values_fill = 0
  )

## for box plot
Observer_all_a1_plot <- bind_rows(
observer_tot_2023_sum_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "2023"),
observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "2024"),
observer_tot_2025_sum_analysis1 %>% mutate(year = "2025"))

write.csv(Observer_all_a1_plot,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Observer/Analysis1/Observer_scope_a1.csv")

## rq2

#2024
observer_tot_2024_analysis2 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis2 %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis2 <- observer_tot_2024_analysis2 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(observer_2024 = median(total_observations), mean = mean(total_observations))

observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis2 <- st_drop_geometry(observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis2)

write.csv(observer_tot_2024_sum_analysis2,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Observer/Analysis1/Observer24_scope_summary_analysis2.csv")


# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
scope_ob_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2024, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
scope_ob_2423_less <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2024, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
scope_ob_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2024, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
scope_ob_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2025, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
scope_ob_2523_less <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2025, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
scope_ob_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2025, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
scope_ob_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2025, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
scope_ob_2524_less <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2025, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
scope_ob_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(Observer_all_a1_wide$X2025, Observer_all_a1_wide$X2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


results_ob <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(scope_ob_2423_greater$statistic,
                scope_ob_2423_less$statistic,
                scope_ob_2423_twosided$statistic,scope_ob_2523_greater$statistic,
                scope_ob_2523_less$statistic,
                scope_ob_2523_twosided$statistic,scope_ob_2524_greater$statistic,
                scope_ob_2524_less$statistic,
                scope_ob_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(scope_ob_2423_greater$p.value,
              scope_ob_2423_less$p.value,
              scope_ob_2423_twosided$p.value,scope_ob_2523_greater$p.value,
              scope_ob_2523_less$p.value,
              scope_ob_2523_twosided$p.value,scope_ob_2524_greater$p.value,
              scope_ob_2524_less$p.value,
              scope_ob_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(scope_ob_2423_greater$alternative,scope_ob_2423_less$alternative,scope_ob_2423_twosided$alternative,scope_ob_2523_greater$alternative,scope_ob_2523_less$alternative,scope_ob_2523_twosided$alternative,scope_ob_2524_greater$alternative,scope_ob_2524_less$alternative,scope_ob_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(scope_ob_2423_greater$method, scope_ob_2423_less$method, scope_ob_2423_twosided$method,scope_ob_2523_greater$method, scope_ob_2523_less$method, scope_ob_2523_twosided$method,scope_ob_2524_greater$method, scope_ob_2524_less$method, scope_ob_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_ob,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_scope_observer.csv")


```

#### Join and save wilcoxon test results as one table

```{r}

## For this paper and these graphs i only focus on "greater"
Wilcoxon_test_joined_results_bias_greater <- bind_rows(
  results_observations %>% filter(alternative == "greater") %>% mutate(Metric = "Observations"),
  results_buil_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater") %>% mutate(Metric = "Distance_to_nearest_building"),
  results_ropa_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Distance_to_nearest_road_or_path") ,
  results_agriculture %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Agriculture")  ,
  results_built_areas %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Built_areas")  ,
  results_fresh %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Freshwater")  ,
  results_naturalinbuilt %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Natural_in_built")  ,
  results_ternat %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Terrestrial_natural")  ,
  results_ob %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Observer")  ,
  results_algae %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Algae_weeds_unicellular"),
  results_arthoth %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Arthropods_other")  ,
  results_bwa %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Bees_wasps_ants")  ,
  results_beet %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Beetles")  ,
  results_bi %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Birds")  ,
  results_bu %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Bugs_cicadas_aphids") ,
  results_butt %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Butterflies") ,
  results_drag %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Dragonflies") ,
  results_fi %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Fish") ,
  results_flie %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Flies_mosquitoes") ,
  results_gra %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Grasshoppers_crickets") ,
  results_insoth %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Insects_other") ,
  results_ma %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Mammals") ,
  results_mol %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Mollusks")  ,
  results_mos %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Mosses_lichens") ,
  results_moth %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Moths_micros") ,
  results_mush %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Mushrooms") ,
  results_invoth %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Invertebrates_other") ,
  results_pla %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Plants") ,
  results_rep %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Reptiles_amphibians"))


write.csv(Wilcoxon_test_joined_results_bias_greater,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_bias_greater.csv")
```

```{r}
Observations_2023_clip_uniqueobserv <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(unique_observers = n_distinct(user.name))

Observations_2024_clip_uniqueobserv <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(unique_observers = n_distinct(user.name))

Observations_2025_clip_uniqueobserv <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered_analysis1 %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarise(unique_observers = n_distinct(user.name))
```
