#### Boxplots

Created for all bias aspects . This includes a common function formula and a ggplot code specific for each plot. Letters on top represent the result of the statistical test for an alternative = "greater"

```{r}



```

### Bias

#### Data preparation

```{r}

## Run bias for each campus separately and each year.
##### This is the same code for splitting universities as earlier but because it takes space to keep it i rerun it

campuses_boundaries_split <- split(campus_boundaries_merged_filtered, campus_boundaries_merged_filtered$campus)

unique(campus_boundaries_merged_filtered$campus)

###### campus boundaries

### With opportunistic 2023 + Bioblitz 2024-2025

HAN_Arnhem_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$HAN_arnhem

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein

Leiden_Bioscience_Park_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Leiden_Bioscience_Park

Leiden_Binnenstad_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Leiden_Binnenstad

Amsterdam_Science_Park_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Amsterdam_Science_Park

USP_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$USP

###  Bioblitz 2023-2025

Nijmegen_campus_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Nijmegen_campus

Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein

Twente_university_campus_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$UT_campus

TUDelft_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Delft_TU_Campus

WUR_main_campus_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$WUR_main_campus

Groningen_Zernike_campus_boundaries <- 
campuses_boundaries_split$Groningen_Zernike



### Note: Because of the large computational space, i try to break the data -- import.save in chunks depending the analysis i want to do. For example,  you can do it directly after finishing the analysis. What i did is finish buildings ("Observations_year_clip_filtered" and then removed it and imported the data again with the estimated road path distances -- maybe needs adjustment), and then import -- finish buildings, the load again the data just with the info for roads/paths. or maybe i can even join them as one file, think about it

#### I want to save space. So what i do is. First i run for the buildings. Then i delete everything (after i finish all the bias analysis and saved the results). And then run again for the roads/paths.

# #### -------------------- Buildings -------------- 

# ##### Analysis 1: Campuses with opportunistic observations 2023 , Bioblitz 24,25
# 
# ##### ------------ 2023 --------------- ###########
# 

campuses_2023_split_analysis1_buil <- split(Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1, Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$campus)
# 

unique(Observations_2023_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$campus)

# ## Separate per campus

HAN_arnhem23_b <- campuses_2023_split_analysis1_buil[["HAN_arnhem"]]

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23_b <- campuses_2023_split_analysis1_buil[["Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"]]

USP23_b <- campuses_2023_split_analysis1_buil[["USP"]]
#
Leiden_Bioscience_Park23_b <- campuses_2023_split_analysis1_buil[["Leiden_Bioscience_Park"]]
#
Amsterdam_Science_Park23_b <- campuses_2023_split_analysis1_buil[["Amsterdam_Science_Park"]]
#
Leiden_Binnenstad23_b <- campuses_2023_split_analysis1_buil[["Leiden_Binnenstad"]]
#

# ##### ------------ 2024 --------------- ###########

campuses_2024_split_analysis1_buil <- split(Observations_2024_clip_lu_buil_analysis1, Observations_2024_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$campus)

# ## Separate per campus

HAN_arnhem24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis1_buil[["HAN_arnhem"]]

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis1_buil[["Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"]]

USP24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis1_buil[["USP"]]
#
Leiden_Bioscience_Park24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis1_buil[["Leiden_Bioscience_Park"]]
#
Amsterdam_Science_Park24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis1_buil[["Amsterdam_Science_Park"]]
#
Leiden_Binnenstad24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis1_buil[["Leiden_Binnenstad"]]

# 
# ##### ------------ 2025 --------------- ###########
# ##### Analysis 1: Campuses with opportunistic observations 2023 , Bioblitz 24,25

campuses_2025_split_analysis1_buil <- split(Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1, Observations_2025_clip_lu_buil_analysis1$campus)


# ## Separate per campus

HAN_arnhem25_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis1_buil[["HAN_arnhem"]]

Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25_b <- campuses_2025_split_analysis1_buil[["Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"]]

USP25_b <- campuses_2025_split_analysis1_buil[["USP"]]
#
Leiden_Bioscience_Park25_b <- campuses_2025_split_analysis1_buil[["Leiden_Bioscience_Park"]]
#
Amsterdam_Science_Park25_b <- campuses_2025_split_analysis1_buil[["Amsterdam_Science_Park"]]
#
Leiden_Binnenstad25_b <- campuses_2025_split_analysis1_buil[["Leiden_Binnenstad"]]


#### -------- Analysis 2 -------- ##########

campuses_2024_split_analysis2_buil <- split(Observations_2024_clip_lu_buil_analysis2, Observations_2024_clip_lu_buil_analysis2$campus)

Nijmegen_campus24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis2_buil[["Nijmegen_campus"]]

WUR_main_campus24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis2_buil[["WUR_main_campus"]]

TUDelft24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis2_buil[["Delft_TU_Campus"]]

Twente_university_campus24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis2_buil[["UT_campus"]]

Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis2_buil[["Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein"]]

Groningen_Zernike_campus24_b <- campuses_2024_split_analysis2_buil[["Groningen_Zernike"]]



# #### -------------------- Road/paths  -------------- 
# 

### Note: Because of the large computational space, i try to break the data -- import.save in chunks depending the analysis i want to do. For example,  you can do it directly after finishing the analysis. What i did is finish buildings ("Observations_year_clip_filtered" and then removed it and imported the data again with the estimated road path distances -- maybe needs adjustment), and then import -- finish buildings, the load again the data just with the info for roads/paths. or maybe i can even join them as one file, think about it

#### I want to save space. So what i do is. First i run for the buildings. Then i delete everything (after i finish all the bias analysis and saved the results). And then run again for the roads/paths.

campuses_2023_split_analysis1_ropa <- split(Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1, Observations_2023_clip_lu_ropa_analysis1$campus)

# ## Separate per campus
Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23_r <- campuses_2023_split_analysis1_ropa[["Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"]]

USP23_r <- campuses_2023_split_analysis1_ropa[["USP"]]
#
```

#### Random Data Generation

```{r}

### This method will be used to estimate a) Spatial cluster bias, b) distance to buildings bias and c) distance to roads/paths bias

########### These functions apply for all campuses 
###### Random points functions

# Function to generate n random points inside an sf polygon

# First we need to define the function which means to explain what it does in general

generate_random_obs_in_campus <- function(campus_sf, n) {
  # Convert sf polygon to spatstat window
  win <- as.owin(campus_sf)
  
  # Generate n random points inside the window 
  obs <- runifpoint(n, win = win) #### This is the function that creates the random points. It uses the package "spatstat.random". From there we use "runifpoint" function Read p.153 https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/spatstat.random/spatstat.random.pdf . For this trial we assume that the observations of a random dataset would be "independent of each other"
  
  # Convert spatstat points to sf points because we use spatial points
  sf_obs <- st_as_sf(data.frame(x = obs$x, y = obs$y), coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(campus_sf))
  
  return(sf_obs)
}

# Random data: Function - then we need to write the function with the extra details regarding iterations. So because 99 iterations is too much manually we need to iterate over the campus boundary to create the points. We do this directly on the campus boundary file to clip ONLY for the campus



generate_random_replicates_in_campus <- function(campus_sf, n_obs, iterations = 99) {
  replicates_list <- vector("list", iterations)
  
  for (i in seq_len(iterations)) {
    message("Generating replicate ", i)
    replicates_list[[i]] <- generate_random_obs_in_campus(campus_sf, n_obs) #### inside the function we CALL again the function that we defined above with the same name. So is like a function inside another function to help make the code easier to read
  }
  
  return(replicates_list)
}

####### Apply the functions to generate the random data ---- Please note: the generated data take large computational space --> Best to run separately per campus, write results and then delete and continue with next campus 


######## Analysis 1: Opportunistic 2023 + Bioblitz 2024-25


## Note: - it doesnt matter which data you use as long as they follow the original data 

##### -------- USP ------- #####


## 2023
n_obs_usp_23 <- nrow(USP23_b)  # number of points to generate
```

#### Spatial cluster (a)

```{r}

######### --- This function will be used for all campuses and for all years. 

#### Function to calculate neighbor distance
calculate_mean_nnd <- function(sf_obs) {
  coords <- st_coordinates(sf_obs)  # get matrix of x,y
  
  win <- owin(xrange = range(coords[,1]), yrange = range(coords[,2]))
  ppp_obj <- ppp(coords[,1], coords[,2], window = win)
  
  mean(nndist(ppp_obj)) #### This is the function that estimates the Nearest Neighbor Distance (NND). It is ideal for my study because it uses the Euclidean distance between each point to its nearest neighbor and works great for distances between points. This is the same logic we use for estimating distances of observations to roads, buildings. Read more here: https://search.r-project.org/CRAN/refmans/spatstat.geom/html/nndist.html  
} 

# get the mean neighbor distance for bioblitz data


####### Analysis 1: Opport 23 - Bioblitz 24-25

###### -------- USP ---------- ##### 
and_usp_25 <- calculate_mean_nnd(USP25)
and_usp_24 <- calculate_mean_nnd(USP24) # Biob 24
and_usp_23 <- calculate_mean_nnd(USP23) # Opport 2023

# get the mean neighbor distance for random data
and_usp_rand_25 <- sapply(random_replicates_usp_25, calculate_mean_nnd) # Biob 24

and_usp_rand_24 <- sapply(random_replicates_usp_24, calculate_mean_nnd) # Biob 24

and_usp_rand_23 <- sapply(random_replicates_usp_23, calculate_mean_nnd) ## opport 23

# Calculate ratio of observed to expected (random) mean NND
ratio_usp_25 <- and_usp_25 / and_usp_rand_25 ## Biob 24
mean_ratio_usp_25 <- mean(ratio_usp_25) 

ratio_usp_24 <- and_usp_24 / and_usp_rand_24 ## Biob 24
mean_ratio_usp_24 <- mean(ratio_usp_24) 

ratio_usp_23 <- and_usp_23 / and_usp_rand_23 ## Opport 23
mean_ratio_usp_23 <- mean(ratio_usp_23)

###### -------- UvA campus ---------- ##### 
and_uva_25 <- calculate_mean_nnd(UvA25) 
and_uva_24 <- calculate_mean_nnd(UvA24) 
and_uva_23 <- calculate_mean_nnd(UvA24)  

# get the mean neighbor distance for random data
and_uva_rand_25 <- sapply(random_replicates_uva_25, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_uva_rand_24 <- sapply(random_replicates_uva_24, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_uva_rand_23 <- sapply(random_replicates_uva_23, calculate_mean_nnd)

ratio_uva_25 <- and_uva_25 / and_uva_rand_25 
mean_ratio_uva_25 <- mean(ratio_uva_25) 

options(scipen = 999)
mean_ratio_uva_25

ratio_uva_24 <- and_uva_24 / and_uva_rand_24 
mean_ratio_uva_24 <- mean(ratio_uva_24) 

ratio_uva_23 <- and_uva_23 / and_uva_rand_23 
mean_ratio_uva_23 <- mean(ratio_uva_23)

###### -------- Leiden Bioscience park ---------- #####

and_leidenbiosc_24 <- calculate_mean_nnd(Leiden_Biosc24) 

and_leidenbiosc_23 <- calculate_mean_nnd(Leiden_Biosc23)

# get the mean neighbor distance for random data

and_leidenbiosc_rand_24 <- sapply(random_replicates_leidenbiosc_24, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_leidenbiosc_rand_23 <- sapply(random_replicates_leidenbiosc_23, calculate_mean_nnd) 

# Calculate ratio of observed to expected (random) mean NND

mean_ratio_leidenbiosc_25 <- mean(ratio_leidenbiosc_25) 

ratio_leidenbiosc_24 <- and_leidenbiosc_24 / and_leidenbiosc_rand_24 

mean_ratio_leidenbiosc_24 <- mean(ratio_leidenbiosc_24) 

ratio_leidenbiosc_23 <- and_leidenbiosc_23 / and_leidenbiosc_rand_23 

mean_ratio_leidenbiosc_23 <- mean(ratio_leidenbiosc_23) 

##### -------- Leiden Binnestad ---------- ##### 

# not i cant see any data for 2023 so i run only for 2024 until i confirm it

and_leidenstad_25 <- calculate_mean_nnd(Leiden_Bin25)

and_leidenstad_24 <- calculate_mean_nnd(Leiden_Bin24) 

and_leidenstad_23 <- calculate_mean_nnd(Leiden_Bin23)

# get the mean neighbor distance for random data
and_leidenstad_rand_25 <- sapply(random_replicates_leidenstad_25, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_leidenstad_rand_24 <- sapply(random_replicates_leidenstad_24, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_leidenstad_rand_23 <- sapply(random_replicates_leidenstad_23, calculate_mean_nnd) 

# Calculate ratio of observed to expected (random) mean NND

mean_ratio_leidenstad_25 <- mean(ratio_leidenstad_25) 

ratio_leidenstad_24 <- and_leidenstad_24 / and_leidenstad_rand_24

ratio_leidenstad_23 <- and_leidenstad_23 / and_leidenstad_rand_23 

mean_ratio_leidenstad_23 <- mean(ratio_leidenstad_23) 

###### -------- Leewarden (van Hall Lerenstein) ---------- ##### 

# not i cant see any data for 2023 so i run only for 2024 until i confirm it

and_leeu_25 <- calculate_mean_nnd(Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein25)

and_leeu_24 <- calculate_mean_nnd(Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein24) 

and_leeu_23 <- calculate_mean_nnd(Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein23)

# get the mean neighbor distance for random data
and_leeu_rand_25 <- sapply(random_replicates_leeu_25, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_leeu_rand_24 <- sapply(random_replicates_leeu_24, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_leeu_rand_23 <- sapply(random_replicates_leeu_23, calculate_mean_nnd) 

# Calculate ratio of observed to expected (random) mean NND
ratio_leeu_25 <- and_leeu_25 / and_leeu_rand_25 
mean_ratio_leeu_25 <- mean(ratio_leeu_25) 

ratio_leeu_24 <- and_leeu_24 / and_leeu_rand_24 
mean_ratio_leeu_24 <- mean(ratio_leeu_24) 

ratio_leeu_23 <- and_leeu_23 / and_leeu_rand_23 
mean_ratio_leeu_23 <- mean(ratio_leeu_23) 


###### -------- HAN Arnhem ---------- ##### 

and_arn_25 <- calculate_mean_nnd(HAN_Arnhem25)
and_arn_24 <- calculate_mean_nnd(HAN_Arnhem24) 
and_arn_23 <- calculate_mean_nnd(HAN_Arnhem23)

# get the mean neighbor distance for random data

and_arn_rand_25 <- sapply(random_replicates_hanarn_25, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_arn_rand_24 <- sapply(random_replicates_hanarn_24, calculate_mean_nnd) 

and_arn_rand_23 <- sapply(random_replicates_hanarn_23, calculate_mean_nnd)

# Calculate ratio of observed to expected (random) mean NND

ratio_arn_25 <- and_arn_25 / and_arn_rand_25 
mean_ratio_arn_25 <- mean(ratio_arn_25) 

ratio_arn_24 <- and_arn_24 / and_arn_rand_24 
mean_ratio_arn_24 <- mean(ratio_arn_24) 

ratio_arn_23 <- and_arn_23 / and_arn_rand_23 
mean_ratio_arn_23 <- mean(ratio_arn_23) 

### join as a table
bias_a1_nni <- tibble(
  campus = c("USP", "UvA", "Leiden_Bioscience","Leiden_Binnenstad","Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","HAN_Arnhem"),
  "X2023" = c(mean_ratio_usp_23, mean_ratio_uva_23, mean_ratio_leidenbiosc_23,mean_ratio_leidenstad_23,mean_ratio_leeu_23,mean_ratio_arn_23),
  "X2024" = c(mean_ratio_usp_24, mean_ratio_uva_24, mean_ratio_leidenbiosc_24,mean_ratio_leidenstad_24,mean_ratio_leeu_24,mean_ratio_arn_24),
  "X2025" = c(mean_ratio_usp_25, mean_ratio_uva_25, mean_ratio_leidenbiosc_25,mean_ratio_leidenstad_25,mean_ratio_leeu_25,mean_ratio_arn_25)
)

write.csv(bias_a1_nni,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/NNI_a1.csv")

### for boxplot

bias_nni_a1_long <- bias_a1_nni %>%
  rename(
    "2023" = `X2023`,
    "2024" = `X2024`,
    "2025" = `X2025`
  )

bias_nni_a1_long <- bias_nni_a1_long %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = "2023":"2025",
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "value"
  )


write.csv(bias_nni_a1_long,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/NNI_a1_box.csv")
```

#### Spatial cluster (b)

```{r}

## Analysis 1: campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and a bioblitz in 24,25

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
nni_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2024, bias_a1_nni$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nni_2423_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2024, bias_a1_nni$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nni_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2024, bias_a1_nni$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
nni_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2025, bias_a1_nni$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nni_2523_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2025, bias_a1_nni$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nni_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2025, bias_a1_nni$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
nni_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2025, bias_a1_nni$X2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nni_2524_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2025, bias_a1_nni$X2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nni_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nni$X2025, bias_a1_nni$X2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

results_bias_nni <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(nni_2423_greater$statistic,
                nni_2423_less$statistic,
                nni_2423_twosided$statistic,nni_2523_greater$statistic,
                nni_2523_less$statistic,
                nni_2523_twosided$statistic,nni_2524_greater$statistic,
                nni_2524_less$statistic,
                nni_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(nni_2423_greater$p.value,
              nni_2423_less$p.value,
              nni_2423_twosided$p.value,nni_2523_greater$p.value,
              nni_2523_less$p.value,
              nni_2523_twosided$p.value,nni_2524_greater$p.value,
              nni_2524_less$p.value,
              nni_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(nni_2423_greater$alternative,nni_2423_less$alternative,nni_2423_twosided$alternative,nni_2523_greater$alternative,nni_2523_less$alternative,nni_2523_twosided$alternative,nni_2524_greater$alternative,nni_2524_less$alternative,nni_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(nni_2423_greater$method, nni_2423_less$method, nni_2423_twosided$method,nni_2523_greater$method, nni_2523_less$method, nni_2523_twosided$method,nni_2524_greater$method, nni_2524_less$method, nni_2524_twosided$method)
)


######### t-test: Comparing how different are the estimated spatial cluster values to 1 (random data) . p >0.05 --> not different from 1, p<0.05 --> different from 1`
nni_a1_23 <- t.test(bias_a1_nni$X2023, mu = 1)
nni_a1_24 <-t.test(bias_a1_nni$X2024, mu = 1)
nni_a1_25 <-t.test(bias_a1_nni$X2025, mu = 1)


### join as a table

results_ttest_nni <- data.frame(
  year = c("2023", "2024", "2025"),
  mean = c(nni_a1_23$estimate,
           nni_a1_24$estimate,
           nni_a1_25$estimate),
  t = c(nni_a1_23$statistic,
        nni_a1_24$statistic,
        nni_a1_25$statistic),
  p_value = c(nni_a1_23$p.value,
              nni_a1_24$p.value,
              nni_a1_25$p.value),
  conf_low = c(nni_a1_23$conf.int[1],
               nni_a1_24$conf.int[1],
               nni_a1_25$conf.int[1]),
  conf_high = c(nni_a1_23$conf.int[2],
                nni_a1_24$conf.int[2],
                nni_a1_25$conf.int[2])
)

write.csv(results_ttest_nni,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Ttest_bias_nni.csv")


```

#### Spatial cluster (extra)

```{r}

### To compare our data to the random data we can also create a map. 

# Is not practical to do for all 99 datasets so i choose just to do it for the first random generated list in the multilist 

#-------- Here i just show for USP but i can adjust for all campuses

first_random_leeu_24 <- random_replicates_leeu_24[[1]] 

first_random_leeu_23 <- random_replicates_leeu_23[[1]] # 

## since is a list i need to convert to sf object and assign crs before mapping
first_random_leeu_24_sf <- st_as_sf(first_random_leeu_24, coords = c("local.x", "local.y"), crs = 28992) 

first_random_sf_leeu_23 <- st_as_sf(first_random_leeu_23, coords = c("local.x", "local.y"), crs = 28992) 


## Bioblitz data 24
tmap_leeu_24<-tm_shape(Leeuwarden_boundaries) + 
  tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "darkblue") +
tm_shape(Leeuwarden24) +
   tm_dots(col = "red", size = 0.1) +  tm_layout(
    title = "Bioblitz 2024",
    title.position = c("left", "bottom"),
    outer.margins = c(0.05, 0, 0, 0))

  
## Random data 24
tmap_leeu_24_random<-tm_shape(Leeuwarden_boundaries) + 
  tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "darkblue")+tm_shape(first_random_leeu_24_sf) +
  tm_dots(col = "blue", size = 0.1) +
tm_layout(title = "Random 2024 (iteration 1/99)", title.position = c("center", "bottom"),
    outer.margins = c(0.05, 0, 0, 0))


## Bioblitz data
tmap_leeu_23<-tm_shape(Leeuwarden_boundaries) + 
  tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "darkblue") +
tm_shape(Leeuwarden23) + tm_dots(col = "red", size = 0.1) + tm_layout((title = "2023"), title.position = c("left", "bottom"), outer.margins = c(0.05, 0, 0, 0))

## Random data
tmap_leeu_23_random<-tm_shape(Leeuwarden_boundaries) + 
  tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "darkblue")+tm_shape(first_random_sf_leeu_23) +
  tm_dots(col = "blue", size = 0.1) +
tm_layout(title = "Random 2023: Iteration 1/99",title.position = c("right", "bottom"), outer.margins = c(0.05, 0, 0, 0)) + tm_scale_bar( position = c("right", "bottom"),text.size = 0.7) + tm_compass(type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 2)

leeu_bioblitz_random_map<-tmap_arrange(tmap_leeu_24,tmap_leeu_24_random,tmap_leeu_23,tmap_leeu_23_random)

leeu_bioblitz_random_map

tmap_save(USP_bioblitz_random_map_usp,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/4.Datasets/Bioblitz_2024/For_analysis_copy_Bioblitz_2024_ 4.2.25/July_analysis/Bias/Random/USP_23_24_map.svg")

```

#### Buildings (a)

```{r}

####---- RQ 1+2: opp 2023 Biob 24-25

## ---- USP --- ##

## clip buildings to campus boundaries
usp_build25 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_25, USP_boundaries)

usp_build24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_24, USP_boundaries)

usp_build23 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Buildings_allcampuses_23, USP_boundaries)

## 2025

### This function calculates the minimum distance from each randomly generated point to the nearest building. The mean of these minimum distances is then calculated for each of the 99 random datasets, yielding one summary value per dataset.

mean_dists_usp25_build <- lapply(seq_along(random_replicates_usp_25), function(i){
  sublist <- random_replicates_usp_25[[i]]
  res <- sapply(sublist, function(points_sf){
    d <- st_distance(points_sf, usp_build25)
    min_dists <- apply(d, 1, min)  # nearest point per point in POINT sf
    mean(as.numeric(min_dists))
  })
  message("Finished sublist ", i, " / ", length(random_replicates_usp_25))
  res
})


## Results are in a list we unlist them
mean_dists_usp25_build <- unlist(mean_dists_usp25_build)

## We then take the mean across all the 99 random datasets
mean_random_usp25_build <- mean(mean_dists_usp25_build)

# we then take the mean of the minimum distances to the nearest building for the estimated values in our datasets. These are the calculated "distance to nearest building" values, calculated in the bias section of our analysis 

mean_dist_usp25_build <- mean(USP25$distance_to_buil)

# Finally we calculate the ratio to compare how the observed values compare to the expected values. 
ratio_build_usp25 <- mean_dist_usp25_build / mean_random_usp25_build 

## 2024
mean_dists_usp24_build <- lapply(seq_along(random_replicates_usp_24), function(i){
  sublist <- random_replicates_usp_24[[i]]
  res <- sapply(sublist, function(points_sf){
    d <- st_distance(points_sf, usp_build24)
    min_dists <- apply(d, 1, min) 
    mean(as.numeric(min_dists))
  })
  message("Finished sublist ", i, " / ", length(random_replicates_usp_24))
  res
})

mean_dists_usp24_build <- unlist(mean_dists_usp24_build)
mean_random_usp24_build <- mean(mean_dists_usp24_build)
mean_dist_usp24_build <- mean(USP24$distance_to_buil)
ratio_build_usp24 <- mean_dist_usp24_build / mean_random_usp24_build 

# 2023

  sublist <- random_replicates_usp_23[[i]]
  res <- sapply(sublist, function(points_sf){
    d <- st_distance(points_sf, usp_build23)
    min_dists <- apply(d, 1, min)  
    mean(as.numeric(min_dists))
  })
  message("Finished sublist ", i, " / ", length(random_replicates_usp_23))
  res
})

mean_dists_usp23_build <- unlist(mean_dists_usp23_build)
mean_random_usp23_build <- mean(mean_dists_usp23_build)
mean_dist_usp23_build <- mean(USP23$distance_to_buil)
ratio_build_usp23 <- mean_dist_usp23_build / mean_random_usp23_build

# 2023
mean_dists_arn23_build <- lapply(seq_along(random_replicates_hanarn_23), function(i){
  sublist <- random_replicates_hanarn_23[[i]]
  res <- sapply(sublist, function(points_sf){
    d <- st_distance(points_sf, arn_build23)
    min_dists <- apply(d, 1, min)  
    mean(as.numeric(min_dists))
  })
  message("Finished sublist ", i, " / ", length(random_replicates_hanarn_23))
  res
})

mean_dists_arn23_build <- unlist(mean_dists_arn23_build)
mean_random_arn23_build <- mean(mean_dists_arn23_build)
mean_dist_arn23_build <- mean(HAN_Arnhem23$distance_to_buil)
ratio_build_arn23 <- mean_dist_arn23_build / mean_random_arn23_build 

### join as a table
bias_a1_nbi <- tibble(
  campus = c("USP", "UvA", "Leiden_Bioscience","Leiden_Binnenstad","Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","HAN_Arnhem"),
  "X2023" = c(ratio_build_usp23, ratio_build_uva23, ratio_build_leidenbiosc23,ratio_build_leidenstad23,ratio_build_leeu23,ratio_build_arn23),
  "X2024" = c(ratio_build_usp24, ratio_build_uva23, ratio_build_leidenbiosc24,ratio_build_leidenstad24,ratio_build_leeu24,ratio_build_arn24),
  "X2025" = c(ratio_build_usp25, ratio_build_uva23, ratio_build_leidenbiosc25,ratio_build_leidenstad25,ratio_build_leeu25,ratio_build_arn25)
)

write.csv(bias_a1_nbi,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/NBI_a1.csv")

### for boxplot

bias_nbi_a1_long <- bias_a1_nbi %>%
   rename(
     "2023" = `X2023`,
     "2024" = `X2024`,
     "2025" = `X2025`
   )

bias_nbi_a1_long <- bias_nbi_a1_long %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = "2023":"2025",
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "value"
  )

write.csv(bias_nbi_a1_long,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/NBI_a1_box.csv")


####---- RQ 2 only: Biob 23-25

    d <- st_distance(points_sf, wur_build24)
    min_dists <- apply(d, 1, min)  
    mean(as.numeric(min_dists))
  })

})
```

#### Buildings (b)

```{r}
## Analysis 1: campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and a bioblitz in 24,25

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
nbi_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2024, bias_a1_nbi$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nbi_2423_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2024, bias_a1_nbi$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nbi_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2024, bias_a1_nbi$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
nbi_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2025, bias_a1_nbi$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nbi_2523_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2025, bias_a1_nbi$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nbi_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2025, bias_a1_nbi$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
nbi_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2025, bias_a1_nbi$X2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nbi_2524_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2025, bias_a1_nbi$X2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nbi_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2025, bias_a1_nbi$X2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

results_bias_nbi <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(nbi_2423_greater$statistic,
                nbi_2423_less$statistic,
                nbi_2423_twosided$statistic,nbi_2523_greater$statistic,
                nbi_2523_less$statistic,
                nbi_2523_twosided$statistic,nbi_2524_greater$statistic,
                nbi_2524_less$statistic,
                nbi_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(nbi_2423_greater$p.value,
              nbi_2423_less$p.value,
              nbi_2423_twosided$p.value,nbi_2523_greater$p.value,
              nbi_2523_less$p.value,
              nbi_2523_twosided$p.value,nbi_2524_greater$p.value,
              nbi_2524_less$p.value,
              nbi_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(nbi_2423_greater$alternative,nbi_2423_less$alternative,nbi_2423_twosided$alternative,nbi_2523_greater$alternative,nbi_2523_less$alternative,nbi_2523_twosided$alternative,nbi_2524_greater$alternative,nbi_2524_less$alternative,nbi_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(nbi_2423_greater$method, nbi_2423_less$method, nbi_2423_twosided$method,nbi_2523_greater$method, nbi_2523_less$method, nbi_2523_twosided$method,nbi_2524_greater$method, nbi_2524_less$method, nbi_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_bias_nbi,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_bias_nbi.csv")


######### t-test: Comparing how different are the estimated spatial cluster values to 1 (random data) . p >0.05 --> not different from 1, p<0.05 --> different from 1`
nbi_a1_23 <- t.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2023, mu = 1)
nbi_a1_24 <-t.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2024, mu = 1)
nbi_a1_25 <-t.test(bias_a1_nbi$X2025, mu = 1)


### join as a table

results_ttest_nbi <- data.frame(
  year = c("2023", "2024", "2025"),
  mean = c(nbi_a1_23$estimate,
           nbi_a1_24$estimate,
           nbi_a1_25$estimate),
  t = c(nbi_a1_23$statistic,
        nbi_a1_24$statistic,
        nbi_a1_25$statistic),
  p_value = c(nbi_a1_23$p.value,
              nbi_a1_24$p.value,
              nbi_a1_25$p.value),
  conf_low = c(nbi_a1_23$conf.int[1],
               nbi_a1_24$conf.int[1],
               nbi_a1_25$conf.int[1]),
  conf_high = c(nbi_a1_23$conf.int[2],
                nbi_a1_24$conf.int[2],
                nbi_a1_25$conf.int[2])
)

write.csv(results_ttest_nbi,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Ttest_bias_nbi.csv")


```

#### Visualization USP only

```{r}
## use cliped roads/buildings and random data from previous steps c

# usp_build23$Buildings_2023 <- ""
# usp_lines23$Roads_paths_2023 <- ""
#random_replicates_usp_23_first_iteration$Random_data_2023 <- ""
#USP23_b$Opportunistic_data_2023 <- ""

USP_randommap_23<- tm_shape(USP_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", border.col = "white") +tm_shape(usp_build23) + tm_polygons( border.col = "lightblue") + tm_shape(usp_lines23) + tm_lines( border.col = "black") + 
  tm_shape(random_replicates_usp_23_first_iteration) + tm_dots(col = "red",size = 0.04,palette = "red") + tm_legend() +tm_layout(title = "Random 2023, n = 1790 ", title.position = c("right", "bottom"),title.size = 1,legend.outside = F) 

USP_Oppmap_23<-tm_shape(USP_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", border.col = "white") +tm_shape(usp_build23) + tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "lightblue") + tm_shape(usp_lines23) + tm_lines( col = "black",border.col = "black") + 
  tm_shape(USP23_b) + tm_dots(col = "red",size = 0.04,palette = "red") + tm_legend() +tm_layout(title = "Observations 2023, n = 1790 ", title.position = c("right", "bottom"),title.size = 1,legend.outside = F)


##### 2024

# usp_build24$Buildings_2024 <- ""
# usp_lines24$Roads_paths_2024 <- ""
# random_replicates_usp_24_first_iteration$Random_data_2024 <- ""
# USP24_b$Bioblitz_data_2024 <- ""

USP_randommap_24<- tm_shape(USP_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", border.col = "white") +tm_shape(usp_build24) + tm_polygons(border.col = "lightblue") + tm_shape(usp_lines24) + tm_lines(border.col = "black") + 
  tm_shape(random_replicates_usp_24_first_iteration) + tm_dots(col = "red",size = 0.04,palette = "red")  +tm_layout(title = "Random 2024, n = 2908 ", title.position = c("right", "bottom"),title.size = 1,legend.outside = F) 

USP_Bioblitzmap_24<-tm_shape(USP_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", border.col = "white") +tm_shape(usp_build24) + tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "lightblue") + tm_shape(usp_lines24) + tm_lines( col = "black",border.col = "black") + 
  tm_shape(USP24_b) + tm_dots(col = "red",size = 0.04,palette = "red") + tm_legend() +tm_layout(title = "Bioblitz 2024, n = 2908 ", title.position = c("right", "bottom"), title.size = 1, legend.outside = F) 

### 2025
USP_randommap_25<- tm_shape(USP_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", border.col = "white") +tm_shape(usp_build25) + tm_polygons(border.col = "lightblue") + tm_shape(usp_lines25) + tm_lines(border.col = "black") + 
  tm_shape(random_replicates_usp_25_first_iteration) + tm_dots(col = "red",size = 0.04,palette = "red")  +tm_layout(title = "Random 2025, n = 5470 ", title.position = c("right", "bottom"),title.size = 1,legend.outside = F) 


USP_Bioblitzmap_25_background <-tm_shape(USP_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", border.col = "white") +tm_shape(usp_build25) + tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "lightblue") + tm_shape(usp_lines25) + tm_lines( col = "black",border.col = "black")  + tm_scale_bar( position = c("right", "bottom"),text.size = 0.5) + tm_compass(type = "arrow",
    position = c("left", "bottom"),
    size = 1)



USP_Bioblitzmap_25<-tm_shape(USP_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", border.col = "white") +tm_shape(usp_build25) + tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "lightblue") + tm_shape(usp_lines25) + tm_lines( col = "black",border.col = "black") + 
  tm_shape(USP25_b) + tm_dots(col = "red",size = 0.04,palette = "red") + tm_legend() +tm_layout(title = "Bioblitz 2025:USP", title.position = c("right", "bottom"), title.size = 0.5, legend.outside = F) + tm_scale_bar( position = c("right", "bottom"),text.size = 0.4) + tm_compass(type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 0.5)

##### combined
USP_Bioblitzmap_23_24_25<-tm_shape(USP_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "white", border.col = "white") +tm_shape(usp_build25) + tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "lightblue") + tm_shape(usp_lines25) + tm_lines( col = "black",border.col = "black") + tm_shape(USP23_b) + tm_dots(col = "green",size = 0.04) + tm_legend() + tm_shape(USP24_b) + tm_dots(col = "blue",size = 0.04) + tm_legend() +
  tm_shape(USP25_b) + tm_dots(col = "red",size = 0.04) + tm_legend() + tm_scale_bar( position = c("right", "bottom"),text.size = 0.4) + tm_compass(type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 0.5) + tm_add_legend(
  type = "symbol",
  labels = c("2023 (Opport.)", "2024 (Bioblitz)", "2025 (Bioblitz)"),
  col = c("green", "blue", "red"),
  size = 0.8,
  title = "Year"
)

USP_Bioblitzmap_23_24_25

USP_road_build_clust_map <- tmap_arrange(USP_randommap_23,USP_randommap_24,USP_randommap_25,USP_Oppmap_23, USP_Bioblitzmap_24,USP_Bioblitzmap_25, ncol = 3)


tmap_save(USP_road_build_clust_map,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/02/pp_Greenoffice_Map1.png")


#### Land use
lgn24_raster_USP <- intersect(lgn24_raster,USP_boundaries)

tm_shape(lgn24_raster_USP) +   tm_raster(palette = "viridis", title = "Raster Values") +
  tm_layout(title = "Raster Map", legend.outside = F) 

```

```{r}






### For all campuses --- created maps per campus --- ####
buildings_filtered$builds <- "Top10NL_buildings"

#### --- Amsterdam_Science_Park --- ###
Amsterdam_Science_Park23$Opportunistic <- "2023"
Amsterdam_Science_Park24$Bioblitz <- "2024"
Amsterdam_Science_Park25$Bioblitz <- "2025"

Amsterdam_Science_Park <- tm_shape(Amsterdam_Science_Park_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "darkblue") + tm_shape(buildings_filtered) +
  tm_polygons(col = "builds", border.col = "darkblue")+
tm_shape(Amsterdam_Science_Park23) + tm_dots(col = "Opp_23", size = 0.1,palette = "red") + tm_shape(Amsterdam_Science_Park24) + tm_dots(col = "Biob_24", size = 0.1,palette = "green") + tm_shape(Amsterdam_Science_Park25) + tm_dots(col = "Biob_25", size = 0.1,palette = "black") + tm_layout(title = "Amsterdam Science Park", title.position = c("left", "top")) + tm_scale_bar( position = c("right", "bottom"),text.size = 0.7) + tm_compass(type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 2)

tmap_save(Amsterdam_Science_Park,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2025/12.2025/Analysis/Campus_maps/Amsterdam_Science_Park.svg")

#### --- Avans Breda --- ###
Avans_Breda23$Opportunistic <- "2023"
Avans_Breda24$Bioblitz <- "2024"
Avans_Breda25$Bioblitz <- "2025"

Avans_Breda <- tm_shape(Avans_Breda_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "darkblue") + tm_shape(buildings_filtered) +
  tm_polygons(col = "builds", border.col = "darkblue")+
tm_shape(Avans_Breda23) + tm_dots(col = "Opportunistic", size = 0.1,palette = "red") + tm_shape(Avans_Breda24) + tm_dots(col = "Bioblitz", size = 0.1,palette = "green") + tm_shape(Avans_Breda25) + tm_dots(col = "Bioblitz", size = 0.1,palette = "black") + tm_layout(title = "Avans Breda", title.position = c("left", "top")) + tm_scale_bar( position = c("right", "bottom"),text.size = 0.7) + tm_compass(type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 2)

tmap_save(Avans_Breda,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2025/12.2025/Analysis/Campus_maps/Avans_Breda.svg")


#### --- TU Delft --- ###

  tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "darkblue") + tm_shape(buildings_filtered) +
  tm_polygons(col = "builds", border.col = "darkblue")+
tm_shape(TUDelft23) + tm_dots(col = "Bioblitz", size = 0.1,palette = "red") + tm_shape(TUDelft24) + tm_dots(col = "Bioblitz", size = 0.1,palette = "green") + tm_layout(title = "TU Delft", title.position = c("left", "top")) + tm_scale_bar( position = c("right", "bottom"),text.size = 0.7) + tm_compass(type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 2)

tmap_save(Delft,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2025/12.2025/Analysis/Campus_maps/Delft.svg")

#### --- Eindhoven --- ###
Eindhoven24$Opport <- "2024"
Eindhoven25$Bioblitz <- "2025"

Eindhoven <- tm_shape(Eindhoven_university_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(col = "lightblue", border.col = "darkblue") + tm_shape(buildings_filtered) +
  tm_polygons(col = "builds", border.col = "darkblue")+
tm_shape(Eindhoven24) + tm_dots(col = "Opport", size = 0.1,palette = "red") + tm_shape(Eindhoven25) + tm_dots(col = "Bioblitz", size = 0.1,palette = "green") + tm_layout(title = "Eindhoven university", title.position = c("left", "top")) + tm_scale_bar( position = c("right", "bottom"),text.size = 0.7) + tm_compass(type = "arrow",
    position = c("right", "top"),
    size = 2)

tmap_save(Eindhoven,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2025/12.2025/Analysis/Campus_maps/Eindhoven.svg")

```

#### Taxonomic (a)

```{r}

### Data were retrieved on 24.1.2026. This is the final data i will use. Please note that the data keep changing in waarneming.nl (because observations are constantly under review)  

## For this analysis we only  focus on native species. Therefore, exotic ,invasive, subspecies etc are excluded from the numbers. Total numbers were extracted PER YEAR (this is key)

#### Total species per taxonomic group per year as of 24.1.26

species_waarneming_nl <- tibble(
  group = c(
    "algae_weeds_unicellular","algae_weeds_unicellular","algae_weeds_unicellular", "arthropods_other","arthropods_other","arthropods_other",
    "bees_wasps_ants","bees_wasps_ants","bees_wasps_ants",
    "beetles","beetles","beetles", 
    "birds", "birds", "birds",
   "bugs_cicadas_aphids", "bugs_cicadas_aphids", "bugs_cicadas_aphids",
   "butterflies","butterflies","butterflies",
   "dragonflies","dragonflies","dragonflies",
   "fish","fish","fish",
   "flies_mosquitoes","flies_mosquitoes","flies_mosquitoes",
   "grasshoppers_crickets","grasshoppers_crickets","grasshoppers_crickets",
   "insects_other","insects_other","insects_other",
   "mammals",   "mammals",   "mammals",
   "mollusks","mollusks","mollusks",
   "mosses_lichens","mosses_lichens","mosses_lichens",
   "moths_micros","moths_micros","moths_micros",
   "mushrooms","mushrooms","mushrooms",
    "invertebrates_other","invertebrates_other","invertebrates_other",
   "plants","plants","plants",
   "reptiles_amphibians","reptiles_amphibians","reptiles_amphibians"
  ),
  year = c(
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025,
    2023,2024,2025
    ),
  n_species = c(
    1146, 1483,1267,
    1042,1002,1062,
    1749,1818,1722,
    2433,2455,2456,
    371,376,379,
    1113,1088,1188,
    77,79,86,
    66,67,66,
    130,122,132,
    2449,2352,2460,
    43,48,46,
    341,335,356,
    75,71,75,
    463,432,448,
    1209,1228,1243,
    1958,1990,2057,
    3077,3120,3306,
    280,329,280,
    1337,1343,1347,
    24,23,24
  )
)

library(tidyr)

species_waarneming_nl_wide <- species_waarneming_nl %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = year,
    values_from = n_species
  )


write.csv(species_waarneming_nl_wide,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Tax_spec_waarn_nl.csv")


### sum total species per year in waarneming nl 
totalspecies_waarneming_nl <- species_waarneming_nl %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total_species = sum(n_species))



```

#### Taxonomic (b)

```{r}

### Produced in the taxonomic bias section
Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1


### taxonomic bias function: adjusted from troudet et al 2017
calculate_tax_bias <- function(observed_group_camp_year,
                           n_obs_camp_yr,
                           group_species_waar_nl_yr,
                           total_species_waar_nl_yr){

  observed_group_camp_year /
    (n_obs_camp_yr * group_species_waar_nl_yr / total_species_waar_nl_yr)

}

###### -----------Algae, weeds and unicellular ------ ##

## common across all campuses

algae_ref25 <- species_waarneming_nl %>%
  filter(
    group == "algae_weeds_unicellular",
    year == 2025
  )

algae_ref24 <- species_waarneming_nl %>%
  filter(
    group == "algae_weeds_unicellular",
    year == 2024
  )

algae_ref23 <- species_waarneming_nl %>%
  filter(
    group == "algae_weeds_unicellular",
    year == 2023
  )


##### ---- USP --- ####

#### 2025
## get total value of each group per campus
usp25_algae <- Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2025[
  Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$campus == "USP"
]

## calculate the bias using the function 

bias_usp25_algae <- calculate_tax_bias(
  observed_group_camp_year = usp25_algae,
  n_obs_camp_yr = nrow(USP25),
  group_species_waar_nl_yr = algae_ref25$n_species,
  total_species_waar_nl_yr = totalspecies_waarneming_nl$total_species[totalspecies_waarneming_nl$year == 2025]
)


#### 2024

usp24_algae <- Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024[
  Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$campus == "USP"
]

bias_usp24_algae <- calculate_tax_bias(
  observed_group_camp_year = usp24_algae,
  n_obs_camp_yr = nrow(USP24),
  group_species_waar_nl_yr = algae_ref24$n_species,
  total_species_waar_nl_yr = totalspecies_waarneming_nl$total_species[totalspecies_waarneming_nl$year == 2024]
)

#### 2023

usp23_algae <- Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023[
  Observations_all_clip_filtered_group_a1_wide$campus == "USP"
]

bias_usp23_algae <- calculate_tax_bias(
  observed_group_camp_year = usp23_algae,
  n_obs_camp_yr = nrow(USP23),
  group_species_waar_nl_yr = algae_ref23$n_species,

## calculate the bias using the function 

bias_usp25_rep <- calculate_tax_bias(
  observed_group_camp_year = usp25_rep,
  n_obs_camp_yr = nrow(USP25),
  group_species_waar_nl_yr = rep_ref25$n_species,
  total_species_waar_nl_yr = totalspecies_waarneming_nl$total_species[totalspecies_waarneming_nl$year == 2025]
)

####Join results in a table

tax_bias_results_a1 <- tibble(
  campus = c("USP", "Amsterdam_Science_Park", "HAN_arnhem","Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","Leiden_Binnenstad","Leiden_Bioscience_Park"),
  
  algae_2023 = c(
    bias_usp23_algae,bias_uva23_algae,bias_hanarn23_algae,bias_leeu23_algae,bias_leibin23_algae,bias_leibios23_algae),
  
  algae_2024 = c(
    bias_usp24_algae,bias_uva24_algae,bias_hanarn24_algae,bias_leeu24_algae,bias_leibin24_algae,bias_leibios24_algae),
  
  algae_2025 = c(
    bias_usp25_algae,bias_uva25_algae,bias_hanarn25_algae,bias_leeu25_algae,bias_leibin25_algae,bias_leibios25_algae),
  
  arthropods_other_2023 = c( bias_usp23_arthoth,bias_uva23_arthoth,bias_hanarn23_arthoth,bias_leeu23_arthoth,bias_leibin23_arthoth,bias_leibios23_arthoth),
  
  arthropods_other_2024 = c(bias_usp24_arthoth,bias_uva24_arthoth,bias_hanarn24_arthoth,bias_leeu24_arthoth,bias_leibin24_arthoth,bias_leibios24_arthoth),

  bees_wasps_ants_2024 = c(bias_usp24_bwa,bias_uva24_bwa,bias_hanarn24_bwa,bias_leeu24_bwa,bias_leibin24_bwa,bias_leibios24_bwa),

write.csv(tax_bias_results_a1 ,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Bias_taxonomic_a1.csv")

## for boxplot

tax_bias_results_a1_long <- tax_bias_results_a1 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -campus,
    names_to = c("group", "year"),
    names_pattern = "(.+)_(\\d{4})",
    values_to = "value"
  )

write.csv(tax_bias_results_a1_long ,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Bias_taxonomic_a1_box.csv")

#### rq2 only bioblitz 23-25


###### -----------Algae, weeds and unicellular ------ ##

### all observations are 0 --> bias = 0 --> exclude 


###### -----------arthropods_other------ ##

## common across all campuses

##### ---- WUR_main_campus --- ####

#### 2024

wur24_arthoth <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2_wide$Arthropods_other[
  Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2_wide$campus == "WUR_main_campus"
]

bias_wur24_arthoth <- calculate_tax_bias(
  observed_group_camp_year = wur24_arthoth,
  n_obs_camp_yr = nrow(WUR_main_campus24),

#### 2024

gro24_rep <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2_wide$Reptiles_amphibians[
  Observations_2024_clip_filtered_group_a2_wide$campus == "Groningen_Zernike"
]

bias_gro24_rep <- calculate_tax_bias(
  observed_group_camp_year = gro24_rep,
  n_obs_camp_yr = nrow(Groningen_Zernike_campus24),
  group_species_waar_nl_yr = rep_ref24$n_species,
  total_species_waar_nl_yr = totalspecies_waarneming_nl$total_species[totalspecies_waarneming_nl$year == 2024]
)

####Join results in a table

tax_bias_results_a2 <- tibble(
  campus = c("WUR_main_campus", "Delft_TU_Campus", "Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein","UT_campus","Nijmegen_campus","Groningen_Zernike"),
   
   arthropods_other_2024 = c(bias_wur24_arthoth,bias_del24_arthoth,bias_vel24_arthoth,bias_ut24_arthoth,bias_nij24_arthoth,bias_gro24_arthoth),
 
  bees_wasps_ants_2024 = c(bias_wur24_bwa,bias_del24_bwa,bias_vel24_bwa,bias_ut24_bwa,bias_nij24_bwa,bias_gro24_bwa),
  
  beetles_2024 = c(bias_wur24_beet,bias_del24_beet,bias_vel24_beet,bias_ut24_beet,bias_nij24_beet,bias_gro24_beet),
  
  birds_2024 = c(bias_wur24_bir,bias_del24_bir,bias_vel24_bir,bias_ut24_bir,bias_nij24_bir,bias_gro24_bir),
 
  bugs_cicadas_aphids_2024 = c(bias_wur24_bca,bias_del24_bca,bias_vel24_bca,bias_ut24_bca,bias_nij24_bca,bias_gro24_bca),
  
  butterflies_2024 = c(bias_wur24_but,bias_del24_but,bias_vel24_but,bias_ut24_but,bias_nij24_but,bias_gro24_but),
  
  dragonflies_2024 = c(bias_wur24_dra,bias_del24_dra,bias_vel24_dra,bias_ut24_dra,bias_nij24_dra,bias_gro24_dra),
  
  fish_2024 = c(bias_wur24_fis,bias_del24_fis,bias_vel24_fis,bias_ut24_fis,bias_nij24_fis,bias_gro24_fis),
  
  flies_mosquitoes_2024 = c(bias_wur24_fli,bias_del24_fli,bias_vel24_fli,bias_ut24_fli,bias_nij24_fli,bias_gro24_fli),
  
  grasshoppers_crickets_2024 = c(bias_wur24_gra,bias_del24_gra,bias_vel24_gra,bias_ut24_gra,bias_nij24_gra,bias_gro24_gra),
  
   insects_other_2024 = c(bias_wur24_ins,bias_del24_ins,bias_vel24_ins,bias_ut24_ins,bias_nij24_ins,bias_gro24_ins),
  
  mammals_2024 = c(bias_wur24_mam,bias_del24_mam,bias_vel24_mam,bias_ut24_mam,bias_nij24_mam,bias_gro24_mam),
  
  mollusks_2024 = c(bias_wur24_mol,bias_del24_mol,bias_vel24_mol,bias_ut24_mol,bias_nij24_mol,bias_gro24_mol),
  
  mosses_lichens_2024 = c(bias_wur24_mos,bias_del24_mos,bias_vel24_mos,bias_ut24_mos,bias_nij24_mos,bias_gro24_mos),
  
  moths_micros_2024 = c(bias_wur24_mot,bias_del24_mot,bias_vel24_mot,bias_ut24_mot,bias_nij24_mot,bias_gro24_mot),
  
  mushrooms_2024 = c(bias_wur24_mus,bias_del24_mus,bias_vel24_mus,bias_ut24_mus,bias_nij24_mus,bias_gro24_mus),
  
  invertebrates_other_2024 = c(bias_wur24_inv,bias_del24_inv,bias_vel24_inv,bias_ut24_inv,bias_nij24_inv,bias_gro24_inv),
  
  plants_2024 = c(bias_wur24_pla,bias_del24_pla,bias_vel24_pla,bias_ut24_pla,bias_nij24_pla,bias_gro24_pla),
  
  reptiles_amphibians_2024 = c(bias_wur24_rep,bias_del24_rep,bias_vel24_rep,bias_ut24_rep,bias_nij24_rep,bias_gro24_rep)
  )


write.csv(tax_bias_results_a2 ,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Bias_taxonomic_a2.csv")
```

#### Taxonomic (c)

```{r}

##### Use this: tax_bias_results_a1 


######## ------  Algae_weeds_unicellular ------ ########

## excluded 0 values !


######## ------ Bees_wasps_ants ------ ########

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
bias_bwa_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_bwa_2423_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_bwa_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
bias_bwa_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_bwa_2523_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_bwa_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
bias_bwa_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_bwa_2524_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_bwa_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


results_bwa_bias <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(bias_bwa_2423_greater$statistic,
                bias_bwa_2423_less$statistic,
                bias_bwa_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_bwa_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_bwa_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_bwa_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_bwa_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_bwa_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_bwa_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_bwa_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_bwa_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_bwa_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_bwa_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_bwa_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_bwa_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_bwa_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_bwa_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_bwa_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_bwa_2423_greater$alternative,bias_bwa_2423_less$alternative,bias_bwa_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_bwa_2523_greater$alternative,bias_bwa_2523_less$alternative,bias_bwa_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_bwa_2524_greater$alternative,bias_bwa_2524_less$alternative,bias_bwa_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_bwa_2423_greater$method, bias_bwa_2423_less$method, bias_bwa_2423_twosided$method,bias_bwa_2523_greater$method, bias_bwa_2523_less$method, bias_bwa_2523_twosided$method,bias_bwa_2524_greater$method, bias_bwa_2524_less$method, bias_bwa_2524_twosided$method)
)


######## ------ Butterflies ------ ########

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
bias_butt_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_butt_2423_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_butt_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
bias_butt_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_butt_2523_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_butt_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
bias_butt_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_butt_2524_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_butt_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$butterflies_2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

#merged
results_butt_bias <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(bias_butt_2423_greater$statistic,
                bias_butt_2423_less$statistic,
                bias_butt_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_butt_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_butt_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_butt_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_butt_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_butt_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_butt_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_butt_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_butt_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_butt_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_butt_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_butt_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_butt_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_butt_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_butt_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_butt_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_butt_2423_greater$alternative,bias_butt_2423_less$alternative,bias_butt_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_butt_2523_greater$alternative,bias_butt_2523_less$alternative,bias_butt_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_butt_2524_greater$alternative,bias_butt_2524_less$alternative,bias_butt_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_butt_2423_greater$method, bias_butt_2423_less$method, bias_butt_2423_twosided$method,bias_butt_2523_greater$method, bias_butt_2523_less$method, bias_butt_2523_twosided$method,bias_butt_2524_greater$method, bias_butt_2524_less$method, bias_butt_2524_twosided$method)
)


######## ------ Arthropods other ------ ########

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater

bias_arthoth_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_arthoth_2423_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_arthoth_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

#greater
bias_arthoth_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_arthoth_2523_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_arthoth_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


## 2025 ~ 2024

#greater
bias_arthoth_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_arthoth_2524_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_arthoth_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)



#merged
results_arthoth_bias <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(bias_arthoth_2423_greater$statistic,
                bias_arthoth_2423_less$statistic,
                bias_arthoth_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_arthoth_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_arthoth_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_arthoth_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_arthoth_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_arthoth_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_arthoth_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_arthoth_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_arthoth_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_arthoth_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_arthoth_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_arthoth_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_arthoth_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_arthoth_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_arthoth_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_arthoth_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_arthoth_2423_greater$alternative,bias_arthoth_2423_less$alternative,bias_arthoth_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_arthoth_2523_greater$alternative,bias_arthoth_2523_less$alternative,bias_arthoth_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_arthoth_2524_greater$alternative,bias_arthoth_2524_less$alternative,bias_arthoth_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_arthoth_2423_greater$method, bias_arthoth_2423_less$method, bias_arthoth_2423_twosided$method,bias_arthoth_2523_greater$method, bias_arthoth_2523_less$method, bias_arthoth_2523_twosided$method,bias_arthoth_2524_greater$method, bias_arthoth_2524_less$method, bias_arthoth_2524_twosided$method)
)

                bias_invoth_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_invoth_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_invoth_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_invoth_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_invoth_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_invoth_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_invoth_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_invoth_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_invoth_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_invoth_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_invoth_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_invoth_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_invoth_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_invoth_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_invoth_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_invoth_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_invoth_2423_greater$alternative,bias_invoth_2423_less$alternative,bias_invoth_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_invoth_2523_greater$alternative,bias_invoth_2523_less$alternative,bias_invoth_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_invoth_2524_greater$alternative,bias_invoth_2524_less$alternative,bias_invoth_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_invoth_2423_greater$method, bias_invoth_2423_less$method, bias_invoth_2423_twosided$method,bias_invoth_2523_greater$method, bias_invoth_2523_less$method, bias_invoth_2523_twosided$method,bias_invoth_2524_greater$method, bias_invoth_2524_less$method, bias_invoth_2524_twosided$method)
)

######## ------ Mushrooms ------ ########
# 24~23
# greater
bias_mush_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_mush_2423_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_mush_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

bias_mush_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_mush_2523_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_mush_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


## 2025 ~ 2024

bias_mush_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_mush_2524_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_mush_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$mushrooms_2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


#merged
results_mush_bias <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(bias_mush_2423_greater$statistic,
                bias_mush_2423_less$statistic,
                bias_mush_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_mush_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_mush_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_mush_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_mush_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_mush_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_mush_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_mush_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_mush_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_mush_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_mush_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_mush_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_mush_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_mush_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_mush_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_mush_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_mush_2423_greater$alternative,bias_mush_2423_less$alternative,bias_mush_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_mush_2523_greater$alternative,bias_mush_2523_less$alternative,bias_mush_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_mush_2524_greater$alternative,bias_mush_2524_less$alternative,bias_mush_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_mush_2423_greater$method, bias_mush_2423_less$method, bias_mush_2423_twosided$method,bias_mush_2523_greater$method, bias_mush_2523_less$method, bias_mush_2523_twosided$method,bias_mush_2524_greater$method, bias_mush_2524_less$method, bias_mush_2524_twosided$method)
)

#merged

  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),

)

)

######## ------ Birds ------ ########

# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater

bias_bi_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_bi_2423_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_bi_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2024, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:
bias_bi_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_bi_2523_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_bi_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024
bias_bi_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_bi_2524_less <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_bi_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2025, tax_bias_results_a1$birds_2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)


#merged
results_bi_bias <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(bias_bi_2423_greater$statistic,
                bias_bi_2423_less$statistic,
                bias_bi_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_bi_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_bi_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_bi_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_bi_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_bi_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_bi_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_bi_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_bi_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_bi_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_bi_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_bi_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_bi_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_bi_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_bi_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_bi_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_bi_2423_greater$alternative,bias_bi_2423_less$alternative,bias_bi_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_bi_2523_greater$alternative,bias_bi_2523_less$alternative,bias_bi_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_bi_2524_greater$alternative,bias_bi_2524_less$alternative,bias_bi_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_bi_2423_greater$method, bias_bi_2423_less$method, bias_bi_2423_twosided$method,bias_bi_2523_greater$method, bias_bi_2523_less$method, bias_bi_2523_twosided$method,bias_bi_2524_greater$method, bias_bi_2524_less$method, bias_bi_2524_twosided$method)
)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## less

## both

#merged

  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(bias_bu_2423_greater$statistic,
                bias_bu_2423_less$statistic,
                bias_bu_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_bu_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_bu_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_bu_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_bu_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_bu_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_bu_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_bu_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_bu_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_bu_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_bu_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_bu_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_bu_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_bu_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_bu_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_bu_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_bu_2423_greater$alternative,bias_bu_2423_less$alternative,bias_bu_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_bu_2523_greater$alternative,bias_bu_2523_less$alternative,bias_bu_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_bu_2524_greater$alternative,bias_bu_2524_less$alternative,bias_bu_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_bu_2423_greater$method, bias_bu_2423_less$method, bias_bu_2423_twosided$method,bias_bu_2523_greater$method, bias_bu_2523_less$method, bias_bu_2523_twosided$method,bias_bu_2524_greater$method, bias_bu_2524_less$method, bias_bu_2524_twosided$method)
)

## less

                bias_ma_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_ma_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_ma_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_ma_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_ma_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_ma_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_ma_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_ma_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_ma_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_ma_2523_less$p.value,

              bias_ma_2524_twosided$p.value),

)

################  --- -adjust the code below


######### t-test: Comparing how different are the estimated spatial cluster values to 1 (random data) . p >0.05 --> not different from 1, p<0.05 --> different from 1`

## arthropods other
bias_arthoth_a1_23 <- t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2023, mu = 1)
bias_arthoth_a1_24 <-t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2024, mu = 1)
bias_arthoth_a1_25 <-t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$arthropods_other_2025, mu = 1)


### join as a table

results_ttest_bias_arthoth <- data.frame(
  year = c("2023", "2024", "2025"),
  mean = c(bias_arthoth_a1_23$estimate,
           bias_arthoth_a1_24$estimate,
           bias_arthoth_a1_25$estimate),
  t = c(bias_arthoth_a1_23$statistic,
        bias_arthoth_a1_24$statistic,
        bias_arthoth_a1_25$statistic),
  p_value = c(bias_arthoth_a1_23$p.value,
              bias_arthoth_a1_24$p.value,
              bias_arthoth_a1_25$p.value),
  conf_low = c(bias_arthoth_a1_23$conf.int[1],
               bias_arthoth_a1_24$conf.int[1],
               bias_arthoth_a1_25$conf.int[1]),
  conf_high = c(bias_arthoth_a1_23$conf.int[2],
                bias_arthoth_a1_24$conf.int[2],
                bias_arthoth_a1_25$conf.int[2])
)



## bees wasps ants
bias_bwa_a1_23 <- t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2023, mu = 1)
bias_bwa_a1_24 <-t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2024, mu = 1)
bias_bwa_a1_25 <-t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$bees_wasps_ants_2025, mu = 1)


### join as a table

results_ttest_bias_bwa <- data.frame(
  year = c("2023", "2024", "2025"),
  mean = c(bias_bwa_a1_23$estimate,
           bias_bwa_a1_24$estimate,
           bias_bwa_a1_25$estimate),
  t = c(bias_bwa_a1_23$statistic,
        bias_bwa_a1_24$statistic,
        bias_bwa_a1_25$statistic),
  p_value = c(bias_bwa_a1_23$p.value,
              bias_bwa_a1_24$p.value,
              bias_bwa_a1_25$p.value),
  conf_low = c(bias_bwa_a1_23$conf.int[1],
               bias_bwa_a1_24$conf.int[1],
               bias_bwa_a1_25$conf.int[1]),
  conf_high = c(bias_bwa_a1_23$conf.int[2],
                bias_bwa_a1_24$conf.int[2],
                bias_bwa_a1_25$conf.int[2])
)

bias_beet_a1_24 <-t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$beetles_2024, mu = 1)

### fish
bias_fis_a1_23 <- t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$fish_2023, mu = 1)
bias_fis_a1_24 <-t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$fish_2024, mu = 1)
bias_fis_a1_25 <-t.test(tax_bias_results_a1$fish_2025, mu = 1)


### join as a table

results_ttest_bias_fis <- data.frame(
  year = c("2023", "2024", "2025"),
  mean = c(bias_fis_a1_23$estimate,
           bias_fis_a1_24$estimate,
           bias_fis_a1_25$estimate),
  t = c(bias_fis_a1_23$statistic,
        bias_fis_a1_24$statistic,
        bias_fis_a1_25$statistic),
  p_value = c(bias_fis_a1_23$p.value,
              bias_fis_a1_24$p.value,
              bias_fis_a1_25$p.value),
  conf_low = c(bias_fis_a1_23$conf.int[1],
               bias_fis_a1_24$conf.int[1],
               bias_fis_a1_25$conf.int[1]),
  conf_high = c(bias_fis_a1_23$conf.int[2],
                bias_fis_a1_24$conf.int[2],
                bias_fis_a1_25$conf.int[2])
)
```
