#### Taxonomic (d) -- delete??

```{r}



### Per taxonomic group 

## Algae_weeds_unicellular
names(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value)

### For each group. replace "bias" with "Bias". Add the correct letters/stars based on the refined analysis -- finish. Then repeat t test and graphs for analysis 2. Finally join all bias graphs together then RQ1 is finished. 

algen_for_graph_a1b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis1/Algen_bias.csv", sep = ";")

## letters
algen_bias_added_value_letters_a1b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(algen_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.05  
)

algen_for_graph_a1b$year <- factor(algen_for_graph_a1b$year)

g1a1b <-ggplot(algen_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias
)) + geom_boxplot(fill="grey")   +  
    xlab("") + ylab("DIS") +theme_bw()+ ggtitle("Algae_weeds_unicellular")  + geom_text(data = algen_bias_added_value_letters_a1b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "green")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Algen_wieren_en_eencelligen.png")

## stars -- no statistical increase so no stars added

g1a1bs <- ggplot(algen_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) + geom_boxplot()  + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) +  
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Algae_weeds_unicellular")  + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Algen_wieren_en_eencelligen_stars.png")

## Bijen_wespen_mieren

bijen_for_graph_a1b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis1/Bijen_bias.csv", sep = ";")


bijen_bias_added_value_letters_a1b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(bijen_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.5  
)

bijen_for_graph_a1b$year <- factor(bijen_for_graph_a1b$year)

## orange = no bias (true mean == 1), green = bias (true mean =/= 1)

g2a1b <- ggplot(bijen_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias
)) +  
    geom_boxplot(fill="grey") + 
    xlab("") + ylab("") + theme_bw()+ ggtitle("Bees_wasps_ants")  + geom_text(data = bijen_bias_added_value_letters_a1b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "green")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Bijen_wespen_mieren.png")

## stars
Bijen_added_value_brackets_a1b <- data.frame(
  group1 = c("2023"),
  group2 = c("2024"),
  label  = c("*")
)

Bijen_added_value_brackets_a1b$y <- max(bijen_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.001


g2a1bs <- ggplot(bijen_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year )) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "orange",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) +
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Bees_wasps_ants")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40)) + ggsignif::geom_signif(
    data = Bijen_added_value_brackets_a1b,
    aes(xmin = group1, xmax = group2,
        annotations = label, y_position = y
        ),inherit.aes = FALSE,
    manual = TRUE
  ) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Bijen_wespen_mieren_stars.png")



## Butterflies

dagvlinders_for_graph_a1b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis1/Dagvlinders_bias.csv", sep = ";")


dagvlinders_bias_added_value_letters_a1b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("AB","A","B"),    
  y = max(dagvlinders_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.05  
)

dagvlinders_for_graph_a1b$year <- factor(dagvlinders_for_graph_a1b$year)

g3a1b <- ggplot(dagvlinders_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias
)) + 
    geom_boxplot(fill="grey") + theme_bw()+
    xlab("") + ylab("") + ggtitle("Butterflies")  + geom_text(data = dagvlinders_bias_added_value_letters_a1b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "green")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Dagvlinders.png")

## stars
dagvlinders_added_value_brackets_a1b <- data.frame(
  group1 = c("2025"),
  group2 = c("2023"),
  label  = c("**")
)

dagvlinders_added_value_brackets_a1b$y <- max(dagvlinders_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.005

g3a1bs <- ggplot(dagvlinders_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "orange",
    "2024" = "orange",
    "2025" = "green")) +
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Butterflies")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40)) + ggsignif::geom_signif(
    data = dagvlinders_added_value_brackets_a1b,
    aes(xmin = group1, xmax = group2,
        annotations = label, y_position = y
        ),
    manual = TRUE,inherit.aes = FALSE
  )+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Dagvlinders_stars.png")

## Geleedpotigen overig

geled_overig_for_graph_a1b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis1/Geled_overig_bias.csv", sep = ";")


geled_overig_bias_added_value_letters_a1b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(geled_overig_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.05  
)

geled_overig_for_graph_a1b$year <- factor(geled_overig_for_graph_a1b$year)


g4a1b <- ggplot(geled_overig_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias
)) + 
    geom_boxplot(fill="grey") +
    xlab("") + ylab("") + theme_bw()+ggtitle("Other Arthropods")  + geom_text(data = geled_overig_bias_added_value_letters_a1b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE)+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "green")

    "2023" = "orange",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) +
    xlab("Year") + ylab("") + ggtitle("Other Arthropods")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),

## Sprinkhanen, krekels

Sprink_for_graph_a1b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis1/Sprinkhanen_krekels_bias.csv", sep = ";")

sprink_bias_added_value_letters_a1b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(Sprink_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.05  
)

Sprink_for_graph_a1b$year <- factor(Sprink_for_graph_a1b$year)

g14a1b <- ggplot(Sprink_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias
)) + 
    geom_boxplot(fill = "grey") + theme_bw() + 
    xlab("") + ylab("") + ggtitle("Grasshoppers and crickets") + geom_text(data = sprink_bias_added_value_letters_a1b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "green")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Sprinkhanen_krekels.png")

##stars

sprink_added_value_brackets_a1b <- data.frame(
  group1 = c("2025"),
  group2 = c("2024"),
  label  = c("*")
)

sprink_added_value_brackets_a1b$y <- max(Sprink_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.001


g14a1bs <- ggplot(Sprink_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year)) + 
    geom_boxplot() +  scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "orange",
    "2024" = "orange",
    "2025" = "green"))+ 
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Grasshoppers and crickets")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40)) + ggsignif::geom_signif(
    data = sprink_added_value_brackets_a1b,
    aes(xmin = group1, xmax = group2,
        annotations = label, y_position = y
        ),
    manual = TRUE, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Sprinkhanen_krekels_stars.png")

vog_bias_added_value_letters_a1b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","AB","B"),    
  y = max(vogels_for_graph_a1b$bias) * 1.05  
)

vogels_for_graph_a1b$year <- factor(vogels_for_graph_a1b$year)

g16a1b <- ggplot(vogels_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias
)) + 
    geom_boxplot(fill = "grey") + theme_bw()+
    xlab("") + ylab("DIS") + ggtitle("Birds")+  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "green") + geom_text(data = vog_bias_added_value_letters_a1b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE)


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Vogels.png")

## stars-  no added value so no stars
g16a1bs <- ggplot(vogels_for_graph_a1b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green"))+
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Birds")+  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/Vogels_stars.png")

)

)) +

    xlab("") + ylab("") + ggtitle("Flies and mosquitoes") + geom_text(data = vlieg_bias_added_value_letters_a1b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),

##stars

vlieg_added_value_brackets_a1b <- data.frame(
  group1 = "2023",
  group2 = "2024",
  label  = "*"
)

)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "orange",
    "2025" = "green"))+
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Flies and mosquitoes") + ggsignif::geom_signif(
    data = vlieg_added_value_brackets_a1b,
    aes(xmin = group1, xmax = group2,
        annotations = label, y_position = y
        ),
    manual = TRUE,
     inherit.aes = FALSE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

########## Join all plots together ##########

#letters
## put all graphs in a list to manage easier
glist_a1b_letters <- list(g1a1b,g2a1b,g3a1b,g4a1b,g5a1b,g6a1b,g7a1b,g8a1b,g9a1b,g10a1b,g11a1b,g12a1b,g13a1b,g14a1b,g15a1b,g16a1b,g17a1b,g18a1b,g19a1b,g20a1b)


## use patchwork that help tidy many graphs 
library(patchwork)
wrap_plots(glist_a1b_letters, ncol = 5)

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/03/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis1/All_taxonomic_groups.png", width = 20,
  height = 12,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300)

## stars
glist_a1b_stars<- list(g1a1bs,g2a1bs,g3a1bs,g4a1bs,g5a1bs,g6a1bs,g7a1bs,g8a1bs,g9a1bs,g10a1bs,g11a1bs,g12a1bs,g13a1bs,g14a1bs,g15a1bs,g16a1bs,g17a1bs,g18a1bs,g19a1bs,g20a1bs)


## use patchwork that help tidy many graphs 
wrap_plots(glist_a1b_stars, ncol = 5) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Taxonomic bias (Wilcoxon.test: greater) for campuses with opportunistic observations in 2023 and a Bioblitz in 2024,25"
  )

  height = 12,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300)


########### Analysis 2: campuses with a bioblitz in 2023,24,25

### Across all campuses

taxonomic_bias_23_a2 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_obs_for_boxplot_anal2_23_bias.csv", sep = ";")

taxonomic_bias_24_a2 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_obs_for_boxplot_anal2_24_bias.csv", sep = ";")

taxonomic_bias_25_a2 <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_obs_for_boxplot_anal2_25_bias.csv", sep = ";")

#### Run t-tests

#Algen_wieren_eencelligen
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Algae_weeds_unicellular_2025,mu = 1 )

#Bijen_wespen_mieren
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Bees_wasps_ants_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Bees_wasps_ants_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Bees_wasps_ants_2025,mu = 1 )

## Dagvlinders
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Butterflies_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Butterflies_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Butterflies_2025,mu = 1 )

### Geleedpotigen_overig
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Arthropods_other_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Arthropods_other_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Arthropods_other_2025,mu = 1 )

### Insecten_overig
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Insects_other_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Insects_other_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Insects_other_2025,mu = 1 )

### Kevers
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Beetles_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Beetles_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Beetles_2025,mu = 1 )

### Libellen
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Dragonflies_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Dragonflies_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Dragonflies_2025,mu = 1 )

### Mossen korstmossen
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mosses_lichens_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mosses_lichens_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mosses_lichens_2025,mu = 1 )

### Nachtvlinders micros
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Moths_micros_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Moths_micros_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Moths_micros_2025,mu = 1 )

### Overige ongewervelden
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Other_invertebrates_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Other_invertebrates_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Other_invertebrates_2025,mu = 1 )

### Paddenstoelen
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mushrooms_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mushrooms_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mushrooms_2025,mu = 1 )

### Planten
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Plants_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Plants_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Plants_2025,mu = 1 )

### Reptielen amphibieen
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Reptiles_amphibians_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Reptiles_amphibians_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Reptiles_amphibians_2025,mu = 1 )

### Sprinkhanen krekels
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Grasshoppers_crickets_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Grasshoppers_crickets_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Grasshoppers_crickets_2025,mu = 1 )

### Vissen
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Fish_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Fish_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Fish_2025,mu = 1 )

### Vliegen muggen
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Flies_mosquitoes_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Flies_mosquitoes_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Flies_mosquitoes_2025,mu = 1 )

### Vogels
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Birds_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Birds_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Birds_2025,mu = 1 )

### Wantsen cicaden plantenluizen
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Bugs_cicadas_aphids_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Bugs_cicadas_aphids_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Bugs_cicadas_aphids_2025,mu = 1 )

### Weekdieren
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Molluscs_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Molluscs_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Molluscs_2025,mu = 1 )

### Zoogdieren
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mammals_2023,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mammals_2024,mu = 1 )
t.test(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value_analysis2_bias$Mammals_2025,mu = 1 )

library(forcats) ## to use the function for reordering

# 2023 

## I want the taxonomic groups whose occurences are not statistical Deviating from Ideal sampling (true mean = 1 after running t.test) to have color x, and the others color y and explain as a legend the difference

taxonomic_bias_23_a2$Deviation_from_Ideal_sampling <- ifelse(taxonomic_bias_23_a2$group %in% c("Bees_wasps_ants","Dragonflies","Mosses_lichens","Moths_micros","Reptiles_amphibians","Fish","Mammals"),"True mean is equal to 1 (no bias)", "True mean is NOT equal to 1 (bias)")


ggplot(taxonomic_bias_23_a2, aes(
  x = fct_reorder(group, bias, .fun = max, .desc = TRUE),
  y = bias, color = Deviation_from_Ideal_sampling
)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Deviation from Ideal Sampling") +  ggtitle("Taxonomic bias: 2023")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40),
    legend.position = c(0.8, 0.8),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.1, "cm")
    ) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_bias_23.png")


taxonomic_bias_24_a2$Deviation_from_Ideal_sampling <- ifelse(taxonomic_bias_24_a2$group %in% c("Insects_other","Moths_micros","Reptiles_amphibians","Molluscs","Mammals"),"True mean is equal to 1 (no bias)", "True mean is NOT equal to 1 (bias)")

ggplot(taxonomic_bias_24_a2, aes(
  x = fct_reorder(group, bias, .fun = max, .desc = TRUE),
  y = bias, color = Deviation_from_Ideal_sampling
)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Deviation from Ideal Sampling") +  ggtitle("Taxonomic bias: 2024")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40),
    legend.position = c(0.8, 0.8),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.1, "cm")
    ) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_bias_24.png")


# 2025 
taxonomic_bias_25_a2$Deviation_from_Ideal_sampling <- ifelse(taxonomic_bias_25_a2$group %in% c("Insects_other","Moths_micros","Reptiles_amphibians","Birds","Bugs_cicadas_aphids","Mammals"),"True mean is equal to 1 (no bias)", "True mean is NOT equal to 1 (bias)")

ggplot(taxonomic_bias_25_a2, aes(
  x = fct_reorder(group, bias, .fun = max, .desc = TRUE),
  y = bias, color = Deviation_from_Ideal_sampling
)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Taxonomic group", y = "Deviation from Ideal Sampling") +  ggtitle("Taxonomic bias: 2025")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40),
    legend.position = c(0.8, 0.8),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.1, "cm")
    ) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Analysis2/Tax_bias_25.png")


### Per taxonomic group 

## Algae_weeds_unicellular
names(taxonomic_observations_for_Added_value)

### For each group. replace "bias" with "Bias". Add the correct letters/stars based on the refined analysis -- finish. Then repeat t test and graphs for analysis 2. Finally join all bias graphs together then RQ1 is finished. 

algen_for_graph_a2b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis2/Algen_bias.csv", sep = ";")

## letters
algen_bias_added_value_letters_a2b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(algen_for_graph_a2b$bias) + 1.5  
)

algen_for_graph_a2b$year <- factor(algen_for_graph_a2b$year)

g1a2b <- ggplot(algen_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) + geom_boxplot()  + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) +  
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Algae_weeds_unicellular")  + geom_text(data = algen_bias_added_value_letters_a2b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Algen_wieren_en_eencelligen.png")

## stars -- no statistical increase so no stars added

g1a2bs <- ggplot(algen_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) + geom_boxplot()  + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) +  
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Algae_weeds_unicellular")  + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Algen_wieren_en_eencelligen_stars.png")

## Bijen_wespen_mieren

bijen_for_graph_a2b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis2/Bijen_bias.csv", sep = ";")


bijen_bias_added_value_letters_a2b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(bijen_for_graph_a2b$bias) * 1.5  
)

bijen_for_graph_a2b$year <- factor(bijen_for_graph_a2b$year)

## orange = no bias (true mean == 1), green = bias (true mean =/= 1)

g2a2b <- ggplot(bijen_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) +  
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "orange",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) + 
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Bees_wasps_ants")  + geom_text(data = bijen_bias_added_value_letters_a2b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Bijen_wespen_mieren.png")

## stars-- no add value

g2a2bs <- ggplot(bijen_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year )) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "orange",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) +
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Bees_wasps_ants")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40)) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Bijen_wespen_mieren_stars.png")



## Butterflies

dagvlinders_for_graph_a2b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis2/Dagvlinders_bias.csv", sep = ";")


dagvlinders_bias_added_value_letters_a2b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","B","AB"),    
  y = max(dagvlinders_for_graph_a2b$bias) * 1.5  
)

dagvlinders_for_graph_a2b$year <- factor(dagvlinders_for_graph_a2b$year)

g3a2b <- ggplot(dagvlinders_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill =year
)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) +
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Butterflies")  + geom_text(data = dagvlinders_bias_added_value_letters_a2b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE) + geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Dagvlinders.png")

## stars
dagvlinders_added_value_brackets_a2b <- data.frame(
  group1 = c("2024"),
  group2 = c("2023"),
  label  = c("*")
)

dagvlinders_added_value_brackets_a2b$y <- max(dagvlinders_for_graph_a2b$bias) * 1.005

g3a2bs <- ggplot(dagvlinders_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green")) +
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Butterflies")  + theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 40, r = 40, b = 40, l = 40)) + ggsignif::geom_signif(
    data = dagvlinders_added_value_brackets_a2b,
    aes(xmin = group1, xmax = group2,
        annotations = label, y_position = y
        ),
    manual = TRUE,inherit.aes = FALSE
  )+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Dagvlinders_stars.png")

g11a2bs <-  ggplot(paden_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green"))+ 
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Mushrooms") +geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black") 

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Mushrooms_stars.png")


## Planten

planten_for_graph_a2b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis2/Planten_bias.csv", sep = ";")


planten_bias_added_value_letters_a2b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","A","A"),    
  y = max(planten_for_graph_a2b$bias) * 1.5  
)

planten_for_graph_a2b$year <- factor(planten_for_graph_a2b$year)

g12a2b <- ggplot(planten_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "green",
    "2025" = "green"))+ 
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Plants")+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")  + geom_text(data = planten_bias_added_value_letters_a2b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE)

)) +

    "2025" = "green"))+ 
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Plants")+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")

## Weekdieren

week_for_graph_a2b <- read.csv("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/csv_files/Analysis2/Weekdieren_bias.csv", sep = ";")

week_bias_added_value_letters_a2b <- data.frame(
  years = c("2023","2024","2025"),        
  added_value = c("A","B","AB"),    
  y = max(week_for_graph_a2b$bias) * 1.5  
)

week_for_graph_a2b$year <- factor(week_for_graph_a2b$year)

g18a2b <- ggplot(week_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "orange",
    "2025" = "green"))+
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Molluscs") +  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black")+ geom_text(data = week_bias_added_value_letters_a2b,
              aes(x = years, y = y, label = added_value),
              inherit.aes = FALSE)


ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Weekdieren.png")


# stars
week_added_value_brackets_a2b <- data.frame(
  group1 = c("2024"),
  group2 = c("2023"),
  label  = c("*")
)

week_added_value_brackets_a2b$y <- max(week_for_graph_a2b$bias) * 1.005


g18a2bs <- ggplot(week_for_graph_a2b, aes(x=year, y=bias, fill = year
)) + 
    geom_boxplot() + scale_fill_manual(values =  c(
    "2023" = "green",
    "2024" = "orange",
    "2025" = "green"))+
    xlab("Year") + ylab("Deviation from Ideal Sampling") + ggtitle("Molluscs") +  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "black") +  ggsignif::geom_signif(
    data = week_added_value_brackets_a2b,
    aes(xmin = group1, xmax = group2,
        annotations = label, y_position = y
        ),
    manual = TRUE,inherit.aes = FALSE
  )

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/Weekdieren_stars.png")

########## Join all plots together ##########

#letters
## put all graphs in a list to manage easier

(g1a1b + g2a1b + g3a1b + g4a1b + g4a1b+g5a1b+g6a1b+g7a1b + g8a1b + g9a1b + g10a1b + g11a1b+g12a1b+g13a1b+ g14a1b + g15a1b+g16a1b+g17a1b+ g18a1b + g19a1b+g20a1b) + plot_layout(ncol = 5,guides = "collect") 



## use patchwork that help tidy many graphs 
library(patchwork)
wrap_plots(glist_a2b_letters, ncol = 5) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Taxonomic bias (Wilcoxon.test: two-sided) for campuses with a Bioblitz in 2023,24,25"
  ) & labs(left = "Deviation from Ideal Sampling", bottom = "Year" )

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/All_taxonomic_groups.png", width = 20,
  height = 12,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300)

## stars
glist_a2b_stars<- list(g1a2bs,g2a2bs,g3a2bs,g4a2bs,g5a2bs,g6a2bs,g7a2bs,g8a2bs,g9a2bs,g10a2bs,g11a2bs,g12a2bs,g13a2bs,g14a2bs,g15a2bs,g16a2bs,g17a2bs,g18a2bs,g19a2bs,g20a2bs)


## use patchwork that help tidy many graphs 
wrap_plots(glist_a2b_stars, ncol = 5) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Taxonomic bias (Wilcoxon.test: greater) for campuses with a Bioblitz in 2023,24,25"
  ) 

ggsave("C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/1.Weekly_meetings/2026/01/Analysis/RQ1/Taxonomic/Appendix/Bias/graphs/Analysis2/All_taxonomic_groups_stars.png", width = 20,
  height = 12,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300)


########### For green office pp #########

install.packages("treemap")
library(treemap)

colors <- c(
  "Planten" = "#000000",
  "Vogels" = "#0000FF",
  "Bijen, wespen en mieren" = "#006400",
  "Dagvlinders" = "#FFA500",
  "Geleedpotigen (overig)" = "#FFFFFF",
  "Insecten (overig)" = "#808080",
  "Kevers" = "#8B4513",
  "Libellen" = "#FFC0CB",
  "Nachtvlinders en micro's" = "#800080",
  "Mossen en korstmossen" = "#ADD8E6",
  "Paddenstoelen" = "#90EE90",
  "Reptielen en amfibieën" = "#8B0000",
  "Sprinkhanen en krekels" = "#FFFF00",
  "Vliegen en muggen" = "#FFFFE0"
)

USP23_b_tax <- USP23_b %>%
  group_by(species.group) %>%
  summarise(total = n())

USP23_b_tax <- st_drop_geometry(USP23_b_tax)

USP23_b_tax$color <- colors[USP23_b_tax$species.group]

USP23_b_tax_tree <- treemap(USP23_b_tax,
            index="species.group",
            vSize="total",
             vColor = "color",
            type="index",
         palette = colors, title = "2023")

USP24_b_tax <- USP24_b %>%
  group_by(species.group) %>%
  summarise(total = n())

USP24_b_tax <- st_drop_geometry(USP24_b_tax)

USP24_b_tax_tree <- treemap(USP24_b_tax,
            index="species.group",
            vSize="total",
             vColor = "species.group",
            type="index",
         palette = colors, title = "2024")

USP25_b_tax <- USP25_b %>%
  group_by(species.group) %>%
  summarise(total = n())

USP25_b_tax <- st_drop_geometry(USP25_b_tax)

USP25_b_tax_tree <- treemap(USP25_b_tax,
            index="species.group",
            vSize="total",
             vColor = "species.group",
            type="categorical",
         palette = colors, title = "2025")

```

#### Roads/paths (a)

```{r}

## Clip the lines for each campus 
##### From here starts the separate code for each campus #####

## RQ1&2: Opp 2023 Biob 24-25

## ---- USP --- ##

## clip roads to campus boundaries
usp_lines25 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses25, USP_boundaries)

usp_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, USP_boundaries)

usp_lines23 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses23, USP_boundaries)

### Han Arnhem
arn_lines25 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses25, HAN_Arnhem_boundaries)

arn_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, HAN_Arnhem_boundaries)

arn_lines23 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses23, HAN_Arnhem_boundaries)

## Leiden Bioscience Park
leibios_lines25 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses25, Leiden_Bioscience_Park_boundaries)

leibios_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, Leiden_Bioscience_Park_boundaries)

leibios_lines23 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses23, Leiden_Bioscience_Park_boundaries)

## Leiden Binnenstad
leibin_lines25 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses25, Leiden_Binnenstad_boundaries)

leibin_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, Leiden_Binnenstad_boundaries)

leibin_lines23 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses23, Leiden_Binnenstad_boundaries)

## Leeuwarden
leeu_lines25 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses25, Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein_boundaries)

leeu_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein_boundaries)

leeu_lines23 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses23, Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein_boundaries)

## Uva
uva_lines25 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses25, Amsterdam_Science_Park_boundaries)

uva_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, Amsterdam_Science_Park_boundaries)

uva_lines23 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses23, Amsterdam_Science_Park_boundaries)

##-- Biob 23-25 --##

## Velp 
velp_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein_boundaries)

## Groningen
gro_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, Groningen_Zernike_campus_boundaries)

## Nijmegen campus
ruhan_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, Nijmegen_campus_boundaries)

## TUDelft
del_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, TUDelft_boundaries)

## Twente
twe_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, Twente_university_campus_boundaries)

## WUR main 
wur_lines24 <- st_intersection(Top10NL_Roadspaths_all_campuses24, WUR_main_campus_boundaries)
```

#### Roads/paths (b)

```{r}


## USP

## 2025
mean_dists_usp25r <- lapply(seq_along(random_replicates_usp_25), function(i){
  sublist <- random_replicates_usp_25[[i]]
  res <- sapply(sublist, function(points_sf){
    d <- st_distance(points_sf, usp_lines25)
    min_dists <- apply(d, 1, min) 
    mean(as.numeric(min_dists))
  })
  message("Finished sublist ", i, " / ", length(random_replicates_usp_25))
  res
})

mean_dists_usp25r <- unlist(mean_dists_usp25r)
mean_random_usp25r <- mean(mean_dists_usp25r)
mean_dist_usp25r <- mean(USP25$distance_to_road)
ratio_ropa_usp25r <- mean_dist_usp25r / mean_random_usp25r

## 2024
mean_dists_usp24r <- lapply(seq_along(random_replicates_usp_24), function(i){
  sublist <- random_replicates_usp_24[[i]]
  res <- sapply(sublist, function(points_sf){
    d <- st_distance(points_sf, usp_lines24)
    min_dists <- apply(d, 1, min)  
    mean(as.numeric(min_dists))
  })
  message("Finished sublist ", i, " / ", length(random_replicates_usp_24))
  res
})

### join as a table
bias_a1_nri <- tibble(
  campus = c("USP", "UvA", "Leiden_Bioscience","Leiden_Binnenstad","Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein","HAN_Arnhem"),
  "X2023" = c(ratio_ropa_usp23r, ratio_ropa_uva23r, ratio_ropa_leibios23r,ratio_ropa_leibin23r,ratio_ropa_leeu23r,ratio_ropa_arn23r),
  "X2024" = c(ratio_ropa_usp24r, ratio_ropa_uva24r, ratio_ropa_leibios24r,ratio_ropa_leibin24r,ratio_ropa_leeu24r,ratio_ropa_arn24r),
  "X2025" = c(ratio_ropa_usp25r, ratio_ropa_uva25r, ratio_ropa_leibios25r,ratio_ropa_leibin25r,ratio_ropa_leeu25r,ratio_ropa_arn25r)
)

write.csv(bias_a1_nri,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/NRI_a1.csv")

### for boxplot

bias_nri_a1_long <- bias_a1_nri %>%
    rename(
      "2023" = `X2023`,
      "2024" = `X2024`,
      "2025" = `X2025`
    )

bias_nri_a1_long <- bias_nri_a1_long %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = "2023":"2025",
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "value"
  )
write.csv(bias_nri_a1_long,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/NRI_a1_box.csv")

## TUDelft

## 2024
mean_dists_del24r <- lapply(seq_along(random_replicates_delft_24), function(i){
  sublist <- random_replicates_delft_24[[i]]
  res <- sapply(sublist, function(points_sf){
    d <- st_distance(points_sf, del_lines24)
    min_dists <- apply(d, 1, min)  
    mean(as.numeric(min_dists))
  })
  message("Finished sublist ", i, " / ", length(random_replicates_delft_24))
  res
})

mean_dists_del24r <- unlist(mean_dists_del24r)
mean_random_del24r <- mean(mean_dists_del24r)
mean_dist_del24r <- mean(TUDelft24$distance_to_road)
ratio_ropa_del24r <- mean_dist_del24r / mean_random_del24r 


#####
### join as a table
bias_a2_nri <- tibble(
  dataset = c("WUR", "Nijmegen_campus", "TU_Delft","Twente","Groningen_Zernike_campus","Velp_Van_Hall_Larenstein"),
    "X2024" = c(ratio_ropa_wur24r, ratio_ropa_ruhan24r, ratio_ropa_del24r,ratio_ropa_twe24r,ratio_ropa_gro24r,ratio_ropa_velp24r),
  
)

write.csv(bias_a2_nri,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/NRI_a2.csv")


```

#### Roads/paths (c)

```{r}


# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
nri_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2024, bias_a1_nri$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nri_2423_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2024, bias_a1_nri$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nri_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2024, bias_a1_nri$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
nri_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2025, bias_a1_nri$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nri_2523_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2025, bias_a1_nri$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nri_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2025, bias_a1_nri$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
nri_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2025, bias_a1_nri$X2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
nri_2524_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2025, bias_a1_nri$X2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
nri_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_nri$X2025, bias_a1_nri$X2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

results_bias_nri <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(nri_2423_greater$statistic,
                nri_2423_less$statistic,
                nri_2423_twosided$statistic,nri_2523_greater$statistic,
                nri_2523_less$statistic,
                nri_2523_twosided$statistic,nri_2524_greater$statistic,
                nri_2524_less$statistic,
                nri_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(nri_2423_greater$p.value,
              nri_2423_less$p.value,
              nri_2423_twosided$p.value,nri_2523_greater$p.value,
              nri_2523_less$p.value,
              nri_2523_twosided$p.value,nri_2524_greater$p.value,
              nri_2524_less$p.value,
              nri_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(nri_2423_greater$alternative,nri_2423_less$alternative,nri_2423_twosided$alternative,nri_2523_greater$alternative,nri_2523_less$alternative,bias_nri_2523_twosided$alternative,nri_2524_greater$alternative,nri_2524_less$alternative,nri_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(nri_2423_greater$method, nri_2423_less$method, nri_2423_twosided$method,nri_2523_greater$method, nri_2523_less$method, nri_2523_twosided$method,nri_2524_greater$method, nri_2524_less$method, nri_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_bias_nri,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_bias_nri.csv")


######### t-test: Comparing how different are the estimated spatial cluster values to 1 (random data) . p >0.05 --> not different from 1, p<0.05 --> different from 1`
nri_a1_23 <- t.test(bias_a1_nri$X2023, mu = 1)
nri_a1_24 <-t.test(bias_a1_nri$X2024, mu = 1)
nri_a1_25 <-t.test(bias_a1_nri$X2025, mu = 1)


### join as a table

results_ttest_nri <- data.frame(
  year = c("2023", "2024", "2025"),
  mean = c(nri_a1_23$estimate,
           nri_a1_24$estimate,
           nri_a1_25$estimate),
  t = c(nri_a1_23$statistic,
        nri_a1_24$statistic,
        nri_a1_25$statistic),
  p_value = c(nri_a1_23$p.value,
              nri_a1_24$p.value,
              nri_a1_25$p.value),
  conf_low = c(nri_a1_23$conf.int[1],
               nri_a1_24$conf.int[1],
               nri_a1_25$conf.int[1]),
  conf_high = c(nri_a1_23$conf.int[2],
                nri_a1_24$conf.int[2],
                nri_a1_25$conf.int[2])
)

write.csv(results_ttest_nri,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/Ttest_bias_ni.csv")


```

#### Land use (b)

```{r}
##7.7 Run function: then replicate for observer

######## Methodology
## 1. Count what is the % of each land use area within each campus and for each year
 
# 2. Then we need to assign this number as the expected number of observations so land use area% X total observations = expected observations per land use. 

# We need to group the table as "land use, %, total observations, expected observations"

# 3. Then we estimate the modified hoover index for each campus and year 

# 4. We also estimate confidence intervals. 

# Everything is according to backstrom 2025 methodology (journal p 77)

## Note for both 2023 and 2024 i use land use data for 2024. If necessary i will extract also for 2023 but note that for now is not a priority. 

######### Challenges: 

#The estimated confidence values are extremely large: (i would expect only decimal difference based on backstrom). Upper 97.5% is frequently >> 1 

## rq1, 2 opp 23 biob 24-25

# The function is used to estimate hoover for a lot of random datasets to use as the confidence ranges (see code below)

## function for all years common for all campuses
Hoover_original_function_landuse <- function(obs_counts, expected_counts) {
  expected_scaled <- expected_counts * (sum(obs_counts) / sum(expected_counts)) ### i had to scale because of much larger than 1 ratio result 
  sum(abs(obs_counts - expected_scaled)) / (2 * sum(obs_counts))
}


## bootstrap function

bootstrap_hoover <- function(obs_data, expected_landuse){

  # Bootstrap the original observations
  boot <- obs_data[sample(nrow(obs_data), replace = TRUE), ]

  # Count observations per land-use class
  boot_counts <- boot %>%
    group_by(landuse_value2) %>%
    summarise(total_observations = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    rename(landuse_values = landuse_value2)

  # Join with expected land-use table
  merged <- left_join(expected_landuse, boot_counts,
                      by = "landuse_values")

  # Categories absent in the bootstrap sample get zero observations
  merged$total_observations[is.na(merged$total_observations)] <- 0

  # Expected counts
  merged <- merged %>%
    mutate(expected_obs = perc_area *
             sum(total_observations) / 100)

  # Hoover index
  Hoover_original_function_landuse(
    merged$total_observations,
    merged$expected_obs
  )
}


####### USP ##########

## 2025 

dist_comb_usp25 <-subset(Observations_2025_clip_lu, campus == "USP")
dist_comb_usp25_counts <- dist_comb_usp25 %>% 
  group_by(landuse_value2) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

dist_comb_usp25_counts <- st_drop_geometry(dist_comb_usp25_counts)

dist_comb_usp25_counts <- dist_comb_usp25_counts %>%
  rename(landuse_values = landuse_value2)

usp25_merged <- left_join(dist_comb_usp25_counts,USP_landuse, by = "landuse_values" )


## 2024 
dist_comb_usp24 <-subset(Observations_2024_clip_lu, campus == "USP")
dist_comb_usp24_counts <- dist_comb_usp24 %>% 
  group_by(landuse_value2) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

dist_comb_usp24_counts <- st_drop_geometry(dist_comb_usp24_counts)

dist_comb_usp24_counts <- dist_comb_usp24_counts %>%
  rename(landuse_values = landuse_value2)

usp24_merged <- left_join(dist_comb_usp24_counts,USP_landuse, by = "landuse_values" )

### 2023 ---
dist_comb_usp23 <-subset(Observations_2023_clip_lu, campus == "USP")
dist_comb_usp23_counts <- dist_comb_usp23 %>% 
  group_by(landuse_value2) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

dist_comb_usp23_counts <- st_drop_geometry(dist_comb_usp23_counts)

dist_comb_usp23_counts <- dist_comb_usp23_counts %>%
  rename(landuse_values = landuse_value2)

usp23_merged <- left_join(dist_comb_usp23_counts,USP_landuse, by = "landuse_values" )

###### Estimate expected observations estimation = total observations X % area cover 

### i can use the n_obs_campus_year from the data preparation code

## note: i deleted n_obs_... to save space . so i replace with the total observations visually what is best?

## 2025
usp25_obs_land_exp <- usp25_merged %>%
  mutate(expected_obs = perc_area*sum(total_observations)/100)

## 2024
usp24_obs_land_exp <- usp24_merged %>%
  mutate(expected_obs = perc_area*sum(total_observations)/100)

# 2023
usp23_obs_land_exp <- usp23_merged %>%
  mutate(expected_obs = perc_area*sum(total_observations)/100)


#  Calculate Modified Hoover Index (H')

# 2025
Hoover_usp25_landuse <- sum(abs(usp25_obs_land_exp$total_observations - usp25_obs_land_exp$expected_obs)) / 
      (2 * sum(usp25_obs_land_exp$total_observations))


# 2024
Hoover_usp24_landuse <- sum(abs(usp24_obs_land_exp$total_observations - usp24_obs_land_exp$expected_obs)) / 
      (2 * sum(usp24_obs_land_exp$total_observations))

# 2023
Hoover_usp23_landuse <- sum(abs(usp23_obs_land_exp$total_observations - usp23_obs_land_exp$expected_obs)) / 
      (2 * sum(usp23_obs_land_exp$total_observations))


### Bootstrap

#2025
set.seed(123)

Hoover_usp25_boot <- replicate(
  1000,
  bootstrap_hoover(
    dist_comb_usp25,
    USP_landuse
  )
)

summary(Hoover_usp25_boot)

Hoover_usp25_boot<-quantile(Hoover_usp25_boot,
         c(0.025,0.975))

#2024
set.seed(123)

Hoover_usp24_boot <- replicate(
  1000,
  bootstrap_hoover(
    dist_comb_usp24,
    USP_landuse
  )
)

summary(Hoover_usp24_boot)

Hoover_usp24_boot<-quantile(Hoover_usp24_boot,
         c(0.025,0.975))

#2023
set.seed(123)

Hoover_usp23_boot <- replicate(
  1000,
  bootstrap_hoover(
    dist_comb_usp23,
    USP_landuse
  )
)

summary(Hoover_usp23_boot)

Hoover_usp23_boot<-quantile(Hoover_usp23_boot,
         c(0.025,0.975))

dist_comb_leibios25_counts <- dist_comb_leibios25 %>% 
  group_by(landuse_value2) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

dist_comb_leibios25_counts <- st_drop_geometry(dist_comb_leibios25_counts)
dist_comb_leibios25_counts <- dist_comb_leibios25_counts %>%
  rename(landuse_values = landuse_value2)

leibios25_merged <- left_join(dist_comb_leibios25_counts,Leiden_bioscpark_landuse, by = "landuse_values" )


## 2024 
dist_comb_leibios24 <-subset(Observations_2024_clip_lu, campus == "Leiden_Bioscience_Park")
dist_comb_leibios24_counts <- dist_comb_leibios24 %>% 
  group_by(landuse_value2) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

dist_comb_leibios24_counts <- st_drop_geometry(dist_comb_leibios24_counts)
dist_comb_leibios24_counts <- dist_comb_leibios24_counts %>%
  rename(landuse_values = landuse_value2)

leibios24_merged <- left_join(dist_comb_leibios24_counts,Leiden_bioscpark_landuse, by = "landuse_values" )

### 2023 ---
dist_comb_leibios23 <-subset(Observations_2023_clip_lu, campus == "Leiden_Bioscience_Park")
dist_comb_leibios23_counts <- dist_comb_leibios23 %>% 
  group_by(landuse_value2) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

dist_comb_leibios23_counts <- st_drop_geometry(dist_comb_leibios23_counts)
dist_comb_leibios23_counts <- dist_comb_leibios23_counts %>%
  rename(landuse_values = landuse_value2)

leibios23_merged <- left_join(dist_comb_leibios23_counts,Leiden_bioscpark_landuse, by = "landuse_values" )

## 2025
leibios25_obs_land_exp <- leibios25_merged %>%
  mutate(expected_obs = perc_area*sum(total_observations)/100)

## 2024
leibios24_obs_land_exp <- leibios24_merged %>%
  mutate(expected_obs = perc_area*sum(total_observations)/100)

# 2023
leibios23_obs_land_exp <- leibios23_merged %>%
  mutate(expected_obs = perc_area*sum(total_observations)/100)


#  Calculate Modified Hoover Index (H')

# 2025
Hoover_leibios25_landuse <- sum(abs(leibios25_obs_land_exp$total_observations - leibios25_obs_land_exp$expected_obs)) / 
      (2 * sum(leibios25_obs_land_exp$total_observations))

# 2024
Hoover_leibios24_landuse <- sum(abs(leibios24_obs_land_exp$total_observations - leibios24_obs_land_exp$expected_obs)) / 
      (2 * sum(leibios24_obs_land_exp$total_observations))

# 2023

Hoover_leibios23_landuse <- sum(abs(leibios23_obs_land_exp$total_observations -leibios23_obs_land_exp$expected_obs)) / 
      (2 * sum(leibios23_obs_land_exp$total_observations))

### Bootstrap

#2025
set.seed(123)

Hoover_leibios25_boot <- replicate(
  1000,
  bootstrap_hoover(
    dist_comb_leibios25,
    Leiden_bioscpark_landuse
  )
)

summary(Hoover_leibios25_boot)

Hoover_leibios25_boot<-quantile(Hoover_leibios25_boot,
         c(0.025,0.975))

#2024
set.seed(123)

Hoover_leibios24_boot <- replicate(

  )

### MHI values table 
bias_a1_landuse <- tibble(
  campus = c("USP","HAN_Arnhem","UvA", "Leiden_Bioscience","Leiden_Binnenstad","Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein"
),
  "X2023" = c(Hoover_usp23_landuse,Hoover_hanarn23_landuse,Hoover_uva23_landuse, Hoover_leibios23_landuse,Hoover_leibin23_landuse,Hoover_leeu23_landuse),
  "X2024" = c(Hoover_usp24_landuse,Hoover_hanarn24_landuse,Hoover_uva24_landuse,Hoover_leibios24_landuse,Hoover_leibin24_landuse,Hoover_leeu24_landuse),
  "X2025" = c(Hoover_usp25_landuse,Hoover_hanarn25_landuse,Hoover_uva25_landuse,Hoover_leibios25_landuse,Hoover_leibin25_landuse,Hoover_leeu25_landuse)
)

write.csv(bias_a1_landuse,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/MHILanduse_a1.csv")

### for boxplot

bias_landuse_a1_long <- bias_a1_landuse %>%
     rename(
       "2023" = `X2023`,
       "2024" = `X2024`,
       "2025" = `X2025`
     )

bias_a1_landuse_long <- bias_landuse_a1_long %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = "2023":"2025",
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "value"
  )
write.csv(bias_landuse_a1_long,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/MHIlanduse_a1_box.csv")


##### Bootstrap table

bias_a1_landuse_CI <- data.frame(
  bias_a1_landuse,
  "2023_2.5%" = c(Hoover_usp23_boot[1],Hoover_hanarn23_boot[1],Hoover_uva23_boot[1], Hoover_leibios23_boot[1],Hoover_leibin23_boot[1], Hoover_leeu23_boot[1]),
  "2023_97.5%" = c(Hoover_usp23_boot[2],Hoover_hanarn23_boot[2],Hoover_uva23_boot[2], Hoover_leibios23_boot[2],Hoover_leibin23_boot[2], Hoover_leeu23_boot[2]),
  "2024_2.5%" = c(Hoover_usp24_boot[1],Hoover_hanarn24_boot[1],Hoover_uva24_boot[1], Hoover_leibios24_boot[1],Hoover_leibin24_boot[1], Hoover_leeu24_boot[1]),
  "2024_97.5%" = c(Hoover_usp24_boot[2],Hoover_hanarn24_boot[2],Hoover_uva24_boot[2], Hoover_leibios24_boot[2],Hoover_leibin24_boot[2], Hoover_leeu24_boot[2]),
  "2025_2.5%" = c(Hoover_usp25_boot[1],Hoover_hanarn25_boot[1],Hoover_uva25_boot[1], Hoover_leibios25_boot[1],Hoover_leibin25_boot[1], Hoover_leeu25_boot[1]),
  "2025_97.5%" = c(Hoover_usp25_boot[2],Hoover_hanarn25_boot[2],Hoover_uva25_boot[2], Hoover_leibios25_boot[2],Hoover_leibin25_boot[2], Hoover_leeu25_boot[2])
)


write.csv(bias_a1_landuse_CI,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/MHIlanduse_a1_CI.csv")


## -- Rq2 only bioblitz 23-25

####### WUR main campus ##########

## 2024 
dist_comb_wur24 <-subset(Observations_2024_clip_lu2, campus == "WUR_main_campus")
dist_comb_wur24_counts <- dist_comb_wur24 %>% 
  group_by(landuse_value2) %>%
  summarise(total_observations = n())

dist_comb_wur24_counts <- st_drop_geometry(dist_comb_wur24_counts)

dist_comb_wur24_counts <- dist_comb_wur24_counts %>%
  rename(landuse_values = landuse_value2)

wur24_merged <- left_join(dist_comb_wur24_counts,wur_main_campus_landuse, by = "landuse_values" )

wur24_obs_land_exp <- wur24_merged %>%
  mutate(expected_obs = perc_area*sum(total_observations)/100)

Hoover_wur24_landuse <- sum(abs(wur24_obs_land_exp$total_observations - wur24_obs_land_exp$expected_obs)) / 
      (2 * sum(wur24_obs_land_exp$total_observations))

Hoover_wur24_landuse_obscount <- wur24_obs_land_exp$total_observations
Hoover_wur24_landuse_expcount <- wur24_obs_land_exp$expected_obs


### Bootstrap

#2024
set.seed(123)

Hoover_wur24_boot <- replicate(
  1000,
  bootstrap_hoover(
    dist_comb_wur24,
    wur_main_campus_landuse
  )
)

summary(Hoover_wur24_boot)

Hoover_wur24_boot<-quantile(Hoover_wur24_boot,
         c(0.025,0.975))

### join MHI land use values as a table
bias_a2_landuse <- tibble(
  campus = c("WUR_main_campus","Nijmegen_campus","Velp_Landgoed_Larenstein","UT_campus", "Delft_TU_Campus","Groningen_Zernike"
),
  "X2024" = c(Hoover_wur24_landuse,Hoover_nij24_landuse,Hoover_vel24_landuse,Hoover_ut24_landuse,Hoover_del24_landuse,Hoover_gro24_landuse)
  
)

write.csv(bias_a2_landuse,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/MHILanduse_a2.csv")


## join bootstrap values

bias_a2_landuse_CI <- data.frame(
  bias_a2_landuse,
  "CI_2.5%" = c(Hoover_wur24_boot[1],Hoover_nij24_boot[1],Hoover_vel24_boot[1],Hoover_ut24_boot[1],Hoover_del24_boot[1],Hoover_gro24_boot[1]),
  "CI_97.5%" = c(Hoover_wur24_boot[2],Hoover_nij24_boot[2],Hoover_vel24_boot[2],Hoover_ut24_boot[2],Hoover_del24_boot[2],Hoover_gro24_boot[2])
)

write.csv(bias_a2_landuse_CI,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/MHIlanduse_a2_CI.csv")




```

#### Land use (c)

```{r}


# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
bias_landuse_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2024, bias_a1_landuse$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_landuse_2423_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2024, bias_a1_landuse$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_landuse_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2024, bias_a1_landuse$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
bias_landuse_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2025, bias_a1_landuse$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_landuse_2523_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2025, bias_a1_landuse$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_landuse_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2025, bias_a1_landuse$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
bias_landuse_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2025, bias_a1_landuse$X2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_landuse_2524_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2025, bias_a1_landuse$X2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_landuse_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_landuse$X2025, bias_a1_landuse$X2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

#####
results_bias_landuse <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(bias_landuse_2423_greater$statistic,
                bias_landuse_2423_less$statistic,
                bias_landuse_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_landuse_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_landuse_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_landuse_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_landuse_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_landuse_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_landuse_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_landuse_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_landuse_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_landuse_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_landuse_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_landuse_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_landuse_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_landuse_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_landuse_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_landuse_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_landuse_2423_greater$alternative,bias_landuse_2423_less$alternative,bias_landuse_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_landuse_2523_greater$alternative,bias_landuse_2523_less$alternative,bias_landuse_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_landuse_2524_greater$alternative,bias_landuse_2524_less$alternative,bias_landuse_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_landuse_2423_greater$method, bias_landuse_2423_less$method, bias_landuse_2423_twosided$method,bias_landuse_2523_greater$method, bias_landuse_2523_less$method, bias_landuse_2523_twosided$method,bias_landuse_2524_greater$method, bias_landuse_2524_less$method, bias_landuse_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_bias_landuse,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_bias_landuse.csv")


```

#### Observer (a)

```{r}


### 2025
total_observers25 <- length(unique(Observations_2025_clip_filtered$user.name))

tot_obs_camp25 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarize(count_observations_campus = n())

tot_obs_camp25 <- st_drop_geometry(tot_obs_camp25)

tot_observers25 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarize(count_observers = n_distinct(user.name))

tot_obs_observ25 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name) %>%
  summarize(count_observations_observer = n())

## Join
tot25 <- tot_obs_observ25 %>%
  left_join(tot_obs_camp25, by = "campus")

tot25 <-st_drop_geometry(tot25)

tot25 <- tot25 %>%
  left_join(tot_observers25, by = "campus")

## Read this !! https://dplyr.tidyverse.org/reference/reframe.html

total_observers_all25 <- tot25 %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name,count_observations_observer) %>%
  reframe(expected_observations = count_observations_campus * 1/count_observers) 

### 2024
total_observers24 <- length(unique(Observations_2024_clip_filtered$user.name))

tot_obs_camp24 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarize(count_observations_campus = n())

tot_obs_camp24 <- st_drop_geometry(tot_obs_camp24)

tot_observers24 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarize(count_observers = n_distinct(user.name))

tot_obs_observ24 <- Observations_2024_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name) %>%
  summarize(count_observations_observer = n())

## Join
tot24 <- tot_obs_observ24 %>%
  left_join(tot_obs_camp24, by = "campus")

tot24 <-st_drop_geometry(tot24)

tot24 <- tot24 %>%
  left_join(tot_observers24, by = "campus")

## Read this !! https://dplyr.tidyverse.org/reference/reframe.html

total_observers_all24 <- tot24 %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name,count_observations_observer) %>%
  reframe(expected_observations = count_observations_campus * 1/count_observers) 


## 2023

total_observers23 <- length(unique(Observations_2023_clip_filtered$user.name))

tot_obs_camp23 <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarize(count_observations_campus = n())

tot_observers23 <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus) %>%
  summarize(count_observers = n_distinct(user.name))

tot_obs_observ23 <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name) %>%
  summarize(count_observations_observer = n())

tot_obs_camp23 <- st_drop_geometry(tot_obs_camp23)
## Join
tot23 <- tot_obs_observ23 %>%
  left_join(tot_obs_camp23, by = "campus")

tot23 <-st_drop_geometry(tot23)

tot23 <- tot23 %>%
  left_join(tot_observers23, by = "campus")

## Read this !! https://dplyr.tidyverse.org/reference/reframe.html

total_observers_all23 <- tot23 %>%
  group_by(campus,user.name,count_observations_observer) %>%
  reframe(expected_observations = count_observations_campus * 1/count_observers) 

##### Functions

observer_boot_function <- function(obs_data, expected_observer){

  boot <- obs_data[sample(nrow(obs_data), replace = TRUE), ]

  boot_counts <- boot %>%
    group_by(user.name) %>%
    summarise(
      count_observations_observer = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  merged <- left_join(
    expected_observer,
    boot_counts,
    by = "user.name"
  )

  merged$count_observations_observer[
    is.na(merged$count_observations_observer)
  ] <- 0

 Hoover_original_function(
  obs_counts = merged$count_observations_observer,
  expected_counts = merged$expected_observations
)
}
 
observer_boot_function <- function(obs_data, expected_observer){

  obs_data <- st_drop_geometry(obs_data)
  expected_observer <- st_drop_geometry(expected_observer)

  boot <- obs_data[sample(nrow(obs_data), replace = TRUE), ]

  boot_counts <- boot %>%
    group_by(user.name) %>%
    summarise(
      count_observations_observer = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  merged <- left_join(
    expected_observer,
    boot_counts,
    by = "user.name"
  )

  merged$count_observations_observer[
    is.na(merged$count_observations_observer)
  ] <- 0

  Hoover_original_function(
    obs_counts = merged$count_observations_observer,
    expected_counts = merged$expected_observations
  )
}


### 1 Hoover index value will be estimated per campus per year ---> From here each step will happen for each campus separately

#### Subset for each campus

unique(total_observers_all24$campus)

### rq1,2 opp 23 biob 24-25

#2025
total_observers_all25_usp <- subset(total_observers_all25, campus == "USP")

total_observers_all25_uva <- subset(total_observers_all25, campus == "Amsterdam_Science_Park")

total_observers_all25_hanarn <- subset(total_observers_all25, campus == "HAN_arnhem")

total_observers_all25_leeu <- subset(total_observers_all25, campus == "Leeuwarden_Van_Hall_Larenstein")

total_observers_all25_leid_biosc <- subset(total_observers_all25, campus == "Leiden_Bioscience_Park")

###### ---------- USP --------- #####

## 2025
# Estimate Modified Hoover index
Hoover_observer_usp25 <- sum(abs(total_observers_all25_usp$count_observations_observer - total_observers_all25_usp$expected_observations)) / (2 * sum(total_observers_all25_usp$count_observations_observer))
  

### Bootstrap

## function should run only for the campus investigated -- filter all observations 
Observations_2025_clip_filtered_usp25 <- Observations_2025_clip_filtered %>%
  filter(campus == "USP")

total_observers_all25_usp_expected <- total_observers_all25_usp %>%
  dplyr::select(user.name, expected_observations)

## then run bootstrap
set.seed(123)

## 2025
Hoover_usp25_boot_ob <- replicate(
  1000,
  observer_boot_function(
    Observations_2025_clip_filtered_usp25,
    total_observers_all25_usp_expected
  )
)


summary(Hoover_usp25_boot_ob)

Hoover_usp25_boot_ob_CI<-quantile(Hoover_usp25_boot_ob,
         c(0.025,0.975))

Hoover_observer_leibios23 <- sum(abs(total_observers_all23_leid_biosc$count_observations_observer - total_observers_all23_leid_biosc$expected_observations)) / (2 * sum(total_observers_all23_leid_biosc$count_observations_observer))

### Bootstrap

## function should run only for the campus investigated -- filter all observations 
Observations_2023_clip_filtered_leibios23 <- Observations_2023_clip_filtered %>%
  filter(campus == "Leiden_Bioscience_Park")

total_observers_all23_leibios_expected <- total_observers_all23_leid_biosc %>%
  dplyr::select(user.name, expected_observations)

## then run bootstrap
set.seed(123)

Hoover_leibios23_boot_ob <- replicate(
  1000,
  observer_boot_function(
    Observations_2023_clip_filtered_leibios23,
    total_observers_all23_leibios_expected
  )
)


summary(Hoover_leibios23_boot_ob)

Hoover_leibios23_boot_ob_CI<-quantile(Hoover_leibios23_boot_ob,
         c(0.025,0.975))
```

#### Observer (b)

```{r}


# 2024 ~ 2023
## greater
bias_observer_2423_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2024, bias_a1_observer$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_observer_2423_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2024, bias_a1_observer$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_observer_2423_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2024, bias_a1_observer$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

##2025 ~ 2023:

## greater
bias_observer_2523_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2025, bias_a1_observer$X2023, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_observer_2523_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2025, bias_a1_observer$X2023, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_observer_2523_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2025, bias_a1_observer$X2023, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## 2025 ~ 2024

## greater
bias_observer_2524_greater <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2025, bias_a1_observer$X2024, alternative = "greater", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## less
bias_observer_2524_less <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2025, bias_a1_observer$X2024, alternative = "less", paired = T, na.rm = drop)

## both
bias_observer_2524_twosided <- wilcox.test(bias_a1_observer$X2025, bias_a1_observer$X2024, paired = T, na.rm = drop)

#####
results_bias_observer <- data.frame(
  comparison = c("2024~2023","2024~2023","2024~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2023","2025~2024","2025~2024","2025~2024"),
  statistic = c(bias_observer_2423_greater$statistic,
                bias_observer_2423_less$statistic,
                bias_observer_2423_twosided$statistic,bias_observer_2523_greater$statistic,
                bias_observer_2523_less$statistic,
                bias_observer_2523_twosided$statistic,bias_observer_2524_greater$statistic,
                bias_observer_2524_less$statistic,
                bias_observer_2524_twosided$statistic),

  p.value = c(bias_observer_2423_greater$p.value,
              bias_observer_2423_less$p.value,
              bias_observer_2423_twosided$p.value,bias_observer_2523_greater$p.value,
              bias_observer_2523_less$p.value,
              bias_observer_2523_twosided$p.value,bias_observer_2524_greater$p.value,
              bias_observer_2524_less$p.value,
              bias_observer_2524_twosided$p.value),

  alternative = c(bias_observer_2423_greater$alternative,bias_observer_2423_less$alternative,bias_observer_2423_twosided$alternative,bias_observer_2523_greater$alternative,bias_observer_2523_less$alternative,bias_observer_2523_twosided$alternative,bias_observer_2524_greater$alternative,bias_observer_2524_less$alternative,bias_observer_2524_twosided$alternative),

  method = c(bias_observer_2423_greater$method, bias_observer_2423_less$method, bias_observer_2423_twosided$method,bias_observer_2523_greater$method, bias_observer_2523_less$method, bias_observer_2523_twosided$method,bias_observer_2524_greater$method, bias_observer_2524_less$method, bias_observer_2524_twosided$method)
)

write.csv(results_bias_observer,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_bias_observer.csv")


```


#### Join and save wilcoxon and t tests

```{r}


## For this paper and these graphs i only focus on two-sided for nni nbi nri and bi and on less for land use and observer bias. but i show everything here 


Wilcoxon_test_joined_results_bias_greater <- bind_rows(
  results_bias_nni %>% filter(alternative == "greater") %>% mutate(Metric = "Nearest_Neighbor_Index"),
  results_bias_nbi %>% filter(alternative == "greater") %>% mutate(Metric = "Nearest_Building_Index"),
  results_bias_nri %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Nearest_Road/path_Index") ,
  results_bias_landuse %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Land_use")  ,
  results_bias_observer %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Observer")  ,
  results_arthoth_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Arthropods_other")  ,
  results_bwa_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Bees_wasps_ants")  ,
  results_beet_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Beetles")  ,
  results_bi_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Birds")  ,
  results_bu_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Bugs_cicadas_aphids") ,
  results_butt_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Butterflies") ,
  results_drag_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Dragonflies") ,
  results_fi_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Fish") ,
  results_flie_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Flies_mosquitoes") ,
  results_gra_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Grasshoppers_crickets") ,
  results_insoth_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Insects_other") ,
  results_ma_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Mammals") ,
  results_mol_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Mollusks")  ,
  results_mos_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Mosses_lichens") ,
  results_moth_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Moths_micros") ,
  results_mush_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Mushrooms") ,
  results_invoth_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Invertebrates_other") ,
  results_pla_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Plants") ,
  results_rep_bias %>% filter(alternative == "greater")  %>% mutate(Metric = "Reptiles_amphibians"))

write.csv(Wilcoxon_test_joined_results_bias_greater,"C:/Users/Const007/OneDrive - Universiteit Utrecht/Desktop/PhD_planning/Paper1/Tables/wilcoxon_test_bias_greater.csv")
```
